summary_zh: 随着人工智能代理自动化关键工作负载，它们仍然容易受到间接提示注入(IPI)攻击。当前的防御依赖于监控协议，这些协议联合评估代理的思维链(CoT)和工具使用动作，以确保与用户意图对齐。我们展示了这些基于监控的防御可以通过一种新颖的代理即代理攻击绕过，其中提示注入攻击将代理视为一种传递机制，从而同时绕过代理和监控器。以往关于可扩展监督的工作主要关注小型监控器是否可以监督大型代理，而我们则表明即使是前沿规模的监控器也易受攻击。诸如Qwen2.5-72B这样的大规模监控模型可以被具有类似能力的代理（如GPT-4o mini和Llama-3.1-70B）绕过。在AgentDojo基准测试中，我们针对AlignmentCheck和Extract-and-Evaluate监控器，在不同的监控LLM下，实现了很高的攻击成功率。我们的研究结果表明，当前基于监控的代理防御在根本上是脆弱的，与模型规模无关。

title: CoWork-X: Experience-Optimized Co-Evolution for Multi-Agent Collaboration System
summary: Large language models are enabling language-conditioned agents in interactive environments, but highly cooperative tasks often impose two simultaneous constraints: sub-second real-time coordination and sustained multi-episode adaptation under a strict online token budget. Existing approaches either rely on frequent in-episode reasoning that induces latency and timing jitter, or deliver post-episode improvements through unstructured text that is difficult to compile into reliable low-cost execution. We propose CoWork-X, an active co-evolution framework that casts peer collaboration as a closed-loop optimization problem across episodes, inspired by fast--slow memory separation. CoWork-X instantiates a Skill-Agent that executes via HTN (hierarchical task network)-based skill retrieval from a structured, interpretable, and compositional skill library, and a post-episode Co-Optimizer that performs patch-style skill consolidation with explicit budget constraints and drift regularization. Experiments in challenging Overcooked-AI-like realtime collaboration benchmarks demonstrate that CoWork-X achieves stable, cumulative performance gains while steadily reducing online latency and token usage.
tldr: CoWork-X is a co-evolution framework for multi-agent collaboration that uses a skill library and post-episode optimization to improve performance while reducing latency and token usage in real-time environments.
tldr_zh: CoWork-X是一个多智能体协作的共同进化框架，它使用技能库和episode后优化来提高性能，同时降低实时环境中的延迟和token使用。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型正在赋能交互式环境中的语言条件代理，但高度协作的任务通常会施加两个同时存在的约束：亚秒级的实时协调和在严格的在线token预算下持续的多幕适应。现有的方法要么依赖于频繁的幕内推理，从而导致延迟和时间抖动，要么通过非结构化的文本提供幕后改进，而这些文本难以编译成可靠的低成本执行。我们提出CoWork-X，一个主动协同进化框架，将同伴协作转化为一个跨幕的闭环优化问题，其灵感来自快慢记忆分离。CoWork-X实例化了一个技能代理，该代理通过基于HTN（分层任务网络）的技能检索，从一个结构化、可解释和可组合的技能库中执行技能，以及一个幕后协同优化器，该优化器执行具有显式预算约束和漂移正则化的补丁式技能整合。在具有挑战性的类似Overcooked-AI的实时协作基准测试中进行的实验表明，CoWork-X实现了稳定、累积的性能提升，同时稳步降低了在线延迟和token使用量。

title: Rethinking the Trust Region in LLM Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a cornerstone for fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs), with Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) serving as the de facto standard algorithm. Despite its ubiquity, we argue that the core ratio clipping mechanism in PPO is structurally ill-suited for the large vocabularies inherent to LLMs. PPO constrains policy updates based on the probability ratio of sampled tokens, which serves as a noisy single-sample Monte Carlo estimate of the true policy divergence. This creates a sub-optimal learning dynamic: updates to low-probability tokens are aggressively over-penalized, while potentially catastrophic shifts in high-probability tokens are under-constrained, leading to training inefficiency and instability. To address this, we propose Divergence Proximal Policy Optimization (DPPO), which substitutes heuristic clipping with a more principled constraint based on a direct estimate of policy divergence (e.g., Total Variation or KL). To avoid huge memory footprint, we introduce the efficient Binary and Top-K approximations to capture the essential divergence with negligible overhead. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that DPPO achieves superior training stability and efficiency compared to existing methods, offering a more robust foundation for RL-based LLM fine-tuning.
tldr: This paper introduces Divergence Proximal Policy Optimization (DPPO), a new RL algorithm for LLM fine-tuning that replaces PPO's clipping mechanism with a more principled constraint based on direct policy divergence estimation, resulting in improved training stability and efficiency.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的用于LLM微调的强化学习算法，即散度近端策略优化（DPPO）。DPPO用基于直接策略散度估计的更原则性约束来替代PPO的剪裁机制，从而提高了训练的稳定性和效率。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）已成为微调大型语言模型（LLMs）的基石，而近端策略优化（PPO）是事实上的标准算法。尽管PPO无处不在，但我们认为其核心比率剪裁机制在结构上不适合LLMs固有的庞大词汇量。PPO基于采样token的概率比率来约束策略更新，这相当于真实策略散度的噪声单样本蒙特卡洛估计。这造成了一种次优的学习动态：对低概率token的更新会受到过度惩罚，而高概率token中潜在的灾难性变化则受到约束不足，从而导致训练效率低下和不稳定。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了散度近端策略优化（DPPO），它用基于策略散度直接估计（例如，总变差或KL散度）的更具原理性的约束来替代启发式剪裁。为了避免巨大的内存占用，我们引入了高效的二元和Top-K近似，以用可忽略的开销捕获本质散度。大量的经验评估表明，与现有方法相比，DPPO实现了更高的训练稳定性和效率，为基于RL的LLM微调提供了更稳健的基础。

title: CRoSS: A Continual Robotic Simulation Suite for Scalable Reinforcement Learning with High Task Diversity and Realistic Physics Simulation
summary: Continual reinforcement learning (CRL) requires agents to learn from a sequence of tasks without forgetting previously acquired policies. In this work, we introduce a novel benchmark suite for CRL based on realistically simulated robots in the Gazebo simulator. Our Continual Robotic Simulation Suite (CRoSS) benchmarks rely on two robotic platforms: a two-wheeled differential-drive robot with lidar, camera and bumper sensor, and a robotic arm with seven joints. The former represent an agent in line-following and object-pushing scenarios, where variation of visual and structural parameters yields a large number of distinct tasks, whereas the latter is used in two goal-reaching scenarios with high-level cartesian hand position control (modeled after the Continual World benchmark), and low-level control based on joint angles. For the robotic arm benchmarks, we provide additional kinematics-only variants that bypass the need for physical simulation (as long as no sensor readings are required), and which can be run two orders of magnitude faster. CRoSS is designed to be easily extensible and enables controlled studies of continual reinforcement learning in robotic settings with high physical realism, and in particular allow the use of almost arbitrary simulated sensors. To ensure reproducibility and ease of use, we provide a containerized setup (Apptainer) that runs out-of-the-box, and report performances of standard RL algorithms, including Deep Q-Networks (DQN) and policy gradient methods. This highlights the suitability as a scalable and reproducible benchmark for CRL research.
tldr: The paper introduces CRoSS, a new benchmark suite for Continual Reinforcement Learning (CRL) in realistic robotic simulations within Gazebo, featuring diverse tasks and robotic platforms, designed for scalability and reproducibility.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为CRoSS的新基准套件，用于在Gazebo中进行真实的机器人模拟的持续强化学习(CRL)，具有多样化的任务和机器人平台，旨在实现可扩展性和可重复性。
summary_zh: 持续强化学习(CRL)要求智能体能够从一系列任务中学习，且不会遗忘先前获得的策略。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个基于Gazebo仿真器中真实模拟机器人的新型CRL基准测试套件。我们的持续机器人仿真套件(CRoSS)基准测试依赖于两个机器人平台：一个配备激光雷达、摄像头和碰撞传感器的双轮差动驱动机器人，以及一个具有七个关节的机械臂。前者代表在循线和物体推移场景中的智能体，其中视觉和结构参数的变化产生大量不同的任务；而后者则用于两个目标到达场景，分别具有基于笛卡尔手部位置的高层控制（建模效仿持续世界基准测试）以及基于关节角度的底层控制。对于机械臂基准测试，我们提供了额外的仅依赖运动学的变体，从而无需物理仿真（只要不需要传感器读数），且可以快两个数量级地运行。CRoSS被设计为易于扩展，并能够对具有高度物理真实感的机器人环境中的持续强化学习进行受控研究，尤其允许使用几乎任意的模拟传感器。为了确保可复现性和易用性，我们提供了一个开箱即用的容器化设置(Apptainer)，并报告了包括深度Q网络(DQN)和策略梯度方法在内的标准强化学习算法的性能。这凸显了其作为可扩展且可复现的CRL研究基准测试的适用性。

title: Privileged Information Distillation for Language Models
summary: Training-time privileged information (PI) can enable language models to succeed on tasks they would otherwise fail, making it a powerful tool for reinforcement learning in hard, long-horizon settings. However, transferring capabilities learned with PI to policies that must act without it at inference time remains a fundamental challenge. We study this problem in the context of distilling frontier models for multi-turn agentic environments, where closed-source systems typically hide their internal reasoning and expose only action trajectories. This breaks standard distillation pipelines, since successful behavior is observable but the reasoning process is not. For this, we introduce π-Distill, a joint teacher-student objective that trains a PI-conditioned teacher and an unconditioned student simultaneously using the same model. Additionally, we also introduce On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD), an alternative approach that trains using Reinforcement Learning (RL) with a reverse KL-penalty between the student and the PI-conditioned teacher. We show that both of these algorithms effectively distill frontier agents using action-only PI. Specifically we find that π-Distill and in some cases OPSD, outperform industry standard practices (Supervised finetuning followed by RL) that assume access to full Chain-of-Thought supervision across multiple agentic benchmarks, models, and forms of PI. We complement our results with extensive analysis that characterizes the factors enabling effective learning with PI, focusing primarily on π-Distill and characterizing when OPSD is competitive.
tldr: This paper introduces two novel algorithms, π-Distill and On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD), for distilling capabilities learned with privileged information (PI) in language models for multi-turn agentic environments using action-only PI, outperforming standard practices.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了两种新算法 π-Distill 和 On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD)，用于在使用 action-only PI 的多轮Agent环境中，提取语言模型中使用特权信息 (PI) 学习的能力，优于标准做法。
summary_zh: 训练时特权信息（PI）能够使语言模型在原本会失败的任务上取得成功，使其成为困难的长时程环境中强化学习的强大工具。然而，将用PI学习到的能力迁移到推理时必须在没有PI的情况下行动的策略仍然是一个根本性的挑战。我们研究了在多轮智能体环境中提炼前沿模型的问题，其中闭源系统通常隐藏其内部推理，只暴露行动轨迹。这打破了标准提炼流程，因为虽然成功的行为是可观察的，但推理过程却不可见。为此，我们引入了π-Distill，这是一种联合教师-学生目标，它使用同一模型同时训练PI条件教师和无条件学生。此外，我们还引入了On-Policy Self-Distillation (OPSD)，这是一种替代方法，它使用强化学习（RL）进行训练，并在学生和PI条件教师之间施加反向KL惩罚。我们证明了这两种算法都有效地使用仅行动PI来提炼前沿智能体。具体来说，我们发现π-Distill以及在某些情况下OPSD的表现优于行业标准做法（监督微调后进行RL），后者假设可以跨多个智能体基准、模型和PI形式访问完整的思维链监督。我们通过广泛的分析来补充我们的结果，这些分析描述了使利用PI进行有效学习的因素，主要关注π-Distill，并描述了OPSD何时具有竞争力。

title: Fluid Representations in Reasoning Models
summary: Reasoning language models, which generate long chains of thought, dramatically outperform non-reasoning language models on abstract problems. However, the internal model mechanisms that allow this superior performance remain poorly understood. We present a mechanistic analysis of how QwQ-32B - a model specifically trained to produce extensive reasoning traces - process abstract structural information. On Mystery Blocksworld - a semantically obfuscated planning domain - we find that QwQ-32B gradually improves its internal representation of actions and concepts during reasoning. The model develops abstract encodings that focus on structure rather than specific action names. Through steering experiments, we establish causal evidence that these adaptations improve problem solving: injecting refined representations from successful traces boosts accuracy, while symbolic representations can replace many obfuscated encodings with minimal performance loss. We find that one of the factors driving reasoning model performance is in-context refinement of token representations, which we dub Fluid Reasoning Representations.
tldr: This paper investigates how a reasoning language model refines its internal representations of actions and concepts during reasoning, finding that in-context refinement of token representations is a key factor in performance.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了一个推理语言模型如何在推理过程中改进其内部对行为和概念的表征，发现token表征的上下文改进是性能的关键因素。
summary_zh: 推理语言模型能够生成长篇的思维链，在抽象问题上的表现显著优于非推理语言模型。然而，使其获得这种优越性能的内部模型机制仍然知之甚少。我们对 QwQ-32B（一种专门训练用于生成广泛推理轨迹的模型）如何处理抽象结构信息进行了机制性分析。在 Mystery Blocksworld（一个语义混淆的规划领域）上，我们发现 QwQ-32B 在推理过程中逐渐改进其对动作和概念的内部表示。该模型发展出关注结构而非特定动作名称的抽象编码。通过引导实验，我们建立了这些适应性改进问题解决能力的因果证据：注入来自成功轨迹的精炼表示可以提高准确性，而符号表示可以替代许多混淆的编码，且性能损失极小。我们发现，驱动推理模型性能的因素之一是token表示的上下文精炼，我们称之为流体推理表示。

title: Safe Urban Traffic Control via Uncertainty-Aware Conformal Prediction and World-Model Reinforcement Learning
summary: Urban traffic management demands systems that simultaneously predict future conditions, detect anomalies, and take safe corrective actions -- all while providing reliability guarantees. We present STREAM-RL, a unified framework that introduces three novel algorithmic contributions: (1) PU-GAT+, an Uncertainty-Guided Adaptive Conformal Forecaster that uses prediction uncertainty to dynamically reweight graph attention via confidence-monotonic attention, achieving distribution-free coverage guarantees; (2) CRFN-BY, a Conformal Residual Flow Network that models uncertainty-normalized residuals via normalizing flows with Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR control under arbitrary dependence; and (3) LyCon-WRL+, an Uncertainty-Guided Safe World-Model RL agent with Lyapunov stability certificates, certified Lipschitz bounds, and uncertainty-propagated imagination rollouts. To our knowledge, this is the first framework to propagate calibrated uncertainty from forecasting through anomaly detection to safe policy learning with end-to-end theoretical guarantees. Experiments on multiple real-world traffic trajectory data demonstrate that STREAM-RL achieves 91.4\% coverage efficiency, controls FDR at 4.1\% under verified dependence, and improves safety rate to 95.2\% compared to 69\% for standard PPO while achieving higher reward, with 23ms end-to-end inference latency.
tldr: The paper introduces STREAM-RL, a novel framework for safe urban traffic control that combines uncertainty-aware forecasting, anomaly detection, and safe policy learning with end-to-end theoretical guarantees and strong empirical results.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了STREAM-RL，一个新颖的用于安全城市交通控制的框架，它结合了不确定性感知预测、异常检测和安全策略学习，具有端到端的理论保证和强大的经验结果。
summary_zh: 城市交通管理需要能够同时预测未来状况、检测异常并采取安全纠正措施的系统，同时还要提供可靠性保证。我们提出了STREAM-RL，这是一个统一的框架，引入了三个新颖的算法贡献：（1）PU-GAT+，一种不确定性引导的自适应一致性预测器，它使用预测不确定性来动态地重新加权图注意力，通过置信度单调注意力实现与分布无关的覆盖率保证；（2）CRFN-BY，一种一致性残差流网络，它在任意依赖性下，通过使用Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR控制的归一化流来建模不确定性归一化的残差；以及（3）LyCon-WRL+，一种具有李雅普诺夫稳定性证书、认证的利普希茨界和不确定性传播的想象推演的不确定性指导的安全世界模型强化学习智能体。据我们所知，这是第一个将校准后的不确定性从预测传递到异常检测，再到具有端到端理论保证的安全策略学习的框架。在多个真实世界交通轨迹数据上的实验表明，STREAM-RL实现了91.4%的覆盖效率，在验证的依赖性下将FDR控制在4.1%，并将安全率提高到95.2%，而标准PPO的安全率为69%，同时实现了更高的奖励，端到端推理延迟为23毫秒。

title: UI-Mem: Self-Evolving Experience Memory for Online Reinforcement Learning in Mobile GUI Agents
summary: Online Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising paradigm for enhancing GUI agents through direct environment interaction. However, its effectiveness is severely hindered by inefficient credit assignment in long-horizon tasks and repetitive errors across tasks due to the lack of experience transfer. To address these challenges, we propose UI-Mem, a novel framework that enhances GUI online RL with a Hierarchical Experience Memory. Unlike traditional replay buffers, our memory accumulates structured knowledge, including high-level workflows, subtask skills, and failure patterns. These experiences are stored as parameterized templates that enable cross-task and cross-application transfer. To effectively integrate memory guidance into online RL, we introduce Stratified Group Sampling, which injects varying levels of guidance across trajectories within each rollout group to maintain outcome diversity, driving the unguided policy toward internalizing guided behaviors. Furthermore, a Self-Evolving Loop continuously abstracts novel strategies and errors to keep the memory aligned with the agent's evolving policy. Experiments on online GUI benchmarks demonstrate that UI-Mem significantly outperforms traditional RL baselines and static reuse strategies, with strong generalization to unseen applications. Project page: https://ui-mem.github.io
tldr: The paper introduces UI-Mem, a hierarchical experience memory framework for online reinforcement learning in GUI agents that facilitates experience transfer and improves credit assignment with stratified sampling and a self-evolving loop mechanism.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为 UI-Mem 的分层经验记忆框架，用于 GUI 代理中的在线强化学习，该框架通过分层抽样和自我演化循环机制促进经验转移并改善信用分配。
summary_zh: 在线强化学习(RL)为通过直接环境交互来增强GUI智能体提供了一种很有前景的范式。然而，其有效性受到长周期任务中低效的信用分配以及缺乏经验迁移而导致的任务间重复错误的严重阻碍。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了UI-Mem，一个通过分层经验记忆增强GUI在线RL的新框架。与传统的重放缓存不同，我们的记忆积累了结构化的知识，包括高层工作流、子任务技能和失败模式。这些经验被存储为参数化模板，从而支持跨任务和跨应用程序的迁移。为了有效地将记忆引导整合到在线RL中，我们引入了分层分组采样，它在每个滚动组内跨轨迹注入不同级别的引导，以保持结果的多样性，从而驱动未引导策略内化引导行为。此外，一个自进化循环不断抽象新的策略和错误，以使记忆与智能体不断演变的策略保持一致。在在线GUI基准测试上的实验表明，UI-Mem显著优于传统的RL基线和静态复用策略，并对未见过的应用程序具有很强的泛化能力。项目页面：https://ui-mem.github.io

title: Weaver: End-to-End Agentic System Training for Video Interleaved Reasoning
summary: Video reasoning constitutes a comprehensive assessment of a model's capabilities, as it demands robust perceptual and interpretive skills, thereby serving as a means to explore the boundaries of model performance. While recent research has leveraged text-centric Chain-of-Thought reasoning to augment these capabilities, such approaches frequently suffer from representational mismatch and restricted by limited perceptual acuity. To address these limitations, we propose Weaver, a novel, end-to-end trainable multimodal reasoning agentic system. Weaver empowers its policy model to dynamically invoke diverse tools throughout the reasoning process, enabling progressive acquisition of crucial visual cues and construction of authentic multimodal reasoning trajectories. Furthermore, we integrate a reinforcement learning algorithm to allow the system to freely explore strategies for employing and combining these tools with trajectory-free data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our system, Weaver, enhances performance on several complex video reasoning benchmarks, particularly those involving long videos.
tldr: The paper introduces Weaver, an end-to-end trainable multimodal agentic system for video reasoning that dynamically invokes tools and uses reinforcement learning to improve performance on complex video benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Weaver，一个端到端可训练的多模态智能体系统，用于视频推理，该系统动态调用工具并使用强化学习来提高复杂视频基准测试的性能。
summary_zh: 视频推理是对模型能力的综合评估，因为它需要强大的感知和解释技能，从而成为探索模型性能边界的手段。虽然最近的研究利用以文本为中心的思维链推理来增强这些能力，但这些方法经常面临表征不匹配的问题，并受到有限感知敏锐度的限制。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出 Weaver，一种新型的、端到端可训练的多模态推理智能体系统。Weaver 使其策略模型能够在整个推理过程中动态调用各种工具，从而能够逐步获取关键的视觉线索，并构建真实的的多模态推理轨迹。此外，我们集成了一种强化学习算法，允许该系统自由探索使用和组合这些工具的策略，同时无需轨迹数据。大量的实验表明，我们的系统 Weaver 增强了在几个复杂的视频推理基准测试上的性能，尤其是在涉及长视频的测试中。

title: UniSurg: A Video-Native Foundation Model for Universal Understanding of Surgical Videos
summary: While foundation models have advanced surgical video analysis, current approaches rely predominantly on pixel-level reconstruction objectives that waste model capacity on low-level visual details - such as smoke, specular reflections, and fluid motion - rather than semantic structures essential for surgical understanding. We present UniSurg, a video-native foundation model that shifts the learning paradigm from pixel-level reconstruction to latent motion prediction. Built on the Video Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (V-JEPA), UniSurg introduces three key technical innovations tailored to surgical videos: 1) motion-guided latent prediction to prioritize semantically meaningful regions, 2) spatiotemporal affinity self-distillation to enforce relational consistency, and 3) feature diversity regularization to prevent representation collapse in texture-sparse surgical scenes. To enable large-scale pretraining, we curate UniSurg-15M, the largest surgical video dataset to date, comprising 3,658 hours of video from 50 sources across 13 anatomical regions. Extensive experiments across 17 benchmarks demonstrate that UniSurg significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on surgical workflow recognition (+14.6% F1 on EgoSurgery, +10.3% on PitVis), action triplet recognition (39.54% mAP-IVT on CholecT50), skill assessment, polyp segmentation, and depth estimation. These results establish UniSurg as a new standard for universal, motion-oriented surgical video understanding.
tldr: The paper introduces UniSurg, a video-native foundation model for surgical video understanding that focuses on motion prediction rather than pixel-level reconstruction, achieving state-of-the-art results across various surgical video analysis tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了UniSurg，一个用于手术视频理解的视频原生基础模型，它侧重于运动预测而非像素级重建，并在各种手术视频分析任务中取得了state-of-the-art的结果。
summary_zh: 尽管基础模型已经推动了手术视频分析的发展，但当前的方法主要依赖于像素级重建目标，导致模型能力被浪费在低级视觉细节上，例如烟雾、镜面反射和流体运动，而非对手术理解至关重要的语义结构。我们提出了UniSurg，一个视频原生的基础模型，它将学习范式从像素级重建转移到潜在运动预测。UniSurg建立在视频联合嵌入预测架构（V-JEPA）之上，引入了三个针对手术视频的关键技术创新：1）运动引导的潜在预测，以优先考虑语义上有意义的区域；2）时空亲和性自蒸馏，以强制关系一致性；3）特征多样性正则化，以防止纹理稀疏手术场景中的表征坍塌。为了实现大规模预训练，我们整理了UniSurg-15M，迄今为止最大的手术视频数据集，包含来自13个解剖区域50个来源的3658小时视频。在17个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，UniSurg在手术工作流程识别（EgoSurgery上+14.6% F1，PitVis上+10.3%）、动作三元组识别（CholecT50上39.54% mAP-IVT）、技能评估、息肉分割和深度估计方面，显著优于最先进的方法。这些结果确立了UniSurg作为通用、面向运动的手术视频理解的新标准。

title: ROMAN: Reward-Orchestrated Multi-Head Attention Network for Autonomous Driving System Testing
summary: Automated Driving System (ADS) acts as the brain of autonomous vehicles, responsible for their safety and efficiency. Safe deployment requires thorough testing in diverse real-world scenarios and compliance with traffic laws like speed limits, signal obedience, and right-of-way rules. Violations like running red lights or speeding pose severe safety risks. However, current testing approaches face significant challenges: limited ability to generate complex and high-risk law-breaking scenarios, and failing to account for complex interactions involving multiple vehicles and critical situations. To address these challenges, we propose ROMAN, a novel scenario generation approach for ADS testing that combines a multi-head attention network with a traffic law weighting mechanism. ROMAN is designed to generate high-risk violation scenarios to enable more thorough and targeted ADS evaluation. The multi-head attention mechanism models interactions among vehicles, traffic signals, and other factors. The traffic law weighting mechanism implements a workflow that leverages an LLM-based risk weighting module to evaluate violations based on the two dimensions of severity and occurrence. We have evaluated ROMAN by testing the Baidu Apollo ADS within the CARLA simulation platform and conducting extensive experiments to measure its performance. Experimental results demonstrate that ROMAN surpassed state-of-the-art tools ABLE and LawBreaker by achieving 7.91% higher average violation count than ABLE and 55.96% higher than LawBreaker, while also maintaining greater scenario diversity. In addition, only ROMAN successfully generated violation scenarios for every clause of the input traffic laws, enabling it to identify more high-risk violations than existing approaches.
tldr: The paper introduces ROMAN, a novel scenario generation approach for autonomous driving system (ADS) testing using a multi-head attention network and LLM-based traffic law weighting mechanism to generate high-risk violation scenarios. Experiments show it outperforms existing tools in violation count and scenario diversity.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ROMAN，一种用于自动驾驶系统（ADS）测试的新型场景生成方法，它使用多头注意力网络和基于LLM的交通规则加权机制来生成高风险违规场景。实验表明，它在违规计数和场景多样性方面优于现有工具。
summary_zh: 自动驾驶系统（ADS）充当自动驾驶车辆的大脑，负责其安全性和效率。安全部署需要在各种真实世界场景中进行彻底测试，并符合交通法规，如速度限制、信号遵守和先行权规则。闯红灯或超速等违规行为会带来严重的安全风险。然而，目前的测试方法面临重大挑战：生成复杂且高风险的违法场景的能力有限，并且未能考虑涉及多辆车辆和关键情况的复杂交互。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出 ROMAN，一种用于 ADS 测试的新型场景生成方法，该方法结合了多头注意力网络和交通法权重机制。ROMAN 旨在生成高风险违规场景，以实现更彻底、更有针对性的 ADS 评估。多头注意力机制对车辆、交通信号和其他因素之间的交互进行建模。交通法权重机制实现了一个工作流程，该流程利用基于 LLM 的风险加权模块，根据严重程度和发生频率这两个维度评估违规行为。我们通过在 CARLA 仿真平台上测试百度 Apollo ADS 并进行广泛实验来衡量其性能，从而对 ROMAN 进行了评估。实验结果表明，ROMAN 优于最先进的工具 ABLE 和 LawBreaker，实现了比 ABLE 高 7.91% 的平均违规计数，比 LawBreaker 高 55.96%，同时保持了更高的场景多样性。此外，只有 ROMAN 成功地为输入交通法的每个条款生成了违规场景，使其能够比现有方法识别出更多的高风险违规行为。

title: Imagine a City: CityGenAgent for Procedural 3D City Generation
summary: The automated generation of interactive 3D cities is a critical challenge with broad applications in autonomous driving, virtual reality, and embodied intelligence. While recent advances in generative models and procedural techniques have improved the realism of city generation, existing methods often struggle with high-fidelity asset creation, controllability, and manipulation. In this work, we introduce CityGenAgent, a natural language-driven framework for hierarchical procedural generation of high-quality 3D cities. Our approach decomposes city generation into two interpretable components, Block Program and Building Program. To ensure structural correctness and semantic alignment, we adopt a two-stage learning strategy: (1) Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). We train BlockGen and BuildingGen to generate valid programs that adhere to schema constraints, including non-self-intersecting polygons and complete fields; (2) Reinforcement Learning (RL). We design Spatial Alignment Reward to enhance spatial reasoning ability and Visual Consistency Reward to bridge the gap between textual descriptions and the visual modality. Benefiting from the programs and the models' generalization, CityGenAgent supports natural language editing and manipulation. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate superior semantic alignment, visual quality, and controllability compared to existing methods, establishing a robust foundation for scalable 3D city generation.
tldr: The paper introduces CityGenAgent, a natural language-driven framework for procedurally generating and editing high-quality 3D cities, using a two-stage learning strategy (SFT and RL) to ensure structural correctness and semantic alignment.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 CityGenAgent，一个由自然语言驱动的框架，用于程序化地生成和编辑高质量的3D城市。它采用了一个两阶段的学习策略（SFT 和 RL）来确保结构正确性和语义对齐。
summary_zh: 交互式3D城市的自动生成是一项关键挑战，它在自动驾驶、虚拟现实和具身智能等领域具有广泛的应用。虽然生成模型和程序化技术的最新进展提高了城市生成的真实感，但现有方法通常难以实现高保真资产创建、可控性和可操作性。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种自然语言驱动的框架CityGenAgent，用于分层程序化生成高质量的3D城市。我们的方法将城市生成分解为两个可解释的组成部分：街区程序和建筑程序。为了确保结构正确性和语义对齐，我们采用了一种两阶段学习策略：（1）监督式微调（SFT）。我们训练BlockGen和BuildingGen来生成符合模式约束的有效程序，包括非自相交多边形和完整区域；（2）强化学习（RL）。我们设计了空间对齐奖励以增强空间推理能力，并设计了视觉一致性奖励以弥合文本描述和视觉模态之间的差距。受益于程序和模型的泛化能力，CityGenAgent支持自然语言编辑和操控。综合评估表明，与现有方法相比，CityGenAgent在语义对齐、视觉质量和可控性方面表现出卓越的性能，为可扩展的3D城市生成奠定了坚实的基础。

title: E.M.Ground: A Temporal Grounding Vid-LLM with Holistic Event Perception and Matching
summary: Despite recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Vid-LLMs), Temporal Video Grounding (TVG), which aims to precisely localize time segments corresponding to query events, remains a significant challenge. Existing methods often match start and end frames by comparing frame features with two separate tokens, relying heavily on exact timestamps. However, this approach fails to capture the event's semantic continuity and integrity, leading to ambiguities. To address this, we propose E.M.Ground, a novel Vid-LLM for TVG that focuses on holistic and coherent event perception. E.M.Ground introduces three key innovations: (i) a special <event> token that aggregates information from all frames of a query event, preserving semantic continuity for accurate event matching; (ii) Savitzky-Golay smoothing to reduce noise in token-to-frame similarities across timestamps, improving prediction accuracy; (iii) multi-grained frame feature aggregation to enhance matching reliability and temporal understanding, compensating for compression-induced information loss. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets show that E.M.Ground consistently outperforms state-of-the-art Vid-LLMs by significant margins.
tldr: The paper introduces E.M.Ground, a novel Vid-LLM for Temporal Video Grounding (TVG) that uses a special <event> token, Savitzky-Golay smoothing, and multi-grained frame feature aggregation to improve event localization and matching accuracy, achieving state-of-the-art results on benchmark datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为E.M.Ground的新型用于时间视频定位（TVG）的Vid-LLM，它使用一个特殊的<event> token、Savitzky-Golay平滑和多粒度帧特征聚合来提高事件定位和匹配的准确性，并在基准数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 尽管视频大语言模型(Vid-LLMs)取得了最新进展，但时间视频定位(TVG)，即旨在精确定位与查询事件相对应的时间片段，仍然是一个重大的挑战。现有的方法通常通过比较帧特征与两个单独的token来匹配开始和结束帧，严重依赖于精确的时间戳。然而，这种方法无法捕捉事件的语义连贯性和完整性，从而导致歧义。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于TVG的新型Vid-LLM，名为E.M.Ground，它专注于全面和连贯的事件感知。E.M.Ground引入了三个关键创新：（i）一个特殊的token，聚合了查询事件所有帧的信息，保留了语义连续性，以实现准确的事件匹配；（ii）Savitzky-Golay平滑，用于减少时间戳中token到帧相似度的噪声，从而提高预测准确性；（iii）多粒度帧特征聚合，以增强匹配可靠性和时间理解，补偿压缩引起的信息损失。在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，E.M.Ground始终以显著的优势优于最先进的Vid-LLMs。

title: Reinforced Attention Learning
summary:
Post-training with Reinforcement Learning (RL) has substantially improved reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs) via test-time scaling. However, extending this paradigm to Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) through verbose rationales yields limited gains for perception and can even degrade performance.
  We propose Reinforced Attention Learning (RAL), a policy-gradient framework that directly optimizes internal attention distributions rather than output token sequences. By shifting optimization from what to generate to where to attend, RAL promotes effective information allocation and improved grounding in complex multimodal inputs. Experiments across diverse image and video benchmarks show consistent gains over GRPO and other baselines. We further introduce On-Policy Attention Distillation, demonstrating that transferring latent attention behaviors yields stronger cross-modal alignment than standard knowledge distillation. Our results position attention policies as a principled and general alternative for multimodal post-training.
tldr: The paper presents Reinforced Attention Learning (RAL), a policy-gradient method that directly optimizes attention distributions in Multimodal LLMs, showing improvements over existing methods for image and video understanding.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了强化注意力学习（RAL），一种直接优化多模态LLM中注意力分布的策略梯度方法，在图像和视频理解方面优于现有方法。
summary_zh:
基于强化学习（RL）的后训练已显著提升大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，尤其是在测试时缩放情景下。然而，若将此范式通过冗长的推理过程扩展到多模态LLM（MLLM），将难以有效提升感知能力，甚至可能降低性能。

我们提出了一种强化注意力学习（RAL）方法，这是一个策略梯度框架，它直接优化内部注意力分布，而不是输出的token序列。通过将优化目标从生成什么转移到关注哪里，RAL可以促进有效的信息分配，并改善在复杂多模态输入中的定位。在各种图像和视频基准测试上的实验表明，相对于GRPO和其他基线模型，RAL都取得了持续的提升。我们进一步引入了在策略注意力蒸馏，证明了传递潜在的注意力行为比标准知识蒸馏更能实现更强的跨模态对齐。我们的结果表明，注意力策略是多模态后训练的一种有原则且通用的替代方案。

title: When LLaVA Meets Objects: Token Composition for Vision-Language-Models
summary: Current autoregressive Vision Language Models (VLMs) usually rely on a large number of visual tokens to represent images, resulting in a need for more compute especially at inference time. To address this problem, we propose Mask-LLaVA, a framework that leverages different levels of visual features to create a compact yet information-rich visual representation for autoregressive VLMs. Namely, we combine mask-based object representations together with global tokens and local patch tokens. While all tokens are used during training, it shows that the resulting model can flexibly drop especially the number of mask-based object-tokens at test time, allowing to adapt the number of tokens during inference without the need to retrain the model and without a significant drop in performance. We evaluate the proposed approach on a suite of standard benchmarks showing results competitive to current token efficient methods and comparable to the original LLaVA baseline using only a fraction of visual tokens. Our analysis demonstrates that combining multi-level features enables efficient learning with fewer tokens while allowing dynamic token selection at test time for good performance.
tldr: Mask-LLaVA reduces computational cost in VLMs by using a combination of mask-based object representations, global tokens, and local patch tokens, allowing dynamic token selection during inference with minimal performance loss.
tldr_zh: Mask-LLaVA 通过结合基于掩码的对象表示、全局 token 和局部 patch token，减少了视觉语言模型 (VLM) 的计算成本，允许在推理期间动态选择 token，同时性能损失最小。
summary_zh: 目前自回归视觉语言模型（VLMs）通常依赖于大量的视觉标记来表示图像，导致计算需求增加，尤其是在推理时。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Mask-LLaVA，一个利用不同层次的视觉特征来为自回归VLMs创建紧凑但信息丰富的视觉表示的框架。具体来说，我们将基于掩码的物体表示与全局标记和局部patch标记相结合。虽然所有标记都在训练期间使用，但结果表明，生成的模型可以在测试时灵活地删除，尤其是基于掩码的物体标记的数量，从而允许在推理期间调整标记的数量，而无需重新训练模型且性能没有显著下降。我们在一系列标准基准上评估了提出的方法，结果显示其与当前的标记高效方法具有竞争力，并且在使用极少一部分视觉标记的情况下，性能与原始LLaVA基线相当。我们的分析表明，结合多层次特征能够以更少的标记实现高效学习，同时允许在测试时进行动态标记选择，从而获得良好的性能。

title: Approximation of Log-Partition Function in Policy Mirror Descent Induces Implicit Regularization for LLM Post-Training
summary: Policy mirror descent (PMD) provides a principled framework for reinforcement learning (RL) by iteratively solving KL-regularized policy improvement subproblems. While this approach has been adopted in training advanced LLMs such as Kimi K1.5/K2, the ideal closed-form PMD updates require reliable partition function estimation, a significant challenge when working with limited rollouts in the vast action spaces of LLMs. We investigate a practical algorithm, termed PMD-mean, that approximates the log-partition term with the mean reward under the sampling policy and performs regression in log-policy space. Specifically, we characterize the population solution of PMD-mean and demonstrate that it implicitly optimizes mirror descent subproblems with an adaptive mixed KL--$χ^2$ regularizer. This additional $χ^2$ regularization constrains large probability changes, producing more conservative updates when expected rewards are low and enhancing robustness against finite-sample estimation errors. Experiments on math reasoning tasks show that PMD-mean achieves superior performance with improved stability and time efficiency. These findings deepen our understanding of PMD-mean and illuminate pathways toward principled improvements in RL algorithms for LLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/horizon-rl/OpenKimi.
tldr: The paper analyzes a practical Policy Mirror Descent (PMD) algorithm called PMD-mean for LLM post-training, showing it implicitly adds a beneficial mixed KL-$χ^2$ regularizer, improving performance, stability, and efficiency in math reasoning tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文分析了一种名为PMD-mean的实用策略镜像下降(PMD)算法，用于LLM的后训练，表明它隐式地添加了一种有益的混合KL-$χ^2$正则化器，从而提高了数学推理任务的性能、稳定性和效率。
summary_zh: 策略镜像下降（PMD）为强化学习（RL）提供了一个原则性的框架，它通过迭代求解KL正则化的策略改进子问题来实现。虽然这种方法已被应用于训练先进的大型语言模型（LLM），例如Kimi K1.5/K2，但理想的闭式PMD更新需要可靠的配分函数估计，这在LLM的巨大动作空间中，使用有限的轨迹进行训练时是一个巨大的挑战。我们研究了一种实用的算法，称为PMD-mean，它使用采样策略下的平均奖励来近似对数配分项，并在对数策略空间中执行回归。具体而言，我们刻画了PMD-mean的总体解，并证明它隐式地优化了带有自适应混合KL--$χ^2$正则项的镜像下降子问题。这种额外的$χ^2$正则化约束了概率的剧烈变化，在预期奖励较低时产生更保守的更新，并增强了对抗有限样本估计误差的鲁棒性。在数学推理任务上的实验表明，PMD-mean实现了卓越的性能，并提高了稳定性和时间效率。这些发现加深了我们对PMD-mean的理解，并为LLM的RL算法的原则性改进指明了方向。代码可在https://github.com/horizon-rl/OpenKimi获取。

title: DFPO: Scaling Value Modeling via Distributional Flow towards Robust and Generalizable LLM Post-Training
summary: Training reinforcement learning (RL) systems in real-world environments remains challenging due to noisy supervision and poor out-of-domain (OOD) generalization, especially in LLM post-training. Recent distributional RL methods improve robustness by modeling values with multiple quantile points, but they still learn each quantile independently as a scalar. This results in rough-grained value representations that lack fine-grained conditioning on state information, struggling under complex and OOD conditions. We propose DFPO (Distributional Value Flow Policy Optimization with Conditional Risk and Consistency Control), a robust distributional RL framework that models values as continuous flows across time steps. By scaling value modeling through learning of a value flow field instead of isolated quantile predictions, DFPO captures richer state information for more accurate advantage estimation. To stabilize training under noisy feedback, DFPO further integrates conditional risk control and consistency constraints along value flow trajectories. Experiments on dialogue, math reasoning, and scientific tasks show that DFPO outperforms PPO, FlowRL, and other robust baselines under noisy supervision, achieving improved training stability and generalization.
tldr: DFPO introduces a distributional RL framework that models values as continuous flows to enhance robustness and generalization in LLM post-training, outperforming existing methods in noisy environments.
tldr_zh: DFPO提出了一种分布式的强化学习框架，将价值建模为连续流，以提高LLM后训练中的鲁棒性和泛化能力，并在嘈杂环境中优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 现实环境中训练强化学习（RL）系统仍然面临挑战，原因是存在噪声监督和较差的域外（OOD）泛化能力，尤其是在大型语言模型（LLM）后训练中。最近的分布强化学习方法通过使用多个分位数点对值进行建模来提高鲁棒性，但它们仍然将每个分位数独立地学习为标量。这导致粗粒度的值表示，缺乏对状态信息的细粒度条件作用，难以应对复杂和域外情况。我们提出 DFPO（具有条件风险和一致性控制的分布值流策略优化），一个鲁棒的分布强化学习框架，它将值建模为跨时间步的连续流。通过学习值流场而非孤立的分位数预测来缩放值建模，DFPO 为更精确的优势估计捕获更丰富的状态信息。为了在噪声反馈下稳定训练，DFPO 进一步整合了沿值流轨迹的条件风险控制和一致性约束。在对话、数学推理和科学任务上的实验表明，在噪声监督下，DFPO 优于 PPO、FlowRL 和其他鲁棒基线，实现了改进的训练稳定性和泛化能力。

title: Bifrost: Steering Strategic Trajectories to Bridge Contextual Gaps for Self-Improving Agents
summary: Autonomous agents excel in self-improvement through reflection and iterative refinement, which reuse successful task trajectories as in-context examples to assist subsequent reasoning. However, shifting across tasks often introduces a context mismatch. Hence, existing approaches either discard the trajectories or manipulate them using heuristics, leading to a non-negligible fine-tuning cost or unguaranteed performance. To bridge this gap, we reveal a context-trajectory correlation, where shifts of context are highly parallel with shifts of trajectory. Based on this finding, we propose BrIdge contextual gap FoR imprOvised trajectory STeering (Bifrost), a training-free method that leverages context differences to precisely guide the adaptation of previously solved trajectories towards the target task, mitigating the misalignment caused by context shifts. Our trajectory adaptation is conducted at the representation level using agent hidden states, ensuring trajectory transformation accurately aligns with the target context in a shared space. Across diverse benchmarks, Bifrost consistently outperforms existing trajectory reuse and finetuned self-improvement methods, demonstrating that agents can effectively leverage past experiences despite substantial context shifts.
tldr: The paper introduces Bifrost, a training-free method for adapting previously successful task trajectories to novel contexts by leveraging context-trajectory correlations, outperforming existing trajectory reuse and fine-tuning approaches in self-improvement.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Bifrost的免训练方法，通过利用上下文-轨迹相关性将先前成功的任务轨迹适应于新的上下文，并在自我改进方面优于现有的轨迹重用和微调方法。
summary_zh: 自主智能体擅长通过反思和迭代改进来实现自我提升，它们会将成功的任务轨迹作为上下文示例，以辅助后续的推理。然而，跨任务切换常常会引入上下文不匹配的问题。因此，现有方法要么丢弃这些轨迹，要么使用启发式方法对其进行操纵，这会导致不可忽略的微调成本或无法保证的性能。为了弥合这一差距，我们揭示了一种上下文-轨迹相关性，即上下文的转移与轨迹的转移高度平行。基于这一发现，我们提出了一种无需训练的方法，名为“桥接上下文差距以改进轨迹操控”（Bifrost）。该方法利用上下文差异来精确地引导先前解决的轨迹向目标任务进行适配，从而减轻上下文转移引起的不对齐。我们的轨迹适配是在表示层进行的，使用智能体的隐藏状态，以确保轨迹转换能够准确地在共享空间中与目标上下文对齐。在各种基准测试中，Bifrost始终优于现有的轨迹重用和微调的自我提升方法，这表明智能体可以有效地利用过去的经验，即使存在显著的上下文转移。

title: Perception-Based Beliefs for POMDPs with Visual Observations
summary: Partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) are a principled planning model for sequential decision-making under uncertainty. Yet, real-world problems with high-dimensional observations, such as camera images, remain intractable for traditional belief- and filtering-based solvers. To tackle this problem, we introduce the Perception-based Beliefs for POMDPs framework (PBP), which complements such solvers with a perception model. This model takes the form of an image classifier which maps visual observations to probability distributions over states. PBP incorporates these distributions directly into belief updates, so the underlying solver does not need to reason explicitly over high-dimensional observation spaces. We show that the belief update of PBP coincides with the standard belief update if the image classifier is exact. Moreover, to handle classifier imprecision, we incorporate uncertainty quantification and introduce two methods to adjust the belief update accordingly. We implement PBP using two traditional POMDP solvers and empirically show that (1) it outperforms existing end-to-end deep RL methods and (2) uncertainty quantification improves robustness of PBP against visual corruption.
tldr: The paper introduces Perception-based Beliefs for POMDPs (PBP), a framework that uses an image classifier to map visual observations to state distributions, improving POMDP solvers' performance with high-dimensional visual inputs, while also addressing classifier imprecision via uncertainty quantification.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了基于感知的POMDP置信度框架(PBP)，该框架使用图像分类器将视觉观察映射到状态分布，从而改进了POMDP求解器在高维视觉输入下的性能，同时通过不确定性量化解决了分类器不精确的问题。
summary_zh: 部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDPs）是一种在不确定性下进行序贯决策的原则性规划模型。然而，对于传统的基于信念和滤波的求解器而言，具有高维观测（例如相机图像）的现实世界问题仍然难以处理。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于感知的POMDP信念框架（PBP），它利用感知模型来补充这些求解器。该模型采用图像分类器的形式，将视觉观测映射到状态的概率分布。PBP将这些分布直接纳入信念更新中，因此底层的求解器无需显式地对高维观测空间进行推理。我们证明，如果图像分类器是精确的，则PBP的信念更新与标准的信念更新一致。此外，为了处理分类器的不精确性，我们结合了不确定性量化，并引入了两种方法来相应地调整信念更新。我们使用两个传统的POMDP求解器实现了PBP，并且通过实验证明了（1）它优于现有的端到端深度强化学习方法，以及（2）不确定性量化提高了PBP对视觉损坏的鲁棒性。

title: Rewards as Labels: Revisiting RLVR from a Classification Perspective
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards has recently advanced the capabilities of Large Language Models in complex reasoning tasks by providing explicit rule-based supervision. Among RLVR methods, GRPO and its variants have achieved strong empirical performance. Despite their success, we identify that they suffer from Gradient Misassignment in Positives and Gradient Domination in Negatives, which lead to inefficient and suboptimal policy updates. To address these issues, we propose Rewards as Labels (REAL), a novel framework that revisits verifiable rewards as categorical labels rather than scalar weights, thereby reformulating policy optimization as a classification problem. Building on this, we further introduce anchor logits to enhance policy learning. Our analysis reveals that REAL induces a monotonic and bounded gradient weighting, enabling balanced gradient allocation across rollouts and effectively mitigating the identified mismatches. Extensive experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that REAL improves training stability and consistently outperforms GRPO and strong variants such as DAPO. On the 1.5B model, REAL improves average Pass@1 over DAPO by 6.7%. These gains further scale to 7B model, REAL continues to outperform DAPO and GSPO by 6.2% and 1.7%, respectively. Notably, even with a vanilla binary cross-entropy, REAL remains stable and exceeds DAPO by 4.5% on average.
tldr: The paper proposes 'Rewards as Labels' (REAL), a novel RL framework that reformulates policy optimization with verifiable rewards as a classification problem, addressing gradient misassignment issues in existing RLVR methods and achieving better performance and stability on mathematical reasoning benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了“奖励作为标签” (REAL)，一种新颖的RL框架，它将带有可验证奖励的策略优化重新定义为一个分类问题，解决了现有RLVR方法中的梯度分配错误问题，并在数学推理基准上实现了更好的性能和稳定性。
summary_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习最近通过提供显式的基于规则的监督，提升了大型语言模型在复杂推理任务中的能力。在RLVR方法中，GRPO及其变体取得了强大的经验性能。尽管它们获得了成功，我们发现它们存在正例中的梯度误分配和负例中的梯度主导问题，这导致了低效和次优的策略更新。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了“奖励即标签”（REAL），一种新颖的框架，它将可验证奖励重新视为类别标签，而不是标量权重，从而将策略优化重新构建为分类问题。在此基础上，我们进一步引入了锚定logits来增强策略学习。我们的分析表明，REAL诱导了一种单调且有界的梯度加权，从而实现了跨rollouts的平衡梯度分配，并有效缓解了已识别的失配问题。在数学推理基准上的大量实验表明，REAL提高了训练稳定性，并且始终优于GRPO和强大的变体，如DAPO。在15亿参数的模型上，REAL在Pass@1指标上平均比DAPO提高了6.7%。这些增益进一步扩展到70亿参数的模型，REAL继续优于DAPO和GSPO，分别提高了6.2%和1.7%。值得注意的是，即使使用原始的二元交叉熵，REAL仍然保持稳定，并且平均超过DAPO 4.5%。

title: Laplacian Representations for Decision-Time Planning
summary: Planning with a learned model remains a key challenge in model-based reinforcement learning (RL). In decision-time planning, state representations are critical as they must support local cost computation while preserving long-horizon structure. In this paper, we show that the Laplacian representation provides an effective latent space for planning by capturing state-space distances at multiple time scales. This representation preserves meaningful distances and naturally decomposes long-horizon problems into subgoals, also mitigating the compounding errors that arise over long prediction horizons. Building on these properties, we introduce ALPS, a hierarchical planning algorithm, and demonstrate that it outperforms commonly used baselines on a selection of offline goal-conditioned RL tasks from OGBench, a benchmark previously dominated by model-free methods.
tldr: The paper introduces ALPS, a hierarchical planning algorithm that utilizes Laplacian representations to enable effective decision-time planning in offline goal-conditioned RL tasks, outperforming model-free baselines on OGBench.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为 ALPS 的分层规划算法，它利用拉普拉斯表示来实现离线目标条件 RL 任务中的有效决策时规划，并在 OGBench 上优于无模型基线。
summary_zh: 基于学习模型的规划仍然是基于模型的强化学习（RL）中的一个关键挑战。在决策时规划中，状态表示至关重要，因为它们必须支持局部成本计算，同时保留长程结构。在本文中，我们表明拉普拉斯表示法提供了一个有效的潜在空间用于规划，通过捕获多个时间尺度上的状态空间距离。这种表示法保留了有意义的距离，并将长程问题自然地分解为子目标，同时也减轻了在长预测范围内出现的复合误差。基于这些特性，我们介绍了一种分层规划算法ALPS，并证明了它在OGBench（一个先前由无模型方法主导的基准）上的一系列离线、目标条件强化学习任务中优于常用的基线方法。

title: A Hybrid Autoencoder for Robust Heightmap Generation from Fused Lidar and Depth Data for Humanoid Robot Locomotion
summary: Reliable terrain perception is a critical prerequisite for the deployment of humanoid robots in unstructured, human-centric environments. While traditional systems often rely on manually engineered, single-sensor pipelines, this paper presents a learning-based framework that uses an intermediate, robot-centric heightmap representation. A hybrid Encoder-Decoder Structure (EDS) is introduced, utilizing a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for spatial feature extraction fused with a Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) core for temporal consistency. The architecture integrates multimodal data from an Intel RealSense depth camera, a LIVOX MID-360 LiDAR processed via efficient spherical projection, and an onboard IMU. Quantitative results demonstrate that multimodal fusion improves reconstruction accuracy by 7.2% over depth-only and 9.9% over LiDAR-only configurations. Furthermore, the integration of a 3.2 s temporal context reduces mapping drift.
tldr: This paper introduces a hybrid encoder-decoder structure (EDS) fusing CNN and GRU to generate robust robot-centric heightmaps from LiDAR, depth camera, and IMU data for improved humanoid robot locomotion in unstructured environments. The multimodal fusion and temporal context integration improve reconstruction accuracy and reduces drift.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种混合编码器-解码器结构（EDS），融合了CNN和GRU，从激光雷达、深度相机和IMU数据中生成稳健的以机器人为中心的高度图，以改善人形机器人在非结构化环境中的运动。 多模态融合和时间上下文集成提高了重建精度并减少了漂移。
summary_zh: 可靠的地形感知是人形机器人在非结构化、以人为中心的环境中部署的关键前提。 传统的系统通常依赖于手动设计的、单传感器pipeline，而本文提出了一种基于学习的框架，该框架使用中间的、以机器人为中心的高度图表示。本文引入了一种混合编码器-解码器结构（EDS），利用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行空间特征提取，并融合了门控循环单元（GRU）核心以实现时间一致性。该架构集成了来自英特尔RealSense深度相机、通过高效球面投影处理的LIVOX MID-360 LiDAR以及板载IMU的多模态数据。定量结果表明，多模态融合使重建精度比仅使用深度相机提高了7.2%，比仅使用LiDAR提高了9.9%。 此外，集成3.2秒的时间上下文可减少建图漂移。

title: From Vision to Decision: Neuromorphic Control for Autonomous Navigation and Tracking
summary: Robotic navigation has historically struggled to reconcile reactive, sensor-based control with the decisive capabilities of model-based planners. This duality becomes critical when the absence of a predominant option among goals leads to indecision, challenging reactive systems to break symmetries without computationally-intense planners. We propose a parsimonious neuromorphic control framework that bridges this gap for vision-guided navigation and tracking. Image pixels from an onboard camera are encoded as inputs to dynamic neuronal populations that directly transform visual target excitation into egocentric motion commands. A dynamic bifurcation mechanism resolves indecision by delaying commitment until a critical point induced by the environmental geometry. Inspired by recently proposed mechanistic models of animal cognition and opinion dynamics, the neuromorphic controller provides real-time autonomy with a minimal computational burden, a small number of interpretable parameters, and can be seamlessly integrated with application-specific image processing pipelines. We validate our approach in simulation environments as well as on an experimental quadrotor platform.
tldr: This paper presents a neuromorphic control framework for vision-guided robotic navigation and tracking, using dynamic neuronal populations to translate visual input into motion commands and a bifurcation mechanism to resolve indecision. It's validated in simulation and on a quadrotor.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个用于视觉引导的机器人导航和跟踪的神经形态控制框架，该框架使用动态神经元群体将视觉输入转化为运动指令，并使用分叉机制来解决犹豫不决的问题。 该方法已在仿真和四旋翼飞行器上得到验证。
summary_zh: 机器人导航一直以来都在努力协调基于传感器的反应式控制与基于模型的规划器所具备的决策能力。当目标之间缺少绝对优势选项时，这种二元性变得至关重要，它挑战着反应式系统在没有计算密集型规划器的情况下打破对称性。我们提出一种简约的神经形态控制框架，以弥合视觉引导导航和跟踪中的这一差距。来自机载摄像头的图像像素被编码为动态神经元群体的输入，直接将视觉目标激发转化为以自我为中心的运动指令。一种动态分岔机制通过延迟承诺，直到由环境几何结构引起的临界点，来解决犹豫不决的问题。受到最近提出的动物认知和观点动力学机制模型的启发，该神经形态控制器以最小的计算负担、少量的可解释参数提供实时自主性，并且可以无缝集成到特定应用的图像处理流程中。我们在仿真环境和实验四旋翼平台中验证了我们的方法。

title: HiCrowd: Hierarchical Crowd Flow Alignment for Dense Human Environments
summary: Navigating through dense human crowds remains a significant challenge for mobile robots. A key issue is the freezing robot problem, where the robot struggles to find safe motions and becomes stuck within the crowd. To address this, we propose HiCrowd, a hierarchical framework that integrates reinforcement learning (RL) with model predictive control (MPC). HiCrowd leverages surrounding pedestrian motion as guidance, enabling the robot to align with compatible crowd flows. A high-level RL policy generates a follow point to align the robot with a suitable pedestrian group, while a low-level MPC safely tracks this guidance with short horizon planning. The method combines long-term crowd aware decision making with safe short-term execution. We evaluate HiCrowd against reactive and learning-based baselines in offline setting (replaying recorded human trajectories) and online setting (human trajectories are updated to react to the robot in simulation). Experiments on a real-world dataset and a synthetic crowd dataset show that our method outperforms in navigation efficiency and safety, while reducing freezing behaviors. Our results suggest that leveraging human motion as guidance, rather than treating humans solely as dynamic obstacles, provides a powerful principle for safe and efficient robot navigation in crowds.
tldr: The paper introduces HiCrowd, a hierarchical RL and MPC framework, for robot navigation in dense crowds by leveraging human motion as guidance, demonstrating improvements in efficiency and safety compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为HiCrowd的分层强化学习和模型预测控制框架，该框架利用人类运动作为指导，用于在密集人群中进行机器人导航，并在效率和安全性方面展示了优于基线的改进。
summary_zh: 在密集人群中导航对于移动机器人来说仍然是一个重大挑战。一个关键问题是机器人冻结问题，即机器人难以找到安全的移动路径并陷入人群中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了HiCrowd，一个将强化学习（RL）与模型预测控制（MPC）集成的分层框架。HiCrowd利用周围行人的运动作为指导，使机器人能够与兼容的人群流对齐。高层RL策略生成一个跟随点，使机器人与合适的人群组对齐，而低层MPC通过短时程规划安全地跟踪该指导。该方法结合了长期的人群感知决策和安全的短期执行。我们在离线设置（回放记录的人类轨迹）和在线设置（人类轨迹被更新以对仿真中的机器人做出反应）中，针对反应式和基于学习的基线评估HiCrowd。在真实世界数据集和合成人群数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在导航效率和安全性方面表现优异，同时减少了冻结行为。我们的结果表明，利用人类运动作为指导，而不是仅仅将人类视为动态障碍物，为人群中安全高效的机器人导航提供了一个强大的原则。

title: IndustryShapes: An RGB-D Benchmark dataset for 6D object pose estimation of industrial assembly components and tools
summary: We introduce IndustryShapes, a new RGB-D benchmark dataset of industrial tools and components, designed for both instance-level and novel object 6D pose estimation approaches. The dataset provides a realistic and application-relevant testbed for benchmarking these methods in the context of industrial robotics bridging the gap between lab-based research and deployment in real-world manufacturing scenarios. Unlike many previous datasets that focus on household or consumer products or use synthetic, clean tabletop datasets, or objects captured solely in controlled lab environments, IndustryShapes introduces five new object types with challenging properties, also captured in realistic industrial assembly settings. The dataset has diverse complexity, from simple to more challenging scenes, with single and multiple objects, including scenes with multiple instances of the same object and it is organized in two parts: the classic set and the extended set. The classic set includes a total of 4,6k images and 6k annotated poses. The extended set introduces additional data modalities to support the evaluation of model-free and sequence-based approaches. To the best of our knowledge, IndustryShapes is the first dataset to offer RGB-D static onboarding sequences. We further evaluate the dataset on a representative set of state-of-the art methods for instance-based and novel object 6D pose estimation, including also object detection, segmentation, showing that there is room for improvement in this domain. The dataset page can be found in https://pose-lab.github.io/IndustryShapes.
tldr: The paper introduces IndustryShapes, a new RGB-D dataset of industrial tools and components for 6D object pose estimation, designed to bridge the gap between lab research and real-world industrial applications, also providing static onboarding sequences.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为IndustryShapes的新的RGB-D数据集，该数据集包含工业工具和组件，用于6D物体姿态估计。它旨在弥合实验室研究和实际工业应用之间的差距，并提供静态启动序列。
summary_zh: 我们介绍了IndustryShapes，这是一个新的工业工具和组件的RGB-D基准数据集，专为实例级别和新颖物体6D姿态估计方法设计。该数据集提供了一个逼真且应用相关的试验平台，用于在工业机器人领域对这些方法进行基准测试，弥合了基于实验室的研究与真实世界制造场景中的部署之间的差距。与许多以前侧重于家庭或消费产品的，或者使用合成的、干净的桌面数据集，或仅在受控实验环境中捕获的对象的数据集不同，IndustryShapes引入了五种新的物体类型，具有挑战性的特性，并在真实的工业装配环境中捕获。该数据集具有多样化的复杂度，从简单到更具挑战性的场景，包含单个和多个物体，包括同一物体的多个实例的场景，并且它分为两个部分：经典集和扩展集。经典集总共包含4.6k张图像和6k个带标注的姿态。扩展集引入了额外的数据模态，以支持对无模型和基于序列的方法的评估。据我们所知，IndustryShapes是第一个提供RGB-D静态引导序列的数据集。我们还在一组代表性的、最先进的基于实例和新颖物体6D姿态估计的方法上评估了该数据集，包括物体检测、分割，表明该领域仍有改进空间。数据集页面可在https://pose-lab.github.io/IndustryShapes 找到。

title: Formal Synthesis of Certifiably Robust Neural Lyapunov-Barrier Certificates
summary: Neural Lyapunov and barrier certificates have recently been used as powerful tools for verifying the safety and stability properties of deep reinforcement learning (RL) controllers. However, existing methods offer guarantees only under fixed ideal unperturbed dynamics, limiting their reliability in real-world applications where dynamics may deviate due to uncertainties. In this work, we study the problem of synthesizing \emph{robust neural Lyapunov barrier certificates} that maintain their guarantees under perturbations in system dynamics. We formally define a robust Lyapunov barrier function and specify sufficient conditions based on Lipschitz continuity that ensure robustness against bounded perturbations. We propose practical training objectives that enforce these conditions via adversarial training, Lipschitz neighborhood bound, and global Lipschitz regularization. We validate our approach in two practically relevant environments, Inverted Pendulum and 2D Docking. The former is a widely studied benchmark, while the latter is a safety-critical task in autonomous systems. We show that our methods significantly improve both certified robustness bounds (up to $4.6$ times) and empirical success rates under strong perturbations (up to $2.4$ times) compared to the baseline. Our results demonstrate effectiveness of training robust neural certificates for safe RL under perturbations in dynamics.
tldr: This paper proposes a method to train robust neural Lyapunov-barrier certificates for reinforcement learning, ensuring safety and stability even with perturbations in system dynamics, and demonstrates its effectiveness on benchmark environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种训练鲁棒的神经 Lyapunov-barrier 证书的方法，用于强化学习，即使在系统动力学受到扰动的情况下也能确保安全性和稳定性，并在基准环境中证明了其有效性。
summary_zh: 神经Lyapunov和障碍证书最近被用作验证深度强化学习(RL)控制器安全性和稳定性特性的强大工具。然而，现有方法仅在固定的理想无扰动动力学下提供保证，限制了它们在现实世界应用中的可靠性，因为动力学可能因不确定性而偏离。在这项工作中，我们研究了合成\emph{鲁棒神经Lyapunov障碍证书}的问题，该证书在系统动力学受到扰动时仍能保持其保证。我们正式定义了一个鲁棒Lyapunov障碍函数，并基于Lipschitz连续性指定了充分条件，以确保其对有界扰动的鲁棒性。我们提出了实用的训练目标，通过对抗训练、Lipschitz邻域界和全局Lipschitz正则化来强化这些条件。我们在两个具有实际意义的环境中验证了我们的方法，即倒立摆和二维停靠。前者是一个被广泛研究的基准，而后者是自主系统中一项安全关键任务。我们表明，与基线相比，我们的方法显著提高了有认证的鲁棒性边界（高达4.6倍）和强扰动下的经验成功率（高达2.4倍）。我们的结果证明了训练鲁棒神经证书对于在动力学扰动下安全RL的有效性。

title: Learning Soccer Skills for Humanoid Robots: A Progressive Perception-Action Framework
summary: Soccer presents a significant challenge for humanoid robots, demanding tightly integrated perception-action capabilities for tasks like perception-guided kicking and whole-body balance control. Existing approaches suffer from inter-module instability in modular pipelines or conflicting training objectives in end-to-end frameworks. We propose Perception-Action integrated Decision-making (PAiD), a progressive architecture that decomposes soccer skill acquisition into three stages: motion-skill acquisition via human motion tracking, lightweight perception-action integration for positional generalization, and physics-aware sim-to-real transfer. This staged decomposition establishes stable foundational skills, avoids reward conflicts during perception integration, and minimizes sim-to-real gaps. Experiments on the Unitree G1 demonstrate high-fidelity human-like kicking with robust performance under diverse conditions-including static or rolling balls, various positions, and disturbances-while maintaining consistent execution across indoor and outdoor scenarios. Our divide-and-conquer strategy advances robust humanoid soccer capabilities and offers a scalable framework for complex embodied skill acquisition. The project page is available at https://soccer-humanoid.github.io/.
tldr: The paper introduces a three-stage Perception-Action integrated Decision-making (PAiD) framework for humanoid robot soccer, which improves stability, reduces reward conflicts, and enhances sim-to-real transfer, demonstrated on a Unitree G1 robot.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于人形机器人足球的三阶段感知-行动集成决策（PAiD）框架，该框架提高了稳定性，减少了奖励冲突，并增强了从仿真到现实的迁移，已在宇树G1机器人上进行了演示。
summary_zh: 足球对人形机器人提出了严峻挑战，要求紧密集成的感知-动作能力以完成诸如感知引导踢球和全身平衡控制等任务。现有的方法要么在模块化流水线中面临模块间的不稳定性问题，要么在端到端框架中存在相互冲突的训练目标。我们提出了一种感知-动作集成决策（PAiD）方法，这是一种渐进式的架构，将足球技能习得分解为三个阶段：通过人体动作追踪实现运动技能习得，用于位置泛化的轻量级感知-动作集成，以及感知物理规律的仿真到真实世界的迁移。这种分阶段分解方式能够建立稳定的基础技能，避免感知集成过程中的奖励冲突，并最大限度地减少仿真到真实世界的差距。在宇树G1上的实验表明，该方法能够实现高保真的人类般踢球，并在各种条件下（包括静止或滚动的球、不同位置和扰动）保持稳健的性能，同时在室内和室外场景中保持一致的执行效果。我们的分而治之策略推进了鲁棒的人形机器人足球能力，并为复杂的具身技能习得提供了一个可扩展的框架。项目主页地址为https://soccer-humanoid.github.io/。

title: RFM-Pose:Reinforcement-Guided Flow Matching for Fast Category-Level 6D Pose Estimation
summary: Object pose estimation is a fundamental problem in computer vision and plays a critical role in virtual reality and embodied intelligence, where agents must understand and interact with objects in 3D space. Recently, score based generative models have to some extent solved the rotational symmetry ambiguity problem in category level pose estimation, but their efficiency remains limited by the high sampling cost of score-based diffusion. In this work, we propose a new framework, RFM-Pose, that accelerates category-level 6D object pose generation while actively evaluating sampled hypotheses. To improve sampling efficiency, we adopt a flow-matching generative model and generate pose candidates along an optimal transport path from a simple prior to the pose distribution. To further refine these candidates, we cast the flow-matching sampling process as a Markov decision process and apply proximal policy optimization to fine-tune the sampling policy. In particular, we interpret the flow field as a learnable policy and map an estimator to a value network, enabling joint optimization of pose generation and hypothesis scoring within a reinforcement learning framework. Experiments on the REAL275 benchmark demonstrate that RFM-Pose achieves favorable performance while significantly reducing computational cost. Moreover, similar to prior work, our approach can be readily adapted to object pose tracking and attains competitive results in this setting.
tldr: RFM-Pose introduces a reinforcement-guided flow matching approach for efficient category-level 6D pose estimation, achieving faster performance than score-based diffusion models while actively refining pose hypotheses.
tldr_zh: RFM-Pose 提出了一种基于强化学习引导的流匹配方法，用于高效的类别级 6D 姿态估计，比基于分数的扩散模型更快，同时主动优化姿态假设。
summary_zh: 目标位姿估计是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，在虚拟现实和具身智能中扮演着关键角色，在这些应用中，智能体必须理解并与3D空间中的物体进行交互。最近，基于分数的生成模型在一定程度上解决了类别级位姿估计中的旋转对称歧义问题，但其效率仍然受到基于分数的扩散过程的高昂采样成本的限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新的框架RFM-Pose，该框架加速了类别级的6D物体位姿生成，同时主动评估采样的假设。为了提高采样效率，我们采用了一种流匹配生成模型，并沿着从简单先验到位姿分布的最优传输路径生成位姿候选。为了进一步细化这些候选对象，我们将流匹配采样过程转化为马尔可夫决策过程，并应用近端策略优化来微调采样策略。特别地，我们将流场解释为可学习的策略，并将一个估计器映射到一个价值网络，从而能够在强化学习框架内对位姿生成和假设评分进行联合优化。在REAL275基准上的实验表明，RFM-Pose在显著降低计算成本的同时，实现了良好的性能。此外，与之前的工作类似，我们的方法可以很容易地适应于物体位姿跟踪，并在这种设置下获得具有竞争力的结果。

title: Trojan Attacks on Neural Network Controllers for Robotic Systems
summary: Neural network controllers are increasingly deployed in robotic systems for tasks such as trajectory tracking and pose stabilization. However, their reliance on potentially untrusted training pipelines or supply chains introduces significant security vulnerabilities. This paper investigates backdoor (Trojan) attacks against neural controllers, using a differential-drive mobile robot platform as a case study. In particular, assuming that the robot's tracking controller is implemented as a neural network, we design a lightweight, parallel Trojan network that can be embedded within the controller. This malicious module remains dormant during normal operation but, upon detecting a highly specific trigger condition defined by the robot's pose and goal parameters, compromises the primary controller's wheel velocity commands, resulting in undesired and potentially unsafe robot behaviours. We provide a proof-of-concept implementation of the proposed Trojan network, which is validated through simulation under two different attack scenarios. The results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed attack and demonstrate that neural network-based robotic control systems are subject to potentially critical security threats.
tldr: This paper demonstrates a Trojan attack on neural network controllers in robotic systems, showing how a hidden malicious module can compromise robot behavior based on specific trigger conditions, highlighting a security vulnerability in neural network-based robotic control.
tldr_zh: 本文展示了一种针对机器人系统中神经网络控制器的木马攻击，揭示了隐藏的恶意模块如何在特定触发条件下破坏机器人行为，突显了基于神经网络的机器人控制系统的安全漏洞。
summary_zh: 神经网络控制器越来越多地被应用在机器人系统中，用于轨迹跟踪和姿态稳定等任务。然而，它们对潜在不可信的训练流程或供应链的依赖引入了严重的安全漏洞。本文以差动驱动移动机器人平台为案例研究，调查针对神经控制器的后门（木马）攻击。具体而言，假设机器人的跟踪控制器被实现为一个神经网络，我们设计了一个轻量级的、并行的木马网络，可以嵌入在控制器中。这个恶意模块在正常操作期间保持休眠状态，但一旦检测到由机器人的姿态和目标参数定义的高度特定的触发条件，就会损害主要控制器的轮速指令，从而导致不希望的且可能不安全的机器人行为。我们提供了一个所提出的木马网络的验证性实现，并通过两种不同的攻击场景下的仿真验证了该实现。结果证实了所提出的攻击的有效性，并表明基于神经网络的机器人控制系统面临着潜在的关键安全威胁。

title: GAMMS: Graph based Adversarial Multiagent Modeling Simulator
summary: As intelligent systems and multi-agent coordination become increasingly central to real-world applications, there is a growing need for simulation tools that are both scalable and accessible. Existing high-fidelity simulators, while powerful, are often computationally expensive and ill-suited for rapid prototyping or large-scale agent deployments. We present GAMMS (Graph based Adversarial Multiagent Modeling Simulator), a lightweight yet extensible simulation framework designed to support fast development and evaluation of agent behavior in environments that can be represented as graphs. GAMMS emphasizes five core objectives: scalability, ease of use, integration-first architecture, fast visualization feedback, and real-world grounding. It enables efficient simulation of complex domains such as urban road networks and communication systems, supports integration with external tools (e.g., machine learning libraries, planning solvers), and provides built-in visualization with minimal configuration. GAMMS is agnostic to policy type, supporting heuristic, optimization-based, and learning-based agents, including those using large language models. By lowering the barrier to entry for researchers and enabling high-performance simulations on standard hardware, GAMMS facilitates experimentation and innovation in multi-agent systems, autonomous planning, and adversarial modeling. The framework is open-source and available at https://github.com/GAMMSim/GAMMS/
tldr: GAMMS is a new, open-source, graph-based multi-agent simulation framework that emphasizes scalability, ease of use, and integration with various agent policy types, including LLMs, to facilitate research in multi-agent systems.
tldr_zh: GAMMS是一个新的开源的，基于图的多智能体仿真框架，强调可扩展性、易用性以及与各种智能体策略类型（包括LLM）的集成，以促进多智能体系统的研究。
summary_zh: 随着智能系统和多智能体协同在现实世界应用中变得日益重要，对既可扩展又易于访问的仿真工具的需求也日益增长。现有的高保真模拟器虽然功能强大，但通常计算成本高昂，不太适合快速原型设计或大规模智能体部署。我们提出了GAMMS（基于图的对抗多智能体建模模拟器），这是一个轻量级但可扩展的仿真框架，旨在支持快速开发和评估在可表示为图的环境中智能体的行为。GAMMS强调五个核心目标：可扩展性、易用性、集成优先架构、快速可视化反馈以及现实世界基础。它能够高效地模拟复杂的领域，如城市道路网络和通信系统，支持与外部工具（如机器学习库、规划求解器）的集成，并提供内置的可视化功能，且配置最少。GAMMS与策略类型无关，支持启发式、基于优化和基于学习的智能体，包括使用大型语言模型的智能体。通过降低研究人员的入门门槛，并在标准硬件上实现高性能仿真，GAMMS促进了多智能体系统、自主规划和对抗建模方面的实验和创新。该框架是开源的，可在https://github.com/GAMMSim/GAMMS/获取。

title: Evaluating Robustness and Adaptability in Learning-Based Mission Planning for Active Debris Removal
summary: Autonomous mission planning for Active Debris Removal (ADR) must balance efficiency, adaptability, and strict feasibility constraints on fuel and mission duration. This work compares three planners for the constrained multi-debris rendezvous problem in Low Earth Orbit: a nominal Masked Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) policy trained under fixed mission parameters, a domain-randomized Masked PPO policy trained across varying mission constraints for improved robustness, and a plain Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) baseline. Evaluations are conducted in a high-fidelity orbital simulation with refueling, realistic transfer dynamics, and randomized debris fields across 300 test cases in nominal, reduced fuel, and reduced mission time scenarios. Results show that nominal PPO achieves top performance when conditions match training but degrades sharply under distributional shift, while domain-randomized PPO exhibits improved adaptability with only moderate loss in nominal performance. MCTS consistently handles constraint changes best due to online replanning but incurs orders-of-magnitude higher computation time. The findings underline a trade-off between the speed of learned policies and the adaptability of search-based methods, and suggest that combining training-time diversity with online planning could be a promising path for future resilient ADR mission planners.
tldr: This paper compares nominal PPO, domain-randomized PPO, and MCTS for active debris removal mission planning, showing a trade-off between speed and adaptability, suggesting future work combining training-time diversity with online planning.
tldr_zh: 本文比较了用于主动碎片移除任务规划的标称PPO、领域随机化PPO和MCTS，展示了速度和适应性之间的权衡，并建议未来的工作将训练时多样性与在线规划相结合。
summary_zh: 用于主动清除碎片(ADR)的自主任务规划必须在效率、适应性和燃料及任务持续时间的严格可行性约束之间取得平衡。本研究比较了三种用于近地轨道受约束的多目标碎片的交会规划器：一种在固定任务参数下训练的名义掩码近端策略优化(PPO)策略、一种在不同任务约束下训练的域随机化掩码PPO策略以提高鲁棒性，以及一个普通的蒙特卡洛树搜索(MCTS)基线。评估是在高保真轨道仿真中进行的，包括燃料补给、真实的转移动力学以及在名义、减少燃料和减少任务时间三种情况下随机生成的碎片场，共计300个测试用例。结果表明，名义PPO在条件与训练匹配时表现出最佳性能，但在分布偏移下性能急剧下降，而域随机化PPO表现出更高的适应性，且名义性能仅有适度损失。MCTS因在线重规划而始终能最好地处理约束变化，但计算时间高出几个数量级。这些发现突出了学习策略的速度与基于搜索的方法的适应性之间的权衡，并表明将训练时多样性与在线规划相结合，可能是未来具有弹性的ADR任务规划器的有希望的途径。

title: Optimizing Mission Planning for Multi-Debris Rendezvous Using Reinforcement Learning with Refueling and Adaptive Collision Avoidance
summary:
As the orbital environment around Earth becomes increasingly crowded with debris, active debris removal (ADR) missions face significant challenges in ensuring safe operations while minimizing the risk of in-orbit collisions. This study presents a reinforcement learning (RL) based framework to enhance adaptive collision avoidance in ADR missions, specifically for multi-debris removal using small satellites. Small satellites are increasingly adopted due to their flexibility, cost effectiveness, and maneuverability, making them well suited for dynamic missions such as ADR.
  Building on existing work in multi-debris rendezvous, the framework integrates refueling strategies, efficient mission planning, and adaptive collision avoidance to optimize spacecraft rendezvous operations. The proposed approach employs a masked Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm, enabling the RL agent to dynamically adjust maneuvers in response to real-time orbital conditions. Key considerations include fuel efficiency, avoidance of active collision zones, and optimization of dynamic orbital parameters.
  The RL agent learns to determine efficient sequences for rendezvousing with multiple debris targets, optimizing fuel usage and mission time while incorporating necessary refueling stops. Simulated ADR scenarios derived from the Iridium 33 debris dataset are used for evaluation, covering diverse orbital configurations and debris distributions to demonstrate robustness and adaptability. Results show that the proposed RL framework reduces collision risk while improving mission efficiency compared to traditional heuristic approaches.
  This work provides a scalable solution for planning complex multi-debris ADR missions and is applicable to other multi-target rendezvous problems in autonomous space mission planning.
tldr: This paper presents a reinforcement learning framework using masked PPO for optimizing multi-debris removal missions by small satellites, incorporating refueling and adaptive collision avoidance.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习框架，使用masked PPO优化小型卫星的多碎片移除任务，该框架结合了加油和自适应避碰。
summary_zh:
随着地球轨道环境日益拥挤，越来越多的空间碎片给主动移除碎片(ADR)任务带来了严峻挑战，需要在确保安全运行的同时，最大限度地降低在轨碰撞风险。本研究提出了一种基于强化学习(RL)的框架，旨在增强ADR任务中的自适应碰撞规避能力，特别是利用小型卫星执行多碎片移除任务。小型卫星因其灵活性、成本效益和机动性而日益受到青睐，非常适合ADR等动态任务。

该框架基于现有的多碎片交会对接工作，整合了补给燃料策略、高效任务规划和自适应碰撞规避技术，以优化航天器交会对接操作。提出的方法采用了一种屏蔽近端策略优化(PPO)算法，使RL智能体能够根据实时轨道条件动态调整机动策略。关键考虑因素包括燃料效率、主动碰撞区域规避和动态轨道参数优化。

RL智能体学习确定与多个碎片目标交会对接的有效序列，优化燃料使用和任务时间，同时整合必要的燃料补给站点。使用源自铱星33(Iridium 33)碎片数据集的模拟 ADR 场景进行评估，涵盖不同的轨道配置和碎片分布，以证明其鲁棒性和适应性。结果表明，与传统的启发式方法相比，所提出的 RL 框架降低了碰撞风险，同时提高了任务效率。

这项工作为规划复杂的多碎片 ADR 任务提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，并且适用于自主空间任务规划中的其他多目标交会对接问题。

title: ReFORM: Reflected Flows for On-support Offline RL via Noise Manipulation
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims to learn the optimal policy from a fixed dataset generated by behavior policies without additional environment interactions. One common challenge that arises in this setting is the out-of-distribution (OOD) error, which occurs when the policy leaves the training distribution. Prior methods penalize a statistical distance term to keep the policy close to the behavior policy, but this constrains policy improvement and may not completely prevent OOD actions. Another challenge is that the optimal policy distribution can be multimodal and difficult to represent. Recent works apply diffusion or flow policies to address this problem, but it is unclear how to avoid OOD errors while retaining policy expressiveness. We propose ReFORM, an offline RL method based on flow policies that enforces the less restrictive support constraint by construction. ReFORM learns a behavior cloning (BC) flow policy with a bounded source distribution to capture the support of the action distribution, then optimizes a reflected flow that generates bounded noise for the BC flow while keeping the support, to maximize the performance. Across 40 challenging tasks from the OGBench benchmark with datasets of varying quality and using a constant set of hyperparameters for all tasks, ReFORM dominates all baselines with hand-tuned hyperparameters on the performance profile curves.
tldr: ReFORM is an offline RL method using flow policies to enforce support constraints by learning a behavior cloning flow and optimizing a reflected flow. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on the OGBench benchmark with a single set of hyperparameters.
tldr_zh: ReFORM 是一种离线强化学习方法，它使用流策略通过学习行为克隆流和优化反射流来强制执行支持约束。它在使用单个超参数集的情况下，在 OGBench 基准测试上实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 离线强化学习旨在从由行为策略生成的固定数据集学习最优策略，而无需额外的环境交互。该设置中常见的一个挑战是分布外（OOD）误差，当策略偏离训练分布时便会发生此误差。先前的方法惩罚统计距离项，以保持策略接近行为策略，但这约束了策略改进，并且可能无法完全避免OOD动作。另一个挑战是最优策略分布可能是多模态的并且难以表示。最近的研究应用扩散或流策略来解决该问题，但尚不清楚如何在保留策略表达能力的同时避免OOD误差。我们提出ReFORM，一种基于流策略的离线强化学习方法，它通过构造来强制执行限制较少的支撑约束。ReFORM学习具有有界源分布的行为克隆（BC）流策略，以捕获动作分布的支撑，然后优化一个反射流，该反射流为BC流生成有界噪声，同时保持支撑，以最大化性能。在OGBench基准测试中的40个具有挑战性的任务中，数据集质量各不相同，并且对所有任务使用一组恒定的超参数，ReFORM在性能曲线方面优于所有具有手动调整超参数的基线。

title: Applying Ground Robot Fleets in Urban Search: Understanding Professionals' Operational Challenges and Design Opportunities
summary: Urban searches demand rapid, defensible decisions and sustained physical effort under high cognitive and situational load. Incident commanders must plan, coordinate, and document time-critical operations, while field searchers execute evolving tasks in uncertain environments. With recent advances in technology, ground-robot fleets paired with computer-vision-based situational awareness and LLM-powered interfaces offer the potential to ease these operational burdens. However, no dedicated studies have examined how public safety professionals perceive such technologies or envision their integration into existing practices, risking building technically sophisticated yet impractical solutions. To address this gap, we conducted focus-group sessions with eight police officers across five local departments in Virginia. Our findings show that ground robots could reduce professionals' reliance on paper references, mental calculations, and ad-hoc coordination, alleviating cognitive and physical strain in four key challenge areas: (1) partitioning the workforce across multiple search hypotheses, (2) retaining group awareness and situational awareness, (3) building route planning that fits the lost-person profile, and (4) managing cognitive and physical fatigue under uncertainty. We further identify four design opportunities and requirements for future ground-robot fleet integration in public-safety operations: (1) scalable multi-robot planning and control interfaces, (2) agency-specific route optimization, (3) real-time replanning informed by debrief updates, and (4) vision-assisted cueing that preserves operational trust while reducing cognitive workload. We conclude with design implications for deployable, accountable, and human-centered urban-search support systems
tldr: This paper presents a study on the challenges and design opportunities for integrating ground robot fleets with vision-language models into urban search operations, based on focus group sessions with police officers.
tldr_zh: 该论文基于与警察的焦点小组访谈，探讨了将地面机器人群与视觉语言模型集成到城市搜索行动中的挑战和设计机会。
summary_zh: 城市搜索需要在高认知负荷和情境压力下做出快速的、站得住脚的决策，并付出持续的体力。事件指挥官必须计划、协调和记录时间紧迫的行动，而现场搜索人员则在不确定的环境中执行不断演变的任務。 随着技术的进步，结合基于计算机视觉的情境感知和 LLM 驱动界面的地面机器人群具有减轻这些操作负担的潜力。然而，尚无专门的研究调查公共安全专业人员如何看待这些技术，或者设想如何将其集成到现有实践中，这有可能导致构建技术复杂但却不切实际的解决方案。 为了弥补这一差距，我们与弗吉尼亚州五个地方部门的八名警官进行了焦点小组会议。我们的发现表明，地面机器人可以减少专业人员对纸质参考资料、心算和临时协调的依赖，从而在四个关键挑战领域减轻认知和体力压力：(1) 在多个搜索假设中分配劳动力，(2) 保持群体和情境意识，(3) 构建符合失踪人员特征的路线规划，以及 (4) 管理不确定性下的认知和身体疲劳。 我们进一步确定了未来地面机器人群集成到公共安全行动的四个设计机会和要求：(1) 可扩展的多机器人规划和控制界面，(2) 机构特定的路线优化，(3) 基于任务汇报更新的实时重规划，以及 (4) 在保持操作信任的同时降低认知负荷的视觉辅助提示。 最后，我们提出了可部署、可问责和以人为本的城市搜索支持系统的设计启示。

title: Agent2Agent Threats in Safety-Critical LLM Assistants: A Human-Centric Taxonomy
summary: The integration of Large Language Model (LLM)-based conversational agents into vehicles creates novel security challenges at the intersection of agentic AI, automotive safety, and inter-agent communication. As these intelligent assistants coordinate with external services via protocols such as Google's Agent-to-Agent (A2A), they establish attack surfaces where manipulations can propagate through natural language payloads, potentially causing severe consequences ranging from driver distraction to unauthorized vehicle control. Existing AI security frameworks, while foundational, lack the rigorous "separation of concerns" standard in safety-critical systems engineering by co-mingling the concepts of what is being protected (assets) with how it is attacked (attack paths). This paper addresses this methodological gap by proposing a threat modeling framework called AgentHeLLM (Agent Hazard Exploration for LLM Assistants) that formally separates asset identification from attack path analysis. We introduce a human-centric asset taxonomy derived from harm-oriented "victim modeling" and inspired by the Universal Declaration of Human Rights, and a formal graph-based model that distinguishes poison paths (malicious data propagation) from trigger paths (activation actions). We demonstrate the framework's practical applicability through an open-source attack path suggestion tool AgentHeLLM Attack Path Generator that automates multi-stage threat discovery using a bi-level search strategy.
tldr: The paper introduces AgentHeLLM, a threat modeling framework for LLM-based agents in vehicles with a human-centric asset taxonomy and graph-based model for attack path analysis, addressing a gap in existing AI security frameworks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍AgentHeLLM，一个用于车辆中基于LLM的智能体的威胁建模框架，具有以人为中心的资产分类和基于图的攻击路径分析模型，解决了现有AI安全框架中的差距。
summary_zh: 将基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的对话式智能体集成到车辆中，在智能体人工智能、汽车安全和智能体间通信的交叉点上产生了新的安全挑战。由于这些智能辅助系统通过诸如 Google 的智能体间 (A2A) 协议与外部服务进行协调，它们便建立了一个攻击面，操纵行为可以通过自然语言有效负载传播，可能导致从驾驶员分心到未经授权的车辆控制等严重后果。现有的 AI 安全框架虽然具有基础性，但缺乏安全关键系统工程中严格的“关注点分离”标准，它们将受保护的对象（资产）与攻击方式（攻击路径）的概念混为一谈。本文通过提出一个名为 AgentHeLLM (针对 LLM 助手的智能体危险探索) 的威胁建模框架来解决这一方法论上的差距，该框架正式地将资产识别与攻击路径分析分离。我们引入了一个以人为中心的资产分类法，该分类法源于以伤害为导向的“受害者建模”，并受到《世界人权宣言》的启发，以及一个正式的基于图的模型，该模型区分了毒化路径（恶意数据传播）和触发路径（激活动作）。 我们通过一个开源的攻击路径建议工具 AgentHeLLM 攻击路径生成器演示了该框架的实际适用性，该工具使用双层搜索策略自动进行多阶段威胁发现。

title: TKG-Thinker: Towards Dynamic Reasoning over Temporal Knowledge Graphs via Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Temporal knowledge graph question answering (TKGQA) aims to answer time-sensitive questions by leveraging temporal knowledge bases. While Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate significant potential in TKGQA, current prompting strategies constrain their efficacy in two primary ways. First, they are prone to reasoning hallucinations under complex temporal constraints. Second, static prompting limits model autonomy and generalization, as it lack optimization through dynamic interaction with temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) environments. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{TKG-Thinker}, a novel agent equipped with autonomous planning and adaptive retrieval capabilities for reasoning over TKGs. Specifically, TKG-Thinker performs in-depth temporal reasoning through dynamic multi-turn interactions with TKGs via a dual-training strategy. We first apply Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with chain-of thought data to instill core planning capabilities, followed by a Reinforcement Learning (RL) stage that leverages multi-dimensional rewards to refine reasoning policies under intricate temporal constraints. Experimental results on benchmark datasets with three open-source LLMs show that TKG-Thinker achieves state-of-the-art performance and exhibits strong generalization across complex TKGQA settings.
tldr: This paper introduces TKG-Thinker, an agent that uses reinforcement learning and LLMs to improve temporal knowledge graph question answering by addressing reasoning hallucinations and limitations of static prompting.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了TKG-Thinker，一种利用强化学习和LLM的agent，通过解决推理幻觉和静态提示的局限性来改进时序知识图谱问答。
summary_zh: 时间知识图谱问答（TKGQA）旨在利用时间知识库回答时间敏感型问题。虽然大型语言模型（LLM）在TKGQA中展现出巨大的潜力，但目前的提示策略在两个主要方面限制了其功效。首先，它们容易在复杂的时序约束下产生推理幻觉。其次，静态提示限制了模型的自主性和泛化能力，因为它缺乏通过与时间知识图谱（TKG）环境的动态交互进行优化。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了\textbf{TKG-Thinker}，一种具有自主规划和自适应检索能力的新型Agent，用于在TKG上进行推理。具体而言，TKG-Thinker通过与TKG的动态多轮交互，并通过双重训练策略，执行深入的时序推理。我们首先使用思维链数据应用监督微调（SFT）来灌输核心规划能力，然后进行强化学习（RL）阶段，利用多维奖励来完善复杂时序约束下的推理策略。在三个开源LLM的基准数据集上的实验结果表明，TKG-Thinker实现了最先进的性能，并在复杂的TKGQA设置中表现出强大的泛化能力。

title: Anchored Policy Optimization: Mitigating Exploration Collapse Via Support-Constrained Rectification
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is increasingly viewed as a tree pruning mechanism. However, we identify a systemic pathology termed Recursive Space Contraction (RSC), an irreversible collapse driven by the combined dynamics of positive sharpening and negative squeezing, where the sampling probability of valid alternatives vanishes. While Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization aims to mitigate this, it imposes a rigid Shape Matching constraint that forces the policy to mimic the reference model's full density, creating a gradient conflict with the sharpening required for correctness. We propose Anchored Policy Optimization (APO), shifting the paradigm from global Shape Matching to Support Coverage.
