By defining a Safe Manifold based on the reference model's high-confidence support, APO permits aggressive sharpening for efficiency while selectively invoking a restorative force during error correction to prevent collapse. We theoretically derive that APO serves as a gradient-aligned mechanism to maximize support coverage, enabling an Elastic Recovery that re-inflates valid branches. Empirical evaluations on mathematical benchmarks demonstrate that APO breaks the accuracy-diversity trade-off, significantly improving Pass@1 while restoring the Pass@K diversity typically lost by standard policy gradient methods.
tldr: The paper proposes Anchored Policy Optimization (APO) to address exploration collapse in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) by focusing on support coverage instead of shape matching, achieving better accuracy and diversity.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了锚定策略优化（APO），通过关注支持覆盖而非形状匹配来解决可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）中的探索崩溃问题，从而实现更好的准确性和多样性。
summary_zh: 具有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）正日益被视为一种树剪枝机制。然而，我们发现了一种称为递归空间收缩（RSC）的系统性病态现象，这是一种由正向锐化和负向挤压的联合动态驱动的不可逆坍塌，其中有效替代方案的采样概率消失。虽然Kullback-Leibler (KL) 正则化旨在缓解这种情况，但它施加了刚性的形状匹配约束，迫使策略模仿参考模型的完整密度，从而与纠正所需的锐化产生梯度冲突。我们提出了锚定策略优化（APO），将范式从全局形状匹配转移到支持覆盖。通过基于参考模型的高置信度支持定义安全流形，APO允许为提高效率而进行的激进锐化，同时在错误校正期间选择性地调用恢复力以防止坍塌。我们从理论上推导出 APO 是一种用于最大化支持覆盖的梯度对齐机制，从而实现弹性恢复，使有效分支得以重新扩展。在数学基准上的实证评估表明，APO打破了准确性-多样性之间的权衡，在显著提高Pass@1的同时，恢复了标准策略梯度方法通常会失去的Pass@K多样性。

title: Reactive Knowledge Representation and Asynchronous Reasoning
summary: Exact inference in complex probabilistic models often incurs prohibitive computational costs. This challenge is particularly acute for autonomous agents in dynamic environments that require frequent, real-time belief updates. Existing methods are often inefficient for ongoing reasoning, as they re-evaluate the entire model upon any change, failing to exploit that real-world information streams have heterogeneous update rates. To address this, we approach the problem from a reactive, asynchronous, probabilistic reasoning perspective. We first introduce Resin (Reactive Signal Inference), a probabilistic programming language that merges probabilistic logic with reactive programming. Furthermore, to provide efficient and exact semantics for Resin, we propose Reactive Circuits (RCs). Formulated as a meta-structure over Algebraic Circuits and asynchronous data streams, RCs are time-dynamic Directed Acyclic Graphs that autonomously adapt themselves based on the volatility of input signals. In high-fidelity drone swarm simulations, our approach achieves several orders of magnitude of speedup over frequency-agnostic inference. We demonstrate that RCs' structural adaptations successfully capture environmental dynamics, significantly reducing latency and facilitating reactive real-time reasoning. By partitioning computations based on the estimated Frequency of Change in the asynchronous inputs, large inference tasks can be decomposed into individually memoized sub-problems. This ensures that only the specific components of a model affected by new information are re-evaluated, drastically reducing redundant computation in streaming contexts.
tldr: This paper introduces Resin and Reactive Circuits (RCs) for efficient, asynchronous probabilistic reasoning in dynamic environments, achieving significant speedups in drone swarm simulations by adapting to the volatility of input signals.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了 Resin 和 Reactive Circuits (RCs)，用于动态环境中高效的异步概率推理。在无人机群模拟中，该方法通过适应输入信号的波动性，实现了显著的速度提升。
summary_zh: 复杂概率模型中的精确推理通常会产生过高的计算成本。对于需要在动态环境中频繁进行实时信念更新的自主体而言，这种挑战尤其严峻。现有方法在持续推理方面往往效率低下，因为它们会在任何变化后重新评估整个模型，而未能利用真实世界信息流具有异构更新速率的特性。为解决这个问题，我们从反应式、异步、概率推理的角度入手。我们首先引入 Resim（反应式信号推理），一种将概率逻辑与反应式编程相结合的概率编程语言。此外，为了为 Resim 提供高效且精确的语义，我们提出了反应式电路（RCs）。RCs 被构建为代数电路和异步数据流之上的元结构，是一种时间动态的有向无环图，可以根据输入信号的波动自主适应。在高保真无人机群仿真中，我们的方法比频率无关的推理方法实现了几个数量级的加速。 我们证明了 RCs 的结构性调整能够成功捕获环境动态，显著降低延迟并促进反应式实时推理。 通过基于异步输入中估计的变化频率来划分计算，大型推理任务可以分解为单独记忆的子问题。 这确保了只有受新信息影响的模型特定组件会被重新评估，从而大大减少了流式上下文中的冗余计算。

title: M$^2$-Miner: Multi-Agent Enhanced MCTS for Mobile GUI Agent Data Mining
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agent is pivotal to advancing intelligent human-computer interaction paradigms. Constructing powerful GUI agents necessitates the large-scale annotation of high-quality user-behavior trajectory data (i.e., intent-trajectory pairs) for training. However, manual annotation methods and current GUI agent data mining approaches typically face three critical challenges: high construction cost, poor data quality, and low data richness. To address these issues, we propose M$^2$-Miner, the first low-cost and automated mobile GUI agent data-mining framework based on Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). For better data mining efficiency and quality, we present a collaborative multi-agent framework, comprising InferAgent, OrchestraAgent, and JudgeAgent for guidance, acceleration, and evaluation. To further enhance the efficiency of mining and enrich intent diversity, we design an intent recycling strategy to extract extra valuable interaction trajectories. Additionally, a progressive model-in-the-loop training strategy is introduced to improve the success rate of data mining. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that the GUI agent fine-tuned using our mined data achieves state-of-the-art performance on several commonly used mobile GUI benchmarks. Our work will be released to facilitate the community research.
tldr: The paper introduces M$^2$-Miner, a multi-agent enhanced MCTS framework for automated mobile GUI agent data mining, which aims to generate high-quality user-behavior trajectory data at low cost and improves performance on GUI benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了M$^2$-Miner，一个多智能体增强的MCTS框架，用于自动化移动GUI代理数据挖掘，旨在以低成本生成高质量的用户行为轨迹数据，并提高在GUI基准测试中的性能。
summary_zh: 图形用户界面（GUI）代理对于推进智能人机交互范式至关重要。构建强大的GUI代理需要大规模标注高质量的用户行为轨迹数据（即意图-轨迹对）用于训练。然而，人工标注方法和现有的GUI代理数据挖掘方法通常面临三个关键挑战：高构建成本、低数据质量和低数据丰富度。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了M$^2$-Miner，这是第一个基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的低成本和自动化的移动GUI代理数据挖掘框架。为了提高数据挖掘效率和质量，我们提出了一个协同多代理框架，包括InferAgent、OrchestraAgent和JudgeAgent，分别用于指导、加速和评估。为了进一步提高挖掘效率并丰富意图多样性，我们设计了一种意图回收策略，以提取额外的有价值的交互轨迹。此外，还引入了一种渐进式模型在环训练策略，以提高数据挖掘的成功率。大量的实验表明，使用我们挖掘的数据微调后的GUI代理在几个常用的移动GUI基准测试上实现了最先进的性能。我们的工作将被发布以促进社区研究。

title: GAS: Enhancing Reward-Cost Balance of Generative Model-assisted Offline Safe RL
summary: Offline Safe Reinforcement Learning (OSRL) aims to learn a policy to achieve high performance in sequential decision-making while satisfying constraints, using only pre-collected datasets. Recent works, inspired by the strong capabilities of Generative Models (GMs), reformulate decision-making in OSRL as a conditional generative process, where GMs generate desirable actions conditioned on predefined reward and cost values. However, GM-assisted methods face two major challenges in OSRL: (1) lacking the ability to "stitch" optimal transitions from suboptimal trajectories within the dataset, and (2) struggling to balance reward targets with cost targets, particularly when they are conflict. To address these issues, we propose Goal-Assisted Stitching (GAS), a novel algorithm designed to enhance stitching capabilities while effectively balancing reward maximization and constraint satisfaction. To enhance the stitching ability, GAS first augments and relabels the dataset at the transition level, enabling the construction of high-quality trajectories from suboptimal ones. GAS also introduces novel goal functions, which estimate the optimal achievable reward and cost goals from the dataset. These goal functions, trained using expectile regression on the relabeled and augmented dataset, allow GAS to accommodate a broader range of reward-cost return pairs and achieve a better tradeoff between reward maximization and constraint satisfaction compared to human-specified values. The estimated goals then guide policy training, ensuring robust performance under constrained settings. Furthermore, to improve training stability and efficiency, we reshape the dataset to achieve a more uniform reward-cost return distribution. Empirical results validate the effectiveness of GAS, demonstrating superior performance in balancing reward maximization and constraint satisfaction compared to existing methods.
tldr: The paper introduces Goal-Assisted Stitching (GAS), a novel offline safe reinforcement learning algorithm leveraging generative models to balance reward maximization and constraint satisfaction by augmenting datasets and estimating optimal reward-cost goals using expectile regression.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为目标辅助拼接（GAS）的新型离线安全强化学习算法，该算法利用生成模型，通过增强数据集并使用期望回归估计最优奖励-成本目标，从而平衡奖励最大化和约束满足。
summary_zh: 离线安全强化学习（OSRL）旨在仅使用预先收集的数据集，学习一种在序贯决策中实现高性能并满足约束的策略。受生成模型（GM）强大能力的启发，近期的研究将OSRL中的决策重构为条件生成过程，其中GM生成以预定义的奖励和成本值为条件的期望动作。然而，GM辅助的方法在OSRL中面临两大挑战：（1）缺乏从数据集内次优轨迹“缝合”最优转移的能力，以及（2）难以平衡奖励目标与成本目标，尤其是在两者存在冲突时。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为目标辅助缝合（GAS）的新算法，旨在增强缝合能力，同时有效地平衡奖励最大化和约束满足。为了增强缝合能力，GAS首先在转移层面对数据集进行扩充和重标记，从而能够从次优轨迹构建高质量的轨迹。GAS还引入了新颖的目标函数，该函数估计数据集中最佳可实现的奖励和成本目标。这些目标函数使用分位回归在重标记和扩充的数据集上进行训练，使GAS能够适应更广泛的奖励-成本回报对，并实现比人类指定值更好的奖励最大化和约束满足之间的权衡。估计的目标随后指导策略训练，确保持续约束设置下的稳健性能。此外，为了提高训练稳定性和效率，我们重塑了数据集以实现更均匀的奖励-成本回报分布。实证结果验证了GAS的有效性，表明其在平衡奖励最大化和约束满足方面优于现有方法。

title: MINT: Minimal Information Neuro-Symbolic Tree for Objective-Driven Knowledge-Gap Reasoning and Active Elicitation
summary: Joint planning through language-based interactions is a key area of human-AI teaming. Planning problems in the open world often involve various aspects of incomplete information and unknowns, e.g., objects involved, human goals/intents -- thus leading to knowledge gaps in joint planning. We consider the problem of discovering optimal interaction strategies for AI agents to actively elicit human inputs in object-driven planning. To this end, we propose Minimal Information Neuro-Symbolic Tree (MINT) to reason about the impact of knowledge gaps and leverage self-play with MINT to optimize the AI agent's elicitation strategies and queries. More precisely, MINT builds a symbolic tree by making propositions of possible human-AI interactions and by consulting a neural planning policy to estimate the uncertainty in planning outcomes caused by remaining knowledge gaps. Finally, we leverage LLM to search and summarize MINT's reasoning process and curate a set of queries to optimally elicit human inputs for best planning performance. By considering a family of extended Markov decision processes with knowledge gaps, we analyze the return guarantee for a given MINT with active human elicitation. Our evaluation on three benchmarks involving unseen/unknown objects of increasing realism shows that MINT-based planning attains near-expert returns by issuing a limited number of questions per task while achieving significantly improved rewards and success rates.
tldr: The paper introduces MINT, a neuro-symbolic tree approach, to enable AI agents to actively elicit human input for object-driven planning by reasoning about knowledge gaps and optimizing elicitation strategies using LLMs, achieving near-expert performance with limited questions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MINT，一种神经符号树方法，用于让AI智能体能够主动获取人类输入以进行对象驱动的规划，通过推理知识差距并使用LLM优化引出策略，以有限的问题实现了接近专家的性能。
summary_zh: 基于语言交互的联合规划是人机协同的关键领域。开放世界中的规划问题通常涉及各种不完整的信息和未知情况，例如涉及的对象、人类的目标/意图——从而导致联合规划中的知识缺口。我们考虑为AI智能体发现最佳交互策略的问题，以便在对象驱动的规划中主动引导人类输入。为此，我们提出了最小信息神经符号树（MINT），以推理知识缺口的影响，并利用与MINT的自博弈来优化AI智能体的引导策略和查询。更具体地说，MINT通过对可能的人机交互提出命题，并查阅神经规划策略来构建一个符号树，以估计由剩余知识缺口引起的规划结果的不确定性。最后，我们利用LLM搜索和总结MINT的推理过程，并策划一组查询，以最佳方式引导人类输入，从而实现最佳规划性能。通过考虑一系列具有知识缺口的扩展马尔可夫决策过程，我们分析了给定MINT在主动引导人类情况下的回报保证。我们在三个涉及日益逼真的未见/未知对象的基准上的评估表明，基于MINT的规划通过在每个任务中发出数量有限的问题，实现了接近专家的回报，同时显着提高了奖励和成功率。

title: DeepRead: Document Structure-Aware Reasoning to Enhance Agentic Search
summary: With the rapid progress of tool-using and agentic large language models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is evolving from one-shot, passive retrieval into multi-turn, decision-driven evidence acquisition. Despite strong results in open-domain settings, existing agentic search frameworks commonly treat long documents as flat collections of chunks, underutilizing document-native priors such as hierarchical organization and sequential discourse structure. We introduce DeepRead, a structure-aware, multi-turn document reasoning agent that explicitly operationalizes these priors for long-document question answering. DeepRead leverages LLM-based OCR model to convert PDFs into structured Markdown that preserves headings and paragraph boundaries. It then indexes documents at the paragraph level and assigns each paragraph a coordinate-style metadata key encoding its section identity and in-section order. Building on this representation, DeepRead equips the LLM with two complementary tools: a Retrieve tool that localizes relevant paragraphs while exposing their structural coordinates (with lightweight scanning context), and a ReadSection tool that enables contiguous, order-preserving reading within a specified section and paragraph range. Our experiments demonstrate that DeepRead achieves significant improvements over Search-o1-style agentic search in document question answering. The synergistic effect between retrieval and reading tools is also validated. Our fine-grained behavioral analysis reveals a reading and reasoning paradigm resembling human-like ``locate then read'' behavior.
tldr: The paper introduces DeepRead, a document structure-aware agentic search framework that leverages document hierarchy and sequential structure for improved long-document question answering. It uses LLM-based OCR to create structured Markdown, indexes paragraphs with structural metadata, and equips the agent with retrieve and read tools to mimic human-like reading behavior.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍 DeepRead，一个文档结构感知的代理搜索框架，它利用文档层级结构和顺序结构来改进长文档问答。它使用基于 LLM 的 OCR 创建结构化的 Markdown，使用结构化元数据索引段落，并为代理配备检索和阅读工具，以模仿类似人类的阅读行为。
summary_zh: 随着使用工具和具备智能体能力的大型语言模型（LLM）的快速发展，检索增强生成（RAG）正从一次性的被动检索演变为多轮的、决策驱动的证据获取。尽管在开放领域设置下取得了显著成果，但现有的智能体搜索框架通常将长文档视为平坦的文本块集合，从而未能充分利用文档固有的先验知识，例如层级结构和顺序话语结构。我们推出了DeepRead，一种结构感知的、多轮文档推理智能体，它显式地操作这些先验知识，用于长文档问答。DeepRead利用基于LLM的OCR模型将PDF转换为结构化的Markdown，保留标题和段落边界。然后，它在段落级别索引文档，并为每个段落分配一个坐标式元数据键，编码其章节身份和章节内顺序。基于这种表示，DeepRead为LLM配备了两个互补的工具：一个Retrieve（检索）工具，用于定位相关段落，同时暴露其结构坐标（带有轻量级扫描上下文）；以及一个ReadSection（阅读章节）工具，可以在指定章节和段落范围内进行连续的、保持顺序的阅读。我们的实验表明，DeepRead在文档问答方面比Search-o1风格的智能体搜索取得了显著改进。检索和阅读工具之间的协同效应也得到了验证。我们细粒度的行为分析揭示了一种类似于人类“定位然后阅读”行为的阅读和推理范式。

title: El Agente Estructural: An Artificially Intelligent Molecular Editor
summary: We present El Agente Estructural, a multimodal, natural-language-driven geometry-generation and manipulation agent for autonomous chemistry and molecular modelling. Unlike molecular generation or editing via generative models, Estructural mimics how human experts directly manipulate molecular systems in three dimensions by integrating a comprehensive set of domain-informed tools and vision-language models. This design enables precise control over atomic or functional group replacements, atomic connectivity, and stereochemistry without the need to rebuild extensive core molecular frameworks. Through a series of representative case studies, we demonstrate that Estructural enables chemically meaningful geometry manipulation across a wide range of real-world scenarios. These include site-selective functionalization, ligand binding, ligand exchange, stereochemically controlled structure construction, isomer interconversion, fragment-level structural analysis, image-guided generation of structures from schematic reaction mechanisms, and mechanism-driven geometry generation and modification. These examples illustrate how multimodal reasoning, when combined with specialized geometry-aware tools, supports interactive and context-aware molecular modelling beyond structure generation. Looking forward, the integration of Estructural into El Agente Quntur, an autonomous multi-agent quantum chemistry platform, enhances its capabilities by adding sophisticated tools for the generation and editing of three-dimensional structures.
tldr: The paper presents El Agente Estructural, a multimodal AI agent that directly manipulates molecular structures in 3D using natural language and domain-informed tools, showcasing applications in various chemical scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为 El Agente Estructural 的多模态人工智能体，它使用自然语言和领域知识工具直接在 3D 空间中操作分子结构，并在各种化学场景中展示了其应用。
summary_zh: 我们提出了El Agente Estructural，一种多模态、自然语言驱动的几何结构生成和操控代理，用于自主化学和分子建模。与通过生成模型进行分子生成或编辑不同，Estructural通过集成一套全面的领域知识工具和视觉-语言模型，模仿人类专家直接在三维空间中操控分子系统的方式。这种设计实现了对原子或官能团取代、原子连接以及立体化学的精确控制，而无需重建广泛的核心分子骨架。通过一系列具有代表性的案例研究，我们证明了Estructural能够在广泛的真实场景中实现具有化学意义的几何结构操控。这些场景包括位点选择性官能化、配体结合、配体交换、立体化学控制的结构构建、异构体相互转化、片段级结构分析、基于示意性反应机理的图像引导结构生成以及机理驱动的几何结构生成和修改。这些例子说明了多模态推理与专门的几何感知工具相结合如何支持超出结构生成的交互式和上下文感知的分子建模。展望未来，将Estructural集成到El Agente Quntur，一个自主的多代理量子化学平台中，通过添加用于生成和编辑三维结构的复杂工具来增强其能力。

title: ShapeUP: Scalable Image-Conditioned 3D Editing
summary: Recent advancements in 3D foundation models have enabled the generation of high-fidelity assets, yet precise 3D manipulation remains a significant challenge. Existing 3D editing frameworks often face a difficult trade-off between visual controllability, geometric consistency, and scalability. Specifically, optimization-based methods are prohibitively slow, multi-view 2D propagation techniques suffer from visual drift, and training-free latent manipulation methods are inherently bound by frozen priors and cannot directly benefit from scaling. In this work, we present ShapeUP, a scalable, image-conditioned 3D editing framework that formulates editing as a supervised latent-to-latent translation within a native 3D representation. This formulation allows ShapeUP to build on a pretrained 3D foundation model, leveraging its strong generative prior while adapting it to editing through supervised training. In practice, ShapeUP is trained on triplets consisting of a source 3D shape, an edited 2D image, and the corresponding edited 3D shape, and learns a direct mapping using a 3D Diffusion Transformer (DiT). This image-as-prompt approach enables fine-grained visual control over both local and global edits and achieves implicit, mask-free localization, while maintaining strict structural consistency with the original asset. Our extensive evaluations demonstrate that ShapeUP consistently outperforms current trained and training-free baselines in both identity preservation and edit fidelity, offering a robust and scalable paradigm for native 3D content creation.
tldr: The paper introduces ShapeUP, a scalable image-conditioned 3D editing framework that uses a 3D Diffusion Transformer to learn a direct mapping between source 3D shapes and edited 2D images, enabling fine-grained control and structural consistency.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ShapeUP，一个可扩展的图像条件3D编辑框架，它使用3D扩散Transformer学习源3D形状和编辑后的2D图像之间的直接映射，从而实现细粒度的控制和结构一致性。
summary_zh: 3D基础模型的最新进展已经能够生成高保真度的资产，然而，精确的3D操作仍然是一个重要的挑战。现有的3D编辑框架通常面临视觉可控性、几何一致性和可扩展性之间的艰难权衡。具体而言，基于优化的方法速度过慢，多视角2D传播技术会遭遇视觉漂移，而免训练的潜在空间操作方法本质上受限于固定的先验知识，并且无法直接受益于扩展。在这项工作中，我们提出了ShapeUP，一个可扩展的、图像条件下的3D编辑框架，将编辑表述为原生3D表示中的有监督的潜在空间到潜在空间的转换。这种表述使得ShapeUP能够构建在预训练的3D基础模型之上，利用其强大的生成先验的同时，通过有监督的训练使其适应编辑任务。在实践中，ShapeUP在由源3D形状、编辑后的2D图像以及相应的编辑后的3D形状组成的三元组上进行训练，并使用3D扩散Transformer (DiT) 学习直接映射。这种图像即提示的方法能够对局部和全局编辑实现细粒度的视觉控制，并实现隐式、无需掩码的定位，同时保持与原始资产严格的结构一致性。我们广泛的评估表明，ShapeUP在身份保持和编辑保真度方面始终优于当前的有训练方法和免训练的基线方法，为原生3D内容创建提供了一个稳健且可扩展的范例。

title: Unified Sensor Simulation for Autonomous Driving
summary: In this work, we introduce \textbf{XSIM}, a sensor simulation framework for autonomous driving. XSIM extends 3DGUT splatting with a generalized rolling-shutter modeling tailored for autonomous driving applications. Our framework provides a unified and flexible formulation for appearance and geometric sensor modeling, enabling rendering of complex sensor distortions in dynamic environments. We identify spherical cameras, such as LiDARs, as a critical edge case for existing 3DGUT splatting due to cyclic projection and time discontinuities at azimuth boundaries leading to incorrect particle projection. To address this issue, we propose a phase modeling mechanism that explicitly accounts temporal and shape discontinuities of Gaussians projected by the Unscented Transform at azimuth borders. In addition, we introduce an extended 3D Gaussian representation that incorporates two distinct opacity parameters to resolve mismatches between geometry and color distributions. As a result, our framework provides enhanced scene representations with improved geometric consistency and photorealistic appearance. We evaluate our framework extensively on multiple autonomous driving datasets, including Waymo Open Dataset, Argoverse 2, and PandaSet. Our framework consistently outperforms strong recent baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance across all datasets. The source code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/whesense/XSIM}{https://github.com/whesense/XSIM}.
tldr: The paper introduces XSIM, a sensor simulation framework for autonomous driving that improves upon existing 3DGUT splatting techniques, particularly for spherical cameras and complex scene representation, achieving state-of-the-art performance on multiple datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为XSIM的自动驾驶传感器仿真框架，它改进了现有的3DGUT splatting技术，尤其是在球形相机和复杂场景表示方面，并在多个数据集上实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 本文介绍 \textbf{XSIM}，一个用于自动驾驶的传感器仿真框架。XSIM 扩展了 3DGUT splatting，并专门针对自动驾驶应用设计了一个通用的卷帘快门建模方法。我们的框架为外观和几何传感器建模提供了一个统一且灵活的公式，从而能够在动态环境中渲染复杂的传感器失真。我们发现，由于循环投影和方位角边界处的时间不连续性会导致错误的粒子投影，因此诸如激光雷达之类的球面摄像机是现有 3DGUT splatting 的一个关键边缘案例。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种相位建模机制，该机制显式地考虑了由无迹变换投影的高斯函数在方位角边界上的时间和形状不连续性。此外，我们引入了一种扩展的 3D 高斯表示，该表示结合了两个不同的不透明度参数，以解决几何形状和颜色分布之间的不匹配问题。因此，我们的框架提供了增强的场景表示，具有改进的几何一致性和逼真的外观。我们使用多个自动驾驶数据集（包括 Waymo Open Dataset、Argoverse 2 和 PandaSet）对我们的框架进行了广泛的评估。我们的框架始终优于强大的最新基线，并在所有数据集上实现了最先进的性能。源代码已在 \href{https://github.com/whesense/XSIM}{https://github.com/whesense/XSIM} 上公开。

title: EgoPoseVR: Spatiotemporal Multi-Modal Reasoning for Egocentric Full-Body Pose in Virtual Reality
summary: Immersive virtual reality (VR) applications demand accurate, temporally coherent full-body pose tracking. Recent head-mounted camera-based approaches show promise in egocentric pose estimation, but encounter challenges when applied to VR head-mounted displays (HMDs), including temporal instability, inaccurate lower-body estimation, and the lack of real-time performance. To address these limitations, we present EgoPoseVR, an end-to-end framework for accurate egocentric full-body pose estimation in VR that integrates headset motion cues with egocentric RGB-D observations through a dual-modality fusion pipeline. A spatiotemporal encoder extracts frame- and joint-level representations, which are fused via cross-attention to fully exploit complementary motion cues across modalities. A kinematic optimization module then imposes constraints from HMD signals, enhancing the accuracy and stability of pose estimation. To facilitate training and evaluation, we introduce a large-scale synthetic dataset of over 1.8 million temporally aligned HMD and RGB-D frames across diverse VR scenarios. Experimental results show that EgoPoseVR outperforms state-of-the-art egocentric pose estimation models. A user study in real-world scenes further shows that EgoPoseVR achieved significantly higher subjective ratings in accuracy, stability, embodiment, and intention for future use compared to baseline methods. These results show that EgoPoseVR enables robust full-body pose tracking, offering a practical solution for accurate VR embodiment without requiring additional body-worn sensors or room-scale tracking systems.
tldr: EgoPoseVR is a new framework for accurate full-body pose estimation in VR, using HMD motion cues integrated with egocentric RGB-D data via a spatiotemporal encoder and kinematic optimization, outperforming existing methods.
tldr_zh: EgoPoseVR是一个用于VR中准确全身姿态估计的新框架，它通过时空编码器和运动学优化，集成了HMD运动线索和以自我为中心的RGB-D数据， 优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 沉浸式虚拟现实(VR)应用需要精确且时间上一致的全身体姿追踪。最近基于头戴式摄像头的研究在以自我为中心的姿态估计方面展现出希望，但在应用于VR头戴式显示器(HMDs)时面临挑战，包括时间不稳定、不准确的下半身估计以及缺乏实时性能。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了EgoPoseVR，一个用于VR中精确的以自我为中心的全身体姿估计的端到端框架，该框架通过双模态融合流水线整合了头显运动线索与以自我为中心的RGB-D观测。一个时空编码器提取帧级别和关节级别的表征，这些表征通过交叉注意力融合，以充分利用跨模态的互补运动线索。然后，一个运动学优化模块施加来自HMD信号的约束，从而提高姿态估计的准确性和稳定性。为了方便训练和评估，我们引入了一个大规模合成数据集，包含跨越各种VR场景的超过180万个时间对齐的HMD和RGB-D帧。实验结果表明，EgoPoseVR优于最先进的以自我为中心的姿态估计模型。在现实场景中的一项用户研究进一步表明，与基线方法相比，EgoPoseVR在准确性、稳定性、具身性以及未来使用意向上获得了明显更高的主观评分。这些结果表明，EgoPoseVR实现了鲁棒的全身体姿追踪，无需额外的身体传感器或房间尺度追踪系统，为精确的VR具身性提供了一种实用的解决方案。

title: Visual Implicit Geometry Transformer for Autonomous Driving
summary: We introduce the Visual Implicit Geometry Transformer (ViGT), an autonomous driving geometric model that estimates continuous 3D occupancy fields from surround-view camera rigs. ViGT represents a step towards foundational geometric models for autonomous driving, prioritizing scalability, architectural simplicity, and generalization across diverse sensor configurations. Our approach achieves this through a calibration-free architecture, enabling a single model to adapt to different sensor setups. Unlike general-purpose geometric foundational models that focus on pixel-aligned predictions, ViGT estimates a continuous 3D occupancy field in a birds-eye-view (BEV) addressing domain-specific requirements. ViGT naturally infers geometry from multiple camera views into a single metric coordinate frame, providing a common representation for multiple geometric tasks. Unlike most existing occupancy models, we adopt a self-supervised training procedure that leverages synchronized image-LiDAR pairs, eliminating the need for costly manual annotations. We validate the scalability and generalizability of our approach by training our model on a mixture of five large-scale autonomous driving datasets (NuScenes, Waymo, NuPlan, ONCE, and Argoverse) and achieving state-of-the-art performance on the pointmap estimation task, with the best average rank across all evaluated baselines. We further evaluate ViGT on the Occ3D-nuScenes benchmark, where ViGT achieves comparable performance with supervised methods. The source code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/whesense/ViGT}{https://github.com/whesense/ViGT}.
tldr: The paper introduces Visual Implicit Geometry Transformer (ViGT), a self-supervised, calibration-free geometric model for autonomous driving that estimates 3D occupancy fields from surround-view cameras, achieving state-of-the-art performance on pointmap estimation across multiple datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Visual Implicit Geometry Transformer(ViGT)，一种用于自动驾驶的自监督、免校准的几何模型，它从环视摄像头估计3D occupancy fields，并在多个数据集上的点云估计任务上实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 我们引入视觉隐式几何变换器（ViGT），一种自主驾驶几何模型，能够从环视摄像头装备中估计连续的3D occupancy field（占据场）。ViGT代表了自主驾驶领域走向基础几何模型的一步，优先考虑可扩展性、架构简洁性以及跨不同传感器配置的泛化能力。我们的方法通过免标定的架构实现这一点，使得单一模型能够适应不同的传感器设置。与专注于像素对齐预测的通用几何基础模型不同，ViGT在鸟瞰图（BEV）中估计连续的3D occupancy field，从而满足特定领域的需求。ViGT能够自然地从多个相机视图中推断几何信息到一个统一的度量坐标系中，为多个几何任务提供通用的表示。与大多数现有的occupancy模型不同，我们采用了自监督训练程序，该程序利用同步的图像-激光雷达对，从而消除了对昂贵的人工标注的需求。我们通过在五个大型自动驾驶数据集（NuScenes、Waymo、NuPlan、ONCE和Argoverse）的混合数据集上训练我们的模型，验证了我们方法的可扩展性和泛化性，并在pointmap估计任务上实现了最先进的性能，在所有评估基线中取得了最佳的平均排名。我们进一步在Occ3D-nuScenes基准上评估了ViGT，ViGT在该基准上取得了与监督方法相当的性能。源代码可在 \href{https://github.com/whesense/ViGT}{https://github.com/whesense/ViGT} 上公开获取。

title: VGGT-Motion: Motion-Aware Calibration-Free Monocular SLAM for Long-Range Consistency
summary: Despite recent progress in calibration-free monocular SLAM via 3D vision foundation models, scale drift remains severe on long sequences. Motion-agnostic partitioning breaks contextual coherence and causes zero-motion drift, while conventional geometric alignment is computationally expensive. To address these issues, we propose VGGT-Motion, a calibration-free SLAM system for efficient and robust global consistency over kilometer-scale trajectories. Specifically, we first propose a motion-aware submap construction mechanism that uses optical flow to guide adaptive partitioning, prune static redundancy, and encapsulate turns for stable local geometry. We then design an anchor-driven direct Sim(3) registration strategy. By exploiting context-balanced anchors, it achieves search-free, pixel-wise dense alignment and efficient loop closure without costly feature matching. Finally, a lightweight submap-level pose graph optimization enforces global consistency with linear complexity, enabling scalable long-range operation. Experiments show that VGGT-Motion markedly improves trajectory accuracy and efficiency, achieving state-of-the-art performance in zero-shot, long-range calibration-free monocular SLAM.
tldr: VGGT-Motion is a calibration-free monocular SLAM system using optical flow and anchor-driven direct Sim(3) registration to achieve long-range consistency and efficiency, outperforming existing methods in trajectory accuracy.
tldr_zh: VGGT-Motion是一个免标定的单目SLAM系统，它使用光流和锚点驱动的直接Sim(3)配准来实现远距离一致性和效率，并在轨迹精度上优于现有方法。
summary_zh:
摘要：
尽管近年来通过3D视觉基础模型实现的免标定单目SLAM取得了进展，但在长序列上尺度的漂移仍然严重。与运动无关的分割破坏了上下文连贯性，导致零运动漂移，而传统的几何对齐计算成本高昂。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为VGGT-Motion的免标定SLAM系统，用于在公里级轨迹上实现高效且稳健的全局一致性。具体而言，我们首先提出了一种运动感知子地图构建机制，该机制利用光流引导自适应分割、修剪静态冗余并封装转弯，以实现稳定的局部几何结构。然后，我们设计了一种锚点驱动的直接Sim(3)配准策略。通过利用上下文平衡的锚点，它实现了无需搜索的像素级密集对齐和高效的闭环，而无需昂贵的特征匹配。最后，一种轻量级的子地图级姿态图优化以线性复杂度强制执行全局一致性，从而实现可扩展的远程操作。实验表明，VGGT-Motion显著提高了轨迹精度和效率，在零样本、远程免标定单目SLAM中实现了最先进的性能。

title: Wid3R: Wide Field-of-View 3D Reconstruction via Camera Model Conditioning
summary: We present Wid3R, a feed-forward neural network for visual geometry reconstruction that supports wide field-of-view camera models. Prior methods typically assume that input images are rectified or captured with pinhole cameras, since both their architectures and training datasets are tailored to perspective images only. These assumptions limit their applicability in real-world scenarios that use fisheye or panoramic cameras and often require careful calibration and undistortion. In contrast, Wid3R is a generalizable multi-view 3D estimation method that can model wide field-of-view camera types. Our approach leverages a ray representation with spherical harmonics and a novel camera model token within the network, enabling distortion-aware 3D reconstruction. Furthermore, Wid3R is the first multi-view foundation model to support feed-forward 3D reconstruction directly from 360 imagery. It demonstrates strong zero-shot robustness and consistently outperforms prior methods, achieving improvements of up to +77.33 on Stanford2D3D.
tldr: The paper introduces Wid3R, a neural network enabling 3D reconstruction from multi-view images captured by wide field-of-view cameras without prior rectification, demonstrating strong zero-shot performance especially on 360 imagery.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为Wid3R的神经网络，它能够从广角相机拍摄的多视图图像中进行3D重建，无需事先进行校正，并在360度图像上表现出强大的零样本性能。
summary_zh: 我们提出了Wid3R，一种用于视觉几何重建的前馈神经网络，支持广角视场相机模型。以往的方法通常假设输入图像是经过校正的或者是由针孔相机拍摄的，因为它们的架构和训练数据集都只针对透视图像设计。这些假设限制了它们在现实世界场景中的适用性，现实世界场景通常使用鱼眼或全景相机，并且需要仔细的校准和畸变校正。相比之下，Wid3R是一种可泛化的多视图3D估计方法，可以对广角视场相机类型进行建模。我们的方法利用了带有球谐函数的射线表示和网络中的一种新型相机模型令牌，从而实现感知畸变的3D重建。此外，Wid3R是第一个直接从360度图像支持前馈3D重建的多视图基础模型。它展示了强大的零样本鲁棒性，并且始终优于以往的方法，在Stanford2D3D数据集上实现了高达 +77.33 的改进。

title: AirGlove: Exploring Egocentric 3D Hand Tracking and Appearance Generalization for Sensing Gloves
summary: Sensing gloves have become important tools for teleoperation and robotic policy learning as they are able to provide rich signals like speed, acceleration and tactile feedback. A common approach to track gloved hands is to directly use the sensor signals (e.g., angular velocity, gravity orientation) to estimate 3D hand poses. However, sensor-based tracking can be restrictive in practice as the accuracy is often impacted by sensor signal and calibration quality. Recent advances in vision-based approaches have achieved strong performance on human hands via large-scale pre-training, but their performance on gloved hands with distinct visual appearances remains underexplored. In this work, we present the first systematic evaluation of vision-based hand tracking models on gloved hands under both zero-shot and fine-tuning setups. Our analysis shows that existing bare-hand models suffer from substantial performance degradation on sensing gloves due to large appearance gap between bare-hand and glove designs. We therefore propose AirGlove, which leverages existing gloves to generalize the learned glove representations towards new gloves with limited data. Experiments with multiple sensing gloves show that AirGlove effectively generalizes the hand pose models to new glove designs and achieves a significant performance boost over the compared schemes.
tldr: The paper introduces AirGlove, a method for improving vision-based hand tracking on gloved hands by generalizing glove representations to new glove designs with limited data, addressing performance degradation of existing bare-hand models.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了AirGlove，一种通过将手套表征泛化到具有有限数据的新手套设计，从而改善基于视觉的手套手部跟踪的方法，解决了现有裸手模型性能下降的问题。
summary_zh: 传感手套已成为遥操作和机器人策略学习的重要工具，因为它们能够提供丰富的信号，如速度、加速度和触觉反馈。一种常见的跟踪手套手的方法是直接使用传感器信号（例如，角速度、重力方向）来估计 3D 手部姿势。然而，基于传感器的跟踪在实践中可能会受到限制，因为其精度通常会受到传感器信号和校准质量的影响。视觉方法最近的进展通过大规模预训练在人类手部上取得了强大的性能，但它们在具有独特视觉外观的手套手上的性能仍有待探索。在这项工作中，我们首次对基于视觉的手部跟踪模型在手套手上的零样本和微调设置下进行了系统的评估。我们的分析表明，由于裸手和手套设计之间的较大外观差异，现有的裸手模型在传感手套上会遭受显著的性能下降。因此，我们提出了 AirGlove，它利用现有的手套，以有限的数据将学习到的手套表示推广到新的手套。对多个传感手套进行的实验表明，AirGlove有效地将手部姿势模型推广到新的手套设计，并在所比较的方案上实现了显著的性能提升。

title: ARGaze: Autoregressive Transformers for Online Egocentric Gaze Estimation
summary: Online egocentric gaze estimation predicts where a camera wearer is looking from first-person video using only past and current frames, a task essential for augmented reality and assistive technologies. Unlike third-person gaze estimation, this setting lacks explicit head or eye signals, requiring models to infer current visual attention from sparse, indirect cues such as hand-object interactions and salient scene content. We observe that gaze exhibits strong temporal continuity during goal-directed activities: knowing where a person looked recently provides a powerful prior for predicting where they look next. Inspired by vision-conditioned autoregressive decoding in vision-language models, we propose ARGaze, which reformulates gaze estimation as sequential prediction: at each timestep, a transformer decoder predicts current gaze by conditioning on (i) current visual features and (ii) a fixed-length Gaze Context Window of recent gaze target estimates. This design enforces causality and enables bounded-resource streaming inference. We achieve state-of-the-art performance across multiple egocentric benchmarks under online evaluation, with extensive ablations validating that autoregressive modeling with bounded gaze history is critical for robust prediction. We will release our source code and pre-trained models.
tldr: The paper introduces ARGaze, an autoregressive transformer model that predicts egocentric gaze using past and current frames, achieving state-of-the-art performance on online egocentric gaze estimation benchmarks by leveraging the temporal continuity of gaze.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了ARGaze，一个自回归transformer模型，它利用过去和当前的帧来预测以自我为中心的视线，通过利用视线的时间连续性，在在线以自我为中心的视线估计基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 在线第一人称注视点估计通过仅使用过去和当前帧来预测摄像头佩戴者在第一人称视频中正在看哪里，这项任务对于增强现实和辅助技术至关重要。与第三人称注视点估计不同，这种设置缺乏明确的头部或眼睛信号，需要模型从稀疏、间接的线索（如手-物交互和显著的场景内容）中推断出当前的视觉注意力。我们观察到，在目标导向的活动中，注视点表现出很强的时间连续性：了解一个人最近看过哪里，为预测他们接下来会看哪里提供了强大的先验信息。受到视觉-语言模型中视觉条件自回归解码的启发，我们提出了 ARGaze，它将注视点估计重新定义为序列预测：在每个时间步，Transformer解码器通过以下条件预测当前的注视点：（i）当前视觉特征和（ii）固定长度的最近注视目标估计的注视点上下文窗口。这种设计强制执行了因果关系，并实现了有界资源下的流式推理。在在线评估下，我们在多个第一人称基准上实现了最先进的性能，并通过广泛的消融实验验证了具有有界注视历史的自回归建模对于稳健预测至关重要。我们将发布我们的源代码和预训练模型。

title: Distributional Reinforcement Learning with Diffusion Bridge Critics
summary: Recent advances in diffusion-based reinforcement learning (RL) methods have demonstrated promising results in a wide range of continuous control tasks. However, existing works in this field focus on the application of diffusion policies while leaving the diffusion critics unexplored. In fact, since policy optimization fundamentally relies on the critic, accurate value estimation is far more important than policy expressiveness. Furthermore, given the stochasticity of most reinforcement learning tasks, it has been confirmed that the critic is more appropriately depicted with a distributional model. Motivated by these points, we propose a novel distributional RL method with Diffusion Bridge Critics (DBC). DBC directly models the inverse cumulative distribution function (CDF) of the Q value. This allows us to accurately capture the value distribution and prevents it from collapsing into a trivial Gaussian distribution owing to the strong distribution-matching capability of the diffusion bridge. Moreover, we further derive an analytic integral formula to address discretization errors in DBC, which is essential in value estimation. To our knowledge, DBC is the first work to employ the diffusion bridge model as the critic. Notably, DBC is also a plug-and-play component and can be integrated into most existing RL frameworks. Experimental results on MuJoCo robot control benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of DBC compared with previous distributional critic models.
tldr: This paper introduces Diffusion Bridge Critics (DBC), a novel distributional reinforcement learning method that uses diffusion bridges to model the Q-value distribution, improving value estimation accuracy and demonstrating superior performance on MuJoCo benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于扩散桥的评论家（DBC）的分布式强化学习方法，该方法使用扩散桥来建模 Q 值分布，提高了价值估计的准确性，并在 MuJoCo 基准测试中表现出卓越的性能。
summary_zh: 基于扩散的强化学习（RL）方法近期的进展已经在广泛的连续控制任务中展示了令人期待的结果。然而，该领域现有的工作集中于扩散策略的应用，而忽略了对扩散评论家的探索。事实上，由于策略优化从根本上依赖于评论家，准确的价值估计远比策略的表达能力更为重要。此外，考虑到大多数强化学习任务的随机性，已经证实评论家更适合用分布模型来描述。受到这些观点的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的带有扩散桥评论家（DBC）的分布强化学习方法。DBC直接对Q值的逆累积分布函数（CDF）进行建模。这使得我们能够准确地捕获价值分布，并防止其因扩散桥强大的分布匹配能力而塌缩成一个简单的正态分布。此外，我们进一步推导出一个解析的积分公式来解决DBC中的离散化误差，这在价值估计中至关重要。据我们所知，DBC  是第一个采用扩散桥模型作为评论家的方法。值得注意的是，DBC也是一个即插即用的组件，可以集成到大多数现有的强化学习框架中。在MuJoCo机器人控制基准测试上的实验结果证明了DBC相比于之前的分布评论家模型的优越性。

title: Cross-Domain Offline Policy Adaptation via Selective Transition Correction
summary: It remains a critical challenge to adapt policies across domains with mismatched dynamics in reinforcement learning (RL). In this paper, we study cross-domain offline RL, where an offline dataset from another similar source domain can be accessed to enhance policy learning upon a target domain dataset. Directly merging the two datasets may lead to suboptimal performance due to potential dynamics mismatches. Existing approaches typically mitigate this issue through source domain transition filtering or reward modification, which, however, may lead to insufficient exploitation of the valuable source domain data. Instead, we propose to modify the source domain data into the target domain data. To that end, we leverage an inverse policy model and a reward model to correct the actions and rewards of source transitions, explicitly achieving alignment with the target dynamics. Since limited data may result in inaccurate model training, we further employ a forward dynamics model to retain corrected samples that better match the target dynamics than the original transitions. Consequently, we propose the Selective Transition Correction (STC) algorithm, which enables reliable usage of source domain data for policy adaptation. Experiments on various environments with dynamics shifts demonstrate that STC achieves superior performance against existing baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces Selective Transition Correction (STC), a novel algorithm for cross-domain offline reinforcement learning that selectively modifies source domain data to align with the target domain dynamics using inverse policy, reward, and forward dynamics models.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为选择性转换校正 (STC) 的新型跨域离线强化学习算法，该算法使用逆策略、奖励和前向动力学模型选择性地修改源域数据，使其与目标域动力学对齐。
summary_zh: 在强化学习（RL）中，跨领域策略适应仍然是一个关键挑战，尤其是在各个领域的动态特性不匹配的情况下。本文研究跨领域离线强化学习，其中可以访问来自另一个类似源领域的离线数据集，从而增强目标领域数据集上的策略学习。直接合并这两个数据集可能会导致次优性能，因为存在潜在的动态特性不匹配。现有方法通常通过源领域转移过滤或奖励修改来缓解这个问题，但这些方法可能会导致对有价值的源领域数据利用不足。相反，我们提出将源领域数据修改为目标领域数据。为此，我们利用逆策略模型和奖励模型来纠正源转移的动作和奖励，从而显式地实现与目标动态特性的一致性。由于有限的数据可能导致不准确的模型训练，我们进一步采用正向动力学模型来保留比原始转移更好地匹配目标动态特性的修正样本。因此，我们提出了选择性转移校正（STC）算法，该算法能够可靠地利用源领域数据进行策略适应。在具有动态变化的各种环境中的实验表明，STC相对于现有基线实现了卓越的性能。

title: Efficient Algorithms for Robust Markov Decision Processes with $s$-Rectangular Ambiguity Sets
summary: Robust Markov decision processes (MDPs) have attracted significant interest due to their ability to protect MDPs from poor out-of-sample performance in the presence of ambiguity. In contrast to classical MDPs, which account for stochasticity by modeling the dynamics through a stochastic process with a known transition kernel, a robust MDP additionally accounts for ambiguity by optimizing against the most adverse transition kernel from an ambiguity set constructed via historical data. In this paper, we develop a unified solution framework for a broad class of robust MDPs with $s$-rectangular ambiguity sets, where the most adverse transition probabilities are considered independently for each state. Using our algorithms, we show that $s$-rectangular robust MDPs with $1$- and $2$-norm as well as $φ$-divergence ambiguity sets can be solved several orders of magnitude faster than with state-of-the-art commercial solvers, and often only a logarithmic factor slower than classical MDPs. We demonstrate the favorable scaling properties of our algorithms on a range of synthetically generated as well as standard benchmark instances.
tldr: This paper presents efficient algorithms for solving robust Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) with s-rectangular ambiguity sets, demonstrating significant speed improvements over existing solvers on various benchmark problems.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种高效的算法，用于解决具有s-矩形模糊集（s-rectangular ambiguity sets）的鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并在各种基准问题上展示了比现有求解器显著的速度提升。
summary_zh: 稳健马尔可夫决策过程(MDPs)因其在存在不确定性时能够保护MDPs免受不良的样本外性能影响而备受关注。与经典的MDPs不同，后者通过具有已知转移核的随机过程来模拟动态过程中的随机性，而稳健MDPs则额外考虑了不确定性，通过针对从通过历史数据构建的不确定性集合中最不利的转移核进行优化。在本文中，我们为具有$s$-矩形不确定性集合的一大类稳健MDPs开发了一个统一的解决方案框架，其中对于每个状态，最不利的转移概率被独立考虑。利用我们的算法，我们表明具有$1$-范数和$2$-范数以及$φ$-散度不确定性集合的$s$-矩形稳健MDPs的求解速度比最先进的商业求解器快几个数量级，并且通常只比经典MDPs慢一个对数因子。我们在一系列合成生成以及标准基准实例上证明了我们算法的良好缩放特性。

title: When Are RL Hyperparameters Benign? A Study in Offline Goal-Conditioned RL
summary: Hyperparameter sensitivity in Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) is often accepted as unavoidable. However, it remains unclear whether it is intrinsic to the RL problem or exacerbated by specific training mechanisms. We investigate this question in offline goal-conditioned RL, where data distributions are fixed, and non-stationarity can be explicitly controlled via scheduled shifts in data quality. Additionally, we study varying data qualities under both stationary and non-stationary regimes, and cover two representative algorithms: HIQL (bootstrapped TD-learning) and QRL (quasimetric representation learning). Overall, we observe substantially greater robustness to changes in hyperparameter configurations than commonly reported for online RL, even under controlled non-stationarity. Once modest expert data is present ($\approx$ 20\%), QRL maintains broad, stable near-optimal regions, while HIQL exhibits sharp optima that drift significantly across training phases. To explain this divergence, we introduce an inter-goal gradient alignment diagnostic. We find that bootstrapped objectives exhibit stronger destructive gradient interference, which coincides directly with hyperparameter sensitivity. These results suggest that high sensitivity to changes in hyperparameter configurations during training is not inevitable in RL, but is amplified by the dynamics of bootstrapping, offering a pathway toward more robust algorithmic objective design.
tldr: This paper investigates hyperparameter sensitivity in offline goal-conditioned RL, finding that it's less severe than in online RL, particularly with QRL, and attributes the difference to gradient interference caused by bootstrapping in algorithms like HIQL.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了离线目标条件强化学习中的超参数敏感性，发现它比在线强化学习中的敏感性要低得多，尤其是在 QRL 中。研究表明，其差异归因于自举算法（例如 HIQL）中由自举引起的梯度干扰。
summary_zh: 深度强化学习（RL）中的超参数敏感性通常被认为是不可避免的。然而，它究竟是强化学习问题的内在属性，还是被特定的训练机制所加剧，目前仍不清楚。我们在线下目标条件强化学习中研究了这个问题，其中数据分布是固定的，并且可以通过数据质量的计划性变化来显式地控制非平稳性。此外，我们研究了在平稳和非平稳状态下不同的数据质量，并涵盖了两种具有代表性的算法：HIQL（自举TD学习）和 QRL（准度量表示学习）。总的来说，我们观察到，即使在受控的非平稳性下，对于超参数配置变化的鲁棒性也比通常报道的在线强化学习要高得多。一旦存在适度的专家数据（约 20%），QRL 就能保持广泛、稳定的接近最优区域，而 HIQL 则表现出尖锐的最优值，这些最优值在训练阶段会发生显著漂移。为了解释这种差异，我们引入了一种目标间梯度对齐诊断方法。我们发现，自举目标表现出更强的破坏性梯度干扰，这与超参数敏感性直接相关。这些结果表明，训练期间对超参数配置变化的高度敏感性在强化学习中并非不可避免，而是被自举的动态性所放大，从而为更稳健的算法目标设计提供了途径。

title: Variance Reduction Based Experience Replay for Policy Optimization
summary: Effective reinforcement learning (RL) for complex stochastic systems requires leveraging historical data collected in previous iterations to accelerate policy optimization. Classical experience replay treats all past observations uniformly and fails to account for their varying contributions to learning. To overcome this limitation, we propose Variance Reduction Experience Replay (VRER), a principled framework that selectively reuses informative samples to reduce variance in policy gradient estimation. VRER is algorithm-agnostic and integrates seamlessly with existing policy optimization methods, forming the basis of our sample-efficient off-policy algorithm, Policy Gradient with VRER (PG-VRER). Motivated by the lack of rigorous theoretical analysis of experience replay, we develop a novel framework that explicitly captures dependencies introduced by Markovian dynamics and behavior-policy interactions. Using this framework, we establish finite-time convergence guarantees for PG-VRER and reveal a fundamental bias-variance trade-off: reusing older experience increases bias but simultaneously reduces gradient variance. Extensive empirical experiments demonstrate that VRER consistently accelerates policy learning and improves performance over state-of-the-art policy optimization algorithms.
tldr: This paper introduces Variance Reduction Experience Replay (VRER), a novel experience replay method for policy optimization that selectively reuses informative samples to reduce variance in policy gradient estimation, with theoretical guarantees and demonstrated performance improvements.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的经验回放方法，即方差缩减经验回放(VRER)，用于策略优化。该方法选择性地重用信息丰富的样本以减少策略梯度估计中的方差，并具有理论保证和实验验证的性能提升。
summary_zh: 用于复杂随机系统的有效强化学习 (RL) 需要利用先前迭代中收集的历史数据来加速策略优化。传统的经验回放平等对待所有过去的观察结果，未能考虑到它们对学习的不同贡献。为了克服这一限制，我们提出方差缩减经验回放 (VRER)，这是一个原则性的框架，选择性地重用信息丰富的样本，以减少策略梯度估计中的方差。VRER 算法无关，并能与现有的策略优化方法无缝集成，构成了我们高采样效率的离线策略算法，即带有 VRER 的策略梯度 (PG-VRER) 的基础。由于缺乏对经验回放的严格理论分析，我们开发了一个新颖的框架，明确捕捉由马尔可夫动态和行为策略交互引入的依赖关系。使用该框架，我们为 PG-VRER 建立了有限时间收敛保证，并揭示了一个基本的偏差-方差权衡：重用较早的经验会增加偏差，但同时会减少梯度方差。大量的经验实验表明，VRER 能够始终如一地加速策略学习，并提高优于最先进策略优化算法的性能。

title: Accelerated Sequential Flow Matching: A Bayesian Filtering Perspective
summary: Sequential prediction from streaming observations is a fundamental problem in stochastic dynamical systems, where inherent uncertainty often leads to multiple plausible futures. While diffusion and flow-matching models are capable of modeling complex, multi-modal trajectories, their deployment in real-time streaming environments typically relies on repeated sampling from a non-informative initial distribution, incurring substantial inference latency and potential system backlogs. In this work, we introduce Sequential Flow Matching, a principled framework grounded in Bayesian filtering. By treating streaming inference as learning a probability flow that transports the predictive distribution from one time step to the next, our approach naturally aligns with the recursive structure of Bayesian belief updates. We provide theoretical justification that initializing generation from the previous posterior offers a principled warm start that can accelerate sampling compared to naïve re-sampling. Across a wide range of forecasting, decision-making and state estimation tasks, our method achieves performance competitive with full-step diffusion while requiring only one or very few sampling steps, therefore with faster sampling. It suggests that framing sequential inference via Bayesian filtering provides a new and principled perspective towards efficient real-time deployment of flow-based models.
tldr: This paper introduces Sequential Flow Matching, a Bayesian filtering-based approach to accelerate flow-matching models for real-time sequential prediction by using the previous posterior as a warm start, achieving comparable performance to full-step diffusion with significantly fewer sampling steps.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于贝叶斯滤波的序列流匹配方法，通过将先前的后验分布作为热启动，加速了流匹配模型在实时序列预测中的应用。该方法在只需少量采样步骤的情况下，实现了与全步扩散相当的性能。
summary_zh: 从流式观测数据进行序列预测是随机动态系统中的一个基本问题，其中固有的不确定性通常会导致多个合理的未来。虽然扩散模型和流匹配模型能够建模复杂、多模态的轨迹，但它们在实时流式环境中的部署通常依赖于从非信息性的初始分布重复采样，从而导致大量的推理延迟和潜在的系统积压。在本研究中，我们引入了序列流匹配，这是一个基于贝叶斯滤波的理论框架。通过将流式推理视为学习一种概率流，它将预测分布从一个时间步转移到下一个时间步，我们的方法自然地与贝叶斯信念更新的递归结构对齐。我们提供了理论依据，证明从先前的后验分布开始初始化生成过程，提供了一种有原则的热启动方式，与朴素的重采样相比，能够加速采样过程。在广泛的预测、决策和状态估计任务中，我们的方法在仅需一次或极少采样步骤的情况下，实现了与全步扩散模型相媲美的性能，因此具有更快的采样速度。这表明，通过贝叶斯滤波框架进行序列推理，为基于流模型的有效实时部署提供了一个新的、有原则的视角。

title: Adaptive Exploration for Latent-State Bandits
summary: The multi-armed bandit problem is a core framework for sequential decision-making under uncertainty, but classical algorithms often fail in environments with hidden, time-varying states that confound reward estimation and optimal action selection. We address key challenges arising from unobserved confounders, such as biased reward estimates and limited state information, by introducing a family of state-model-free bandit algorithms that leverage lagged contextual features and coordinated probing strategies. These implicitly track latent states and disambiguate state-dependent reward patterns. Our methods and their adaptive variants can learn optimal policies without explicit state modeling, combining computational efficiency with robust adaptation to non-stationary rewards. Empirical results across diverse settings demonstrate superior performance over classical approaches, and we provide practical recommendations for algorithm selection in real-world applications.
tldr: This paper introduces state-model-free bandit algorithms that use lagged contextual features and probing strategies to handle hidden, time-varying states in multi-armed bandit problems, demonstrating superior performance compared to classical approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种无状态模型的多臂赌博机算法，该算法利用滞后上下文特征和探测策略来处理多臂赌博机问题中隐藏的、时变的隐含状态，并证明了其优于经典方法。
summary_zh: 多臂老虎机问题是具有不确定性的序列决策的核心框架，但经典算法常在具有隐藏的、时变状态的环境中失效，这些状态会混淆奖励估计和最优动作选择。我们通过引入一系列状态模型无关的老虎机算法来解决由未观察到的混淆因素所产生的关键挑战，例如有偏的奖励估计和有限的状态信息。这些算法利用滞后的上下文特征和协调的探测策略，隐式地跟踪潜在状态并消除状态相关的奖励模式的歧义。我们的方法及其自适应变体可以在没有显式状态建模的情况下学习最优策略，将计算效率与对非平稳奖励的稳健适应相结合。在各种设置下的实验结果表明，该方法优于经典方法，并且我们为实际应用中的算法选择提供了实用建议。

title: Residual Reinforcement Learning for Waste-Container Lifting Using Large-Scale Cranes with Underactuated Tools
summary: This paper studies the container lifting phase of a waste-container recycling task in urban environments, performed by a hydraulic loader crane equipped with an underactuated discharge unit, and proposes a residual reinforcement learning (RRL) approach that combines a nominal Cartesian controller with a learned residual policy. All experiments are conducted in simulation, where the task is characterized by tight geometric tolerances between the discharge-unit hooks and the container rings relative to the overall crane scale, making precise trajectory tracking and swing suppression essential. The nominal controller uses admittance control for trajectory tracking and pendulum-aware swing damping, followed by damped least-squares inverse kinematics with a nullspace posture term to generate joint velocity commands. A PPO-trained residual policy in Isaac Lab compensates for unmodeled dynamics and parameter variations, improving precision and robustness without requiring end-to-end learning from scratch. We further employ randomized episode initialization and domain randomization over payload properties, actuator gains, and passive joint parameters to enhance generalization. Simulation results demonstrate improved tracking accuracy, reduced oscillations, and higher lifting success rates compared to the nominal controller alone.
tldr: This paper presents a residual reinforcement learning approach for waste-container lifting with underactuated cranes in simulation, combining a nominal Cartesian controller with a learned residual policy to improve precision and robustness.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种残差强化学习方法，用于在模拟环境中利用欠驱动吊车进行废弃物集装箱起重，该方法将标称笛卡尔坐标控制器与学习到的残差策略相结合，以提高精度和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 本文研究了城市环境中垃圾箱回收任务的集装箱抓取阶段，该阶段由配备欠驱动卸料单元的液压装载机起重机执行。本文提出了一种残差强化学习（RRL）方法，将标称笛卡尔控制器与学习得到的残差策略相结合。所有实验均在仿真环境中进行，该任务的特点是卸料单元挂钩和集装箱环之间的几何公差，相对于起重机整体规模而言非常严格，因此精确的轨迹跟踪和摆动抑制至关重要。标称控制器使用导纳控制进行轨迹跟踪和考虑摆动的摆动阻尼，然后使用带有零空间姿势项的阻尼最小二乘逆运动学来生成关节速度指令。在Isaac Lab中经过PPO训练的残差策略补偿了未建模的动力学和参数变化，提高了精度和鲁棒性，而无需从头开始进行端到端学习。我们进一步采用随机化的episode初始化，并对有效载荷属性、执行器增益和被动关节参数进行域随机化，以增强泛化能力。仿真结果表明，与单独使用标称控制器相比，本文提出的方法提高了跟踪精度，减少了振荡，并提高了抓取成功率。

title: A Data Driven Structural Decomposition of Dynamic Games via Best Response Maps
summary: Dynamic games are powerful tools to model multi-agent decision-making, yet computing Nash (generalized Nash) equilibria remains a central challenge in such settings. Complexity arises from tightly coupled optimality conditions, nested optimization structures, and poor numerical conditioning. Existing game-theoretic solvers address these challenges by directly solving the joint game, typically requiring explicit modeling of all agents' objective functions and constraints, while learning-based approaches often decouple interaction through prediction or policy approximation, sacrificing equilibrium consistency. This paper introduces a conceptually novel formulation for dynamic games by restructuring the equilibrium computation. Rather than solving a fully coupled game or decoupling agents through prediction or policy approximation, a data-driven structural reduction of the game is proposed that removes nested optimization layers and derivative coupling by embedding an offline-compiled best-response map as a feasibility constraint. Under standard regularity conditions, when the best-response operator is exact, any converged solution of the reduced problem corresponds to a local open-loop Nash (GNE) equilibrium of the original game; with a learned surrogate, the solution is approximately equilibrium-consistent up to the best-response approximation error. The proposed formulation is supported by mathematical proofs, accompanying a large-scale Monte Carlo study in a two-player open-loop dynamic game motivated by the autonomous racing problem. Comparisons are made against state-of-the-art joint game solvers, and results are reported on solution quality, computational cost, and constraint satisfaction.
tldr: This paper introduces a data-driven approach to simplify dynamic game equilibrium computation by embedding a pre-computed best-response map as a constraint, reducing complexity and improving computational efficiency compared to traditional methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的方法，通过嵌入预先计算的最佳响应映射作为约束来简化动态博弈均衡计算，与传统方法相比，降低了复杂性并提高了计算效率。
summary_zh: 动态博弈是建模多智能体决策的强大工具，然而，计算纳什（广义纳什）均衡仍然是此类环境下的核心挑战。复杂性源于紧耦合的最优性条件、嵌套的优化结构以及较差的数值条件。现有的博弈论求解器通过直接求解联合博弈来应对这些挑战，通常需要对所有智能体的目标函数和约束进行显式建模，而基于学习的方法通常通过预测或策略近似来解耦交互，牺牲了均衡一致性。本文通过重构均衡计算，为动态博弈引入了一种概念上新颖的公式。与求解完全耦合的博弈或通过预测或策略近似解耦智能体不同，本文提出了一种数据驱动的博弈结构化降维方法，该方法通过嵌入离线编译的最优响应图作为可行性约束，来移除嵌套的优化层和导数耦合。在标准正则性条件下，当最优响应算子是精确的，降维问题的任何收敛解都对应于原始博弈的局部开环纳什（GNE）均衡；对于学习到的替代模型，该解的均衡一致性近似到最优响应的近似误差。数学证明支持了所提出的公式，并伴随着一个受自动驾驶赛车问题驱动的双人开环动态博弈中的大规模蒙特卡罗研究。与最先进的联合博弈求解器进行了比较，并报告了关于解的质量、计算成本和约束满足的结果。

title: PLATO Hand: Shaping Contact Behavior with Fingernails for Precise Manipulation
summary: We present the PLATO Hand, a dexterous robotic hand with a hybrid fingertip that embeds a rigid fingernail within a compliant pulp. This design shapes contact behavior to enable diverse interaction modes across a range of object geometries. We develop a strain-energy-based bending-indentation model to guide the fingertip design and to explain how guided contact preserves local indentation while suppressing global bending. Experimental results show that the proposed robotic hand design demonstrates improved pinching stability, enhanced force observability, and successful execution of edge-sensitive manipulation tasks, including paper singulation, card picking, and orange peeling. Together, these results show that coupling structured contact geometry with a force-motion transparent mechanism provides a principled, physically embodied approach to precise manipulation.
tldr: The PLATO Hand, a novel robotic hand with fingernail-enhanced fingertips, achieves improved pinching stability and precise manipulation via structured contact geometry.
tldr_zh: PLATO手是一个新型的机器人手，其指尖设计结合了指甲，通过结构化的接触几何形状实现了更好的捏持稳定性和精确操作。
summary_zh: 我们提出了PLATO手，一种灵巧的机器人手，其混合指尖将刚性指甲嵌入到柔顺指腹中。这种设计塑造了接触行为，从而能够实现跨越多种物体几何形状的各种交互模式。我们开发了一种基于应变能的弯曲-压入模型，以指导指尖设计，并解释引导接触如何在抑制全局弯曲的同时保持局部压入。实验结果表明，所提出的机器人手设计展示了改进的捏持稳定性、增强的力可观测性以及边缘敏感型操作任务的成功执行，包括纸张分离、卡片拾取和橘子剥皮。综上，这些结果表明，将结构化的接触几何形状与力-运动透明机制相结合，为精确操作提供了一种基于原则的、物理实现的方法。

title: Modelling Pedestrian Behaviour in Autonomous Vehicle Encounters Using Naturalistic Dataset
summary: Understanding how pedestrians adjust their movement when interacting with autonomous vehicles (AVs) is essential for improving safety in mixed traffic. This study examines micro-level pedestrian behaviour during midblock encounters in the NuScenes dataset using a hybrid discrete choice-machine learning framework based on the Residual Logit (ResLogit) model. The model incorporates temporal, spatial, kinematic, and perceptual indicators. These include relative speed, visual looming, remaining distance, and directional collision risk proximity (CRP) measures. Results suggest that some of these variables may meaningfully influence movement adjustments, although predictive performance remains moderate. Marginal effects and elasticities indicate strong directional asymmetries in risk perception, with frontal and rear CRP showing opposite influences. The remaining distance exhibits a possible mid-crossing threshold. Relative speed cues appear to have a comparatively less effect. These patterns may reflect multiple behavioural tendencies driven by both risk perception and movement efficiency.
tldr: This paper models pedestrian behavior during autonomous vehicle encounters using the NuScenes dataset and a hybrid discrete choice-machine learning framework, finding that some variables meaningfully influence movement adjustments, with asymmetries in risk perception.
tldr_zh: 本文使用NuScenes数据集和混合离散选择-机器学习框架，对自动驾驶车辆遭遇中行人行为进行建模分析。研究发现某些变量对行人运动调整有显著影响，且风险感知存在不对称性。
summary_zh: 了解行人在与自动驾驶汽车（AVs）交互时如何调整其运动对于提高混合交通中的安全性至关重要。本研究利用基于残余Logit（ResLogit）模型的混合离散选择-机器学习框架，考察了NuScenes数据集中间路段遭遇期间的微观行人行为。该模型整合了时间、空间、运动学和感知指标，包括相对速度、视觉逼近、剩余距离以及方向性碰撞风险邻近度（CRP）测量。结果表明，这些变量中的一些可能对运动调整产生有意义的影响，尽管预测性能仍然一般。边际效应和弹性表明风险感知中存在强烈的方向不对称性，正面和背面CRP表现出相反的影响。剩余距离表现出一个可能的穿越中阈值。相对速度线索的影响相对较小。这些模式可能反映了由风险感知和运动效率驱动的多种行为倾向。

title: A Framework for Combining Optimization-Based and Analytic Inverse Kinematics
summary: Analytic and optimization methods for solving inverse kinematics (IK) problems have been deeply studied throughout the history of robotics. The two strategies have complementary strengths and weaknesses, but developing a unified approach to take advantage of both methods has proved challenging. A key challenge faced by optimization approaches is the complicated nonlinear relationship between the joint angles and the end-effector pose. When this must be handled concurrently with additional nonconvex constraints like collision avoidance, optimization IK algorithms may suffer high failure rates. We present a new formulation for optimization IK that uses an analytic IK solution as a change of variables, and is fundamentally easier for optimizers to solve. We test our methodology on three popular solvers, representing three different paradigms for constrained nonlinear optimization. Extensive experimental comparisons demonstrate that our new formulation achieves higher success rates than the old formulation and baseline methods across various challenging IK problems, including collision avoidance, grasp selection, and humanoid stability.
tldr: This paper presents a novel inverse kinematics (IK) formulation that combines analytic and optimization methods, demonstrating improved success rates on challenging IK problems compared to existing approaches.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的逆运动学（IK）公式，结合了解析和优化方法，与现有方法相比，在具有挑战性的IK问题上表现出更高的成功率。
summary_zh:
以下是翻译结果：

在机器人学发展历程中，求解逆运动学(IK)问题的解析方法和优化方法都得到了深入的研究。这两种策略优势互补，但开发一种统一的方法来同时利用两者的优势已被证明具有挑战性。优化方法面临的一个关键挑战是关节角度与末端执行器姿态之间复杂的非线性关系。当必须同时处理诸如避障等额外的非凸约束时，优化IK算法可能会有较高的失败率。我们提出了一种新的优化IK公式，它使用解析IK解作为变量的改变，并且从根本上更容易被优化器求解。我们使用三种流行的求解器测试了我们的方法，这些求解器代表了用于约束非线性优化的三种不同范式。大量的实验比较表明，与旧公式和基线方法相比，我们的新公式在各种具有挑战性的IK问题（包括避障、抓取选择和人形机器人稳定性）中都实现了更高的成功率。

title: Verification of the Implicit World Model in a Generative Model via Adversarial Sequences
summary: Generative sequence models are typically trained on sample sequences from natural or formal languages. It is a crucial question whether -- or to what extent -- sample-based training is able to capture the true structure of these languages, often referred to as the ``world model''. Theoretical results indicate that we can hope for soundness at best, that is, generating valid sequences, but not necessarily all of them. However, it is still important to have practical tools that are able to verify whether a given sequence model is sound. In this study, we focus on chess, as it is a domain that provides enough complexity while having a simple rule-based world model. We propose adversarial sequence generation for verifying the soundness of the sequence model. Our adversaries generate valid sequences so as to force the sequence model to generate an invalid next move prediction. Apart from the falsification of soundness, this method is also suitable for a more fine-grained analysis of the failure modes and the effects of different choices during training. To demonstrate this, we propose a number of methods for adversarial sequence generation and evaluate the approach on a large set of chess models. We train models on random as well as high-quality chess games, using several training recipes. We find that none of the models are sound, but some training techniques and dataset choices are able to improve soundness remarkably. We also investigate the potential application of board state probes in both our training and attack methods. Our findings indicate that the extracted board states have no causal role in next token prediction in most of the models.
tldr: This paper presents a method for verifying the soundness of generative sequence models, specifically in the context of chess, by using adversarial sequence generation to force the model to predict invalid moves. The study finds that none of the trained models are fully sound but notes that certain training techniques improve accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种验证生成序列模型可靠性的方法，特别是在象棋领域，通过使用对抗性序列生成来迫使模型预测无效的走法。研究发现，没有一个训练好的模型是完全可靠的，但某些训练技术可以显著提高准确性。
summary_zh: 生成式序列模型通常在来自自然语言或形式语言的样本序列上进行训练。基于样本的训练是否能够捕捉到这些语言的真实结构（通常被称为“世界模型”），以及在何种程度上能够捕捉到，是一个至关重要的问题。理论结果表明，我们最多只能期望模型具有可靠性，即生成有效的序列，但并非能够生成所有有效的序列。然而，拥有能够验证给定序列模型是否可靠的实用工具仍然很重要。在这项研究中，我们专注于国际象棋，因为它是一个在拥有简单的基于规则的世界模型的同时，也提供了足够复杂性的领域。我们提出对抗性序列生成方法来验证序列模型的可靠性。我们的对抗者生成有效的序列，以便迫使序列模型生成无效的下一步预测。除了证伪可靠性之外，该方法还适用于更细粒度地分析故障模式以及训练过程中不同选择的影响。为了证明这一点，我们提出了一系列用于对抗性序列生成的方法，并在大量的国际象棋模型上评估了该方法。我们使用几种训练策略，在随机和高质量的国际象棋棋谱上训练模型。我们发现，没有一个模型是可靠的，但一些训练技术和数据集选择能够显著提高可靠性。我们还研究了棋盘状态探测器在我们训练和攻击方法中的潜在应用。我们的研究结果表明，在大多数模型中，提取的棋盘状态对下一个token的预测没有因果作用。

title: ShapeGaussian: High-Fidelity 4D Human Reconstruction in Monocular Videos via Vision Priors
summary: We introduce ShapeGaussian, a high-fidelity, template-free method for 4D human reconstruction from casual monocular videos. Generic reconstruction methods lacking robust vision priors, such as 4DGS, struggle to capture high-deformation human motion without multi-view cues. While template-based approaches, primarily relying on SMPL, such as HUGS, can produce photorealistic results, they are highly susceptible to errors in human pose estimation, often leading to unrealistic artifacts. In contrast, ShapeGaussian effectively integrates template-free vision priors to achieve both high-fidelity and robust scene reconstructions. Our method follows a two-step pipeline: first, we learn a coarse, deformable geometry using pretrained models that estimate data-driven priors, providing a foundation for reconstruction. Then, we refine this geometry using a neural deformation model to capture fine-grained dynamic details. By leveraging 2D vision priors, we mitigate artifacts from erroneous pose estimation in template-based methods and employ multiple reference frames to resolve the invisibility issue of 2D keypoints in a template-free manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ShapeGaussian surpasses template-based methods in reconstruction accuracy, achieving superior visual quality and robustness across diverse human motions in casual monocular videos.
tldr: ShapeGaussian is a template-free method for high-fidelity 4D human reconstruction from monocular videos, leveraging vision priors and a two-step pipeline to overcome limitations of existing template-based and template-free approaches.
tldr_zh: ShapeGaussian 是一种从单目视频中高保真度重建4D人体的无模板方法，它利用视觉先验和一个两步流程来克服现有基于模板和无模板方法的局限性。
summary_zh: 我们提出 ShapeGaussian，一种高保真、无模板方法，用于从普通单目视频中进行 4D 人体重建。缺乏鲁棒视觉先验的通用重建方法，如 4DGS，在没有多视角线索的情况下难以捕捉高形变的人体运动。虽然基于模板的方法，主要依赖于 SMPL，如 HUGS，可以产生照片般逼真的结果，但它们极易受到人体姿态估计误差的影响，常常导致不真实的伪影。相比之下，ShapeGaussian 有效地整合了无模板的视觉先验，以实现高保真和鲁棒的场景重建。我们的方法遵循一个两步流程：首先，我们使用预训练模型学习一个粗糙的、可变形的几何体，这些模型估计数据驱动的先验，为重建提供基础。然后，我们使用神经变形模型细化该几何体，以捕捉细粒度的动态细节。通过利用 2D 视觉先验，我们减轻了基于模板方法中因错误的姿态估计产生的伪影，并采用多个参考帧来解决无模板方法中 2D 关键点不可见的问题。大量实验表明，ShapeGaussian 在重建精度上超越了基于模板的方法，在普通单目视频中跨越各种人体运动实现了卓越的视觉质量和鲁棒性。

title: NeVStereo: A NeRF-Driven NVS-Stereo Architecture for High-Fidelity 3D Tasks
summary: In modern dense 3D reconstruction, feed-forward systems (e.g., VGGT, pi3) focus on end-to-end matching and geometry prediction but do not explicitly output the novel view synthesis (NVS). Neural rendering-based approaches offer high-fidelity NVS and detailed geometry from posed images, yet they typically assume fixed camera poses and can be sensitive to pose errors. As a result, it remains non-trivial to obtain a single framework that can offer accurate poses, reliable depth, high-quality rendering, and accurate 3D surfaces from casually captured views. We present NeVStereo, a NeRF-driven NVS-stereo architecture that aims to jointly deliver camera poses, multi-view depth, novel view synthesis, and surface reconstruction from multi-view RGB-only inputs. NeVStereo combines NeRF-based NVS for stereo-friendly renderings, confidence-guided multi-view depth estimation, NeRF-coupled bundle adjustment for pose refinement, and an iterative refinement stage that updates both depth and the radiance field to improve geometric consistency. This design mitigated the common NeRF-based issues such as surface stacking, artifacts, and pose-depth coupling. Across indoor, outdoor, tabletop, and aerial benchmarks, our experiments indicate that NeVStereo achieves consistently strong zero-shot performance, with up to 36% lower depth error, 10.4% improved pose accuracy, 4.5% higher NVS fidelity, and state-of-the-art mesh quality (F1 91.93%, Chamfer 4.35 mm) compared to existing prestigious methods.
tldr: NeVStereo is introduced to jointly optimize camera pose estimation, multi-view depth prediction, novel view synthesis, and surface reconstruction from multi-view RGB images using a NeRF-driven architecture, showing state-of-the-art results.
tldr_zh: NeVStereo 提出了一种 NeRF 驱动的新颖视角立体架构，旨在联合优化相机姿态估计、多视角深度预测、新颖视角合成和表面重建，从多视角 RGB 图像中获得，并展示了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 在现代稠密三维重建中，前馈系统（例如，VGGT、pi3）专注于端到端匹配和几何预测，但没有显式输出新视角合成（NVS）。基于神经渲染的方法可以从带位姿的图像中提供高保真度的NVS和精细的几何信息，但它们通常假设固定的相机位姿，并且对位姿误差很敏感。因此，要从随意拍摄的视角中获得能够提供精确位姿、可靠深度、高质量渲染和精确三维表面的单一框架仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了NeVStereo，一种基于NeRF驱动的NVS-立体视觉架构，旨在从多视角RGB输入中联合提供相机位姿、多视角深度、新视角合成和表面重建。NeVStereo结合了基于NeRF的NVS来进行立体友好的渲染，置信度引导的多视角深度估计，NeRF耦合的集束调整用于位姿细化，以及一个迭代细化阶段，该阶段同时更新深度和辐射场以提高几何一致性。这种设计缓解了常见的基于NeRF的问题，例如表面堆叠、伪影和位姿-深度耦合。在室内、室外、桌面和空中基准测试中，我们的实验表明，与现有的著名方法相比，NeVStereo实现了始终如一的强大的零样本性能，深度误差最多降低36%，位姿精度提高10.4%，NVS保真度提高4.5%，并实现了最先进的网格质量（F1 91.93%，Chamfer距离4.35毫米）。

title: Fast-SAM3D: 3Dfy Anything in Images but Faster
summary: SAM3D enables scalable, open-world 3D reconstruction from complex scenes, yet its deployment is hindered by prohibitive inference latency. In this work, we conduct the \textbf{first systematic investigation} into its inference dynamics, revealing that generic acceleration strategies are brittle in this context. We demonstrate that these failures stem from neglecting the pipeline's inherent multi-level \textbf{heterogeneity}: the kinematic distinctiveness between shape and layout, the intrinsic sparsity of texture refinement, and the spectral variance across geometries. To address this, we present \textbf{Fast-SAM3D}, a training-free framework that dynamically aligns computation with instantaneous generation complexity. Our approach integrates three heterogeneity-aware mechanisms: (1) \textit{Modality-Aware Step Caching} to decouple structural evolution from sensitive layout updates; (2) \textit{Joint Spatiotemporal Token Carving} to concentrate refinement on high-entropy regions; and (3) \textit{Spectral-Aware Token Aggregation} to adapt decoding resolution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Fast-SAM3D delivers up to \textbf{2.67$\times$} end-to-end speedup with negligible fidelity loss, establishing a new Pareto frontier for efficient single-view 3D generation. Our code is released in https://github.com/wlfeng0509/Fast-SAM3D.
tldr: The paper introduces Fast-SAM3D, a training-free framework that accelerates single-view 3D generation by addressing multi-level heterogeneity in the SAM3D pipeline, achieving a significant speedup with minimal fidelity loss.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Fast-SAM3D，一个无需训练的框架，通过解决SAM3D pipeline中的多层次异构性来加速单视图3D生成，实现了显著的加速且保真度损失极小。
summary_zh: SAM3D 能够从复杂场景进行可扩展的开放世界 3D 重建，但其部署受到极高的推理延迟的阻碍。在这项工作中，我们对其推理过程进行了**首次系统性研究**，揭示了通用的加速策略在这种情况下是脆弱的。我们证明了这些失败源于忽略了流水线固有的多层**异质性**：形状和布局之间的运动学差异、纹理细化的内在稀疏性以及几何体之间的光谱方差。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 **Fast-SAM3D**，一种无需训练的框架，可以动态地将计算与瞬时生成复杂度对齐。我们的方法集成了三种感知异质性的机制：（1）*模态感知步骤缓存*，将结构演化与敏感布局更新分离；（2）*联合时空令牌雕刻*，将细化集中在高熵区域；（3）*光谱感知令牌聚合*，以适应解码分辨率。大量的实验表明， Fast-SAM3D 提供了高达 **2.67 倍**的端到端加速，并且具有可忽略的保真度损失，从而为高效的单视图 3D 生成建立了一个新的帕累托前沿。我们的代码已在 https://github.com/wlfeng0509/Fast-SAM3D 发布。

title: PoseGaussian: Pose-Driven Novel View Synthesis for Robust 3D Human Reconstruction
summary: We propose PoseGaussian, a pose-guided Gaussian Splatting framework for high-fidelity human novel view synthesis. Human body pose serves a dual purpose in our design: as a structural prior, it is fused with a color encoder to refine depth estimation; as a temporal cue, it is processed by a dedicated pose encoder to enhance temporal consistency across frames. These components are integrated into a fully differentiable, end-to-end trainable pipeline. Unlike prior works that use pose only as a condition or for warping, PoseGaussian embeds pose signals into both geometric and temporal stages to improve robustness and generalization. It is specifically designed to address challenges inherent in dynamic human scenes, such as articulated motion and severe self-occlusion. Notably, our framework achieves real-time rendering at 100 FPS, maintaining the efficiency of standard Gaussian Splatting pipelines. We validate our approach on ZJU-MoCap, THuman2.0, and in-house datasets, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance in perceptual quality and structural accuracy (PSNR 30.86, SSIM 0.979, LPIPS 0.028).
tldr: PoseGaussian introduces a pose-guided Gaussian Splatting framework for high-fidelity novel view synthesis of humans, embedding pose information into both geometric and temporal stages for improved robustness and real-time rendering.
tldr_zh: PoseGaussian 提出了一个姿势引导的高斯溅射框架，用于高保真的人体新视角合成，将姿势信息嵌入到几何和时间阶段，以提高鲁棒性和实时渲染。
summary_zh: 我们提出了PoseGaussian，一个姿态引导的高斯溅射框架，用于高保真的人体新视角合成。在我们的设计中，人体姿态具有双重作用：作为结构先验，它与颜色编码器融合以优化深度估计；作为时间线索，它由一个专门的姿态编码器处理，以增强跨帧的时间一致性。这些组件被集成到一个完全可微的、端到端的可训练流水线中。与仅将姿态用作条件或进行扭曲的先前工作不同，PoseGaussian将姿态信号嵌入到几何和时间阶段，以提高鲁棒性和泛化能力。它专门用于解决动态人体场景中固有的挑战，例如铰接运动和严重的自遮挡。值得注意的是，我们的框架实现了100 FPS的实时渲染，保持了标准高斯溅射流水线的效率。我们在ZJU-MoCap、THuman2.0和内部数据集上验证了我们的方法，证明了其在感知质量和结构精度方面的最先进性能（PSNR 30.86, SSIM 0.979, LPIPS 0.028）。

title: CoWTracker: Tracking by Warping instead of Correlation
summary: Dense point tracking is a fundamental problem in computer vision, with applications ranging from video analysis to robotic manipulation. State-of-the-art trackers typically rely on cost volumes to match features across frames, but this approach incurs quadratic complexity in spatial resolution, limiting scalability and efficiency. In this paper, we propose \method, a novel dense point tracker that eschews cost volumes in favor of warping. Inspired by recent advances in optical flow, our approach iteratively refines track estimates by warping features from the target frame to the query frame based on the current estimate. Combined with a transformer architecture that performs joint spatiotemporal reasoning across all tracks, our design establishes long-range correspondences without computing feature correlations. Our model is simple and achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard dense point tracking benchmarks, including TAP-Vid-DAVIS, TAP-Vid-Kinetics, and Robo-TAP. Remarkably, the model also excels at optical flow, sometimes outperforming specialized methods on the Sintel, KITTI, and Spring benchmarks. These results suggest that warping-based architectures can unify dense point tracking and optical flow estimation.
tldr: The paper introduces CoWTracker, a novel dense point tracker that uses warping instead of cost volumes, achieving state-of-the-art performance in dense point tracking and competitive results in optical flow.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为CoWTracker的新型密集点追踪器，该追踪器使用形变（warping）而非成本体积，在密集点追踪方面取得了最先进的性能，并在光流方面取得了有竞争力的结果。
summary_zh: 密集点跟踪是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，其应用范围涵盖视频分析到机器人操作。当前最先进的跟踪器通常依赖于代价体来实现跨帧的特征匹配，但这种方法在空间分辨率上具有二次复杂度，限制了可扩展性和效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 \method 的新型密集点跟踪器，它摒弃了代价体，转而采用形变。受到光流领域最新进展的启发，我们的方法通过基于当前估计将目标帧的特征扭曲到查询帧，从而迭代地优化轨迹估计。结合一个对所有轨迹执行联合时空推理的 Transformer 架构，我们的设计在不计算特征相关性的情况下建立了长距离对应关系。我们的模型简单，并在标准密集点跟踪基准测试（包括 TAP-Vid-DAVIS、TAP-Vid-Kinetics 和 Robo-TAP）上实现了最先进的性能。值得注意的是，该模型在光流方面也表现出色，有时在 Sintel、KITTI 和 Spring 基准测试上优于专门方法。这些结果表明，基于形变的架构可以统一密集点跟踪和光流估计。

title: UAV Trajectory Optimization via Improved Noisy Deep Q-Network
summary: This paper proposes an Improved Noisy Deep Q-Network (Noisy DQN) to enhance the exploration and stability of Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) when applying deep reinforcement learning in simulated environments. This method enhances the exploration ability by combining the residual NoisyLinear layer with an adaptive noise scheduling mechanism, while improving training stability through smooth loss and soft target network updates. Experiments show that the proposed model achieves faster convergence and up to $+40$ higher rewards compared to standard DQN and quickly reach to the minimum number of steps required for the task 28 in the 15 * 15 grid navigation environment set up. The results show that our comprehensive improvements to the network structure of NoisyNet, exploration control, and training stability contribute to enhancing the efficiency and reliability of deep Q-learning.
tldr: The paper introduces an improved Noisy DQN with adaptive noise scheduling, smooth loss, and soft target updates for UAV trajectory optimization, resulting in faster convergence and higher rewards in a grid navigation environment.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种改进的Noisy DQN，具有自适应噪声调度、平滑损失和软目标更新，用于无人机轨迹优化，从而在网格导航环境中实现更快的收敛和更高的奖励。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种改进的噪声深度Q网络(Noisy DQN)，旨在提高无人机在模拟环境中应用深度强化学习时的探索能力和稳定性。该方法通过将残差NoisyLinear层与自适应噪声调度机制相结合来增强探索能力，并通过平滑损失和软目标网络更新来提高训练稳定性。实验表明，与标准DQN相比，所提出的模型实现了更快的收敛速度，并获得了高达+40的奖励提升，并且在设定的15 * 15网格导航环境中，迅速达到完成任务所需的最小步数28。结果表明，我们对NoisyNet网络结构、探索控制和训练稳定性进行的全面改进有助于提高深度Q学习的效率和可靠性。

title: StagePilot: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Agent for Stage-Controlled Cybergrooming Simulation
summary: Cybergrooming is an evolving threat to youth, necessitating proactive educational interventions. We propose StagePilot, an offline RL-based dialogue agent that simulates the stage-wise progression of grooming behaviors for prevention training. StagePilot selects conversational stages using a composite reward that balances user sentiment and goal proximity, with transitions constrained to adjacent stages for realism and interpretability. We evaluate StagePilot through LLM-based simulations, measuring stage completion, dialogue efficiency, and emotional engagement. Results show that StagePilot generates realistic and coherent conversations aligned with grooming dynamics. Among tested methods, the IQL+AWAC agent achieves the best balance between strategic planning and emotional coherence, reaching the final stage up to 43% more frequently than baselines while maintaining over 70% sentiment alignment.
tldr: The paper introduces StagePilot, an offline RL agent for simulating cybergrooming conversations to train youth on preventative measures. It uses a composite reward and stage-wise constraints to generate realistic dialogues, achieving improved strategic planning and emotional coherence compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了StagePilot，一个离线强化学习代理，用于模拟网络诱骗对话，以训练青少年采取预防措施。它使用复合奖励和阶段性约束来生成逼真的对话，与基线相比，在战略规划和情感连贯性方面有所提高。
summary_zh: 恋童网络诱骗 (Cybergrooming) 对青少年构成一种不断演变的威胁，因此需要积极主动的教育干预。我们提出 StagePilot，一种基于离线强化学习 (RL) 的对话代理，用于模拟诱骗行为的阶段性进展，以进行预防训练。StagePilot 使用复合奖励来选择对话阶段，该奖励平衡用户情感和目标接近度，并且转换被限制在相邻阶段之间，以保证真实性和可解释性。我们通过基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的模拟来评估 StagePilot，测量阶段完成度、对话效率和情感参与度。结果表明，StagePilot 生成符合诱骗动态的真实且连贯的对话。在测试的方法中，IQL+AWAC 代理在战略规划和情感连贯性之间实现了最佳平衡，与基线相比，达到最终阶段的频率提高了 43%，同时保持了超过 70% 的情感一致性。

title: From Bench to Flight: Translating Drone Impact Tests into Operational Safety Limits
summary: Indoor micro-aerial vehicles (MAVs) are increasingly used for tasks that require close proximity to people, yet practitioners lack practical methods to tune motion limits based on measured impact risk. We present an end-to-end, open toolchain that converts benchtop impact tests into deployable safety governors for drones. First, we describe a compact and replicable impact rig and protocol for capturing force-time profiles across drone classes and contact surfaces. Second, we provide data-driven models that map pre-impact speed to impulse and contact duration, enabling direct computation of speed bounds for a target force limit. Third, we release scripts and a ROS2 node that enforce these bounds online and log compliance, with support for facility-specific policies. We validate the workflow on multiple commercial off-the-shelf quadrotors and representative indoor assets, demonstrating that the derived governors preserve task throughput while meeting force constraints specified by safety stakeholders. Our contribution is a practical bridge from measured impacts to runtime limits, with shareable datasets, code, and a repeatable process that teams can adopt to certify indoor MAV operations near humans.
tldr: This paper presents a practical toolchain for converting drone impact tests into operational safety limits, enabling safer indoor drone operation near humans by translating measured impacts into runtime limits.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种实用的工具链，可以将无人机碰撞测试转化为运行安全限制，通过将测量的碰撞转化为运行时限制，实现更安全的人机协同室内无人机操作。
summary_zh: 室内微型飞行器 (MAV) 越来越多地被用于需要近距离接近人群的任务，但从业者缺乏基于测量冲击风险调整运动限制的实用方法。我们提出一个端到端的开放工具链，可以将台式冲击试验转化为可部署的无人机安全调速器。首先，我们描述了一种紧凑且可复制的冲击试验装置和协议，用于捕获不同无人机类别和接触表面的力-时间曲线。其次，我们提供数据驱动的模型，将撞击前速度映射到冲量和接触持续时间，从而能够直接计算目标力限的速度边界。第三，我们发布脚本和一个 ROS2 节点，它们在线执行这些速度边界并记录合规性，同时支持特定设施的策略。我们在多个商用现成四旋翼飞行器和具有代表性的室内资产上验证了该工作流程，证明导出的调速器在满足安全利益相关者指定的力约束的同时，保持了任务吞吐量。我们的贡献是构建了一个从测量冲击到运行时限制的实际桥梁，提供了可共享的数据集、代码和可重复的过程，团队可以采用这些资源来认证在人体附近进行的室内 MAV 操作。
