title: Ontology-Driven Robotic Specification Synthesis
summary: This paper addresses robotic system engineering for safety- and mission-critical applications by bridging the gap between high-level objectives and formal, executable specifications. The proposed method, Robotic System Task to Model Transformation Methodology (RSTM2) is an ontology-driven, hierarchical approach using stochastic timed Petri nets with resources, enabling Monte Carlo simulations at mission, system, and subsystem levels. A hypothetical case study demonstrates how the RSTM2 method supports architectural trades, resource allocation, and performance analysis under uncertainty. Ontological concepts further enable explainable AI-based assistants, facilitating fully autonomous specification synthesis. The methodology offers particular benefits to complex multi-robot systems, such as the NASA CADRE mission, representing decentralized, resource-aware, and adaptive autonomous systems of the future.
tldr: The paper introduces an ontology-driven method (RSTM2) for robotic specification synthesis using stochastic timed Petri nets, enabling Monte Carlo simulations and explainable AI for complex multi-robot systems like NASA CADRE.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种基于本体驱动的机器人规范综合方法 (RSTM2)，它使用随机定时 Petri 网，实现了蒙特卡罗模拟和可解释的 AI，适用于像 NASA CADRE 这样的复杂多机器人系统。
summary_zh: 本文通过弥合高层目标与形式化的可执行规范之间的差距，探讨了用于安全攸关和任务攸关型应用的机器人系统工程。所提出的机器人系统任务到模型转换方法(RSTM2)是一种本体驱动的层级方法，该方法采用带资源的随机时间Petri网，从而能够在任务、系统和子系统级别进行蒙特卡罗模拟。一个假设案例研究演示了RSTM2方法如何支持不确定性下的架构权衡、资源分配和性能分析。本体概念进一步实现了可解释的基于人工智能的助手，从而促进了完全自主的规范合成。该方法为复杂的、多机器人系统提供了特殊的益处，例如NASA CADRE任务，代表了未来去中心化、资源感知和自适应的自主系统。

title: Low-Cost Underwater In-Pipe Centering and Inspection Using a Minimal-Sensing Robot
summary: Autonomous underwater inspection of submerged pipelines is challenging due to confined geometries, turbidity, and the scarcity of reliable localization cues. This paper presents a minimal-sensing strategy that enables a free-swimming underwater robot to center itself and traverse a flooded pipe of known radius using only an IMU, a pressure sensor, and two sonars: a downward-facing single-beam sonar and a rotating 360 degree sonar. We introduce a computationally efficient method for extracting range estimates from single-beam sonar intensity data, enabling reliable wall detection in noisy and reverberant conditions. A closed-form geometric model leverages the two sonar ranges to estimate the pipe center, and an adaptive, confidence-weighted proportional-derivative (PD) controller maintains alignment during traversal. The system requires no Doppler velocity log, external tracking, or complex multi-sensor arrays. Experiments in a submerged 46 cm-diameter pipe using a Blue Robotics BlueROV2 heavy remotely operated vehicle demonstrate stable centering and successful full-pipe traversal despite ambient flow and structural deformations. These results show that reliable in-pipe navigation and inspection can be achieved with a lightweight, computationally efficient sensing and processing architecture, advancing the practicality of autonomous underwater inspection in confined environments.
tldr: This paper presents a low-cost, minimal-sensing strategy for autonomous underwater in-pipe robot navigation using only an IMU, pressure sensor, and two sonars, demonstrating stable centering and successful traversal in a submerged pipe.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文提出了一种低成本、最小传感策略，用于水下管道内自主机器人导航。该方法仅使用IMU、压力传感器和两个声纳，实现了水下管道内的稳定居中和成功穿越。
summary_zh: 水下管道的自主水下检测面临着诸多挑战，包括受限的几何形状、浊度以及可靠定位线索的稀缺性。本文提出了一种极简传感策略，该策略使自由游动的水下机器人仅使用一个IMU、一个压力传感器和两个声纳（一个向下发射的单波束声纳和一个旋转式360度声纳）即可实现自身定位并遍历已知半径的淹没管道。我们介绍了一种计算效率高的方法，用于从单波束声纳强度数据中提取距离估计，从而能够在嘈杂和混响的环境中进行可靠的管道壁检测。一个闭式几何模型利用两个声纳的测距数据来估计管道中心，并且一个自适应的、置信度加权的比例-微分（PD）控制器在遍历过程中保持对齐。该系统不需要多普勒计程仪、外部跟踪或复杂的多传感器阵列。在一个直径为46厘米的淹没管道中使用 Blue Robotics BlueROV2 重型遥控潜水器的实验表明，即使在环境流动和结构变形的情况下，也能实现稳定的定心和成功的全管道遍历。这些结果表明，可以通过轻量级、计算高效的传感和处理架构来实现可靠的管道内导航和检测，从而提高受限环境中自主水下检测的实用性。

title: Informative Path Planning with Guaranteed Estimation Uncertainty
summary:
Environmental monitoring robots often need to reconstruct spatial fields (e.g., salinity, temperature, bathymetry) under tight distance and energy constraints. Classical boustrophedon lawnmower surveys provide geometric coverage guarantees but can waste effort by oversampling predictable regions. In contrast, informative path planning (IPP) methods leverage spatial correlations to reduce oversampling, yet typically offer no guarantees on reconstruction quality. This paper bridges these approaches by addressing informative path planning with guaranteed estimation uncertainty: computing the shortest path whose measurements ensure that the Gaussian-process (GP) posterior variance -- an intrinsic uncertainty measure that lower-bounds the mean-squared prediction error under the GP model -- falls below a user-specified threshold over the monitoring region.
  We propose a three-stage approach: (i) learn a GP model from available prior information; (ii) transform the learned GP kernel into binary coverage maps for each candidate sensing location, indicating which locations' uncertainty can be reduced below a specified target; and (iii) plan a near-shortest route whose combined coverage satisfies the global uncertainty constraint. To address heterogeneous phenomena, we incorporate a nonstationary kernel that captures spatially varying correlation structure, and we accommodate non-convex environments with obstacles. Algorithmically, we present methods with provable approximation guarantees for sensing-location selection and for the joint selection-and-routing problem under a travel budget. Experiments on real-world topographic data show that our planners meet the uncertainty target using fewer sensing locations and shorter travel distances than a recent baseline, and field experiments with bathymetry-mapping autonomous surface and underwater vehicles demonstrate real-world feasibility.
tldr: This paper presents an informative path planning method that guarantees estimation uncertainty by planning a shortest route to ensure Gaussian-process posterior variance falls below a threshold, demonstrating its effectiveness in real-world bathymetry mapping.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种信息丰富的路径规划方法，通过规划最短路径来确保高斯过程后验方差低于阈值，从而保证估计不确定性。在现实世界的测深绘图中验证了其有效性。
summary_zh:
环境监测机器人通常需要在严格的距离和能量约束下重建空间场（例如，盐度、温度、水深）。经典的往复式割草机式巡航提供几何覆盖保证，但通过过度采样可预测区域可能会浪费精力。相比之下，信息路径规划（IPP）方法利用空间相关性来减少过度采样，但通常不提供重建质量的保证。本文通过解决具有保证估计不确定性的信息路径规划来弥合这些方法之间的差距：计算最短路径，其测量结果确保高斯过程（GP）后验方差——一种内在的不确定性度量，其下界在高斯过程模型下的均方预测误差——低于监测区域上用户指定的阈值。

我们提出了一种三阶段方法：（i）从现有的先验信息中学习一个GP模型；（ii）将学习到的GP核转换为每个候选传感位置的二元覆盖图，指示哪些位置的不确定性可以降低到指定的目标以下；（iii）规划出一条近似最短路径，其组合覆盖范围满足全局不确定性约束。为了解决异构现象，我们结合了一个非平稳核，该核捕获空间变化的关联结构，并且我们适应了具有障碍物的非凸环境。在算法上，我们提出了具有可证明的近似保证的方法，用于传感位置选择以及旅行预算下的联合选择和路径规划问题。对真实地形数据的实验表明，我们的规划器使用比最近的基线更少的传感位置和更短的旅行距离来满足不确定性目标，并且使用水深测绘自主水面和水下车辆进行的现场实验证明了现实世界的可行性。

title: Signal or 'Noise': Human Reactions to Robot Errors in the Wild
summary: In the real world, robots frequently make errors, yet little is known about people's social responses to errors outside of lab settings. Prior work has shown that social signals are reliable and useful for error management in constrained interactions, but it is unclear if this holds in the real world - especially with a non-social robot in repeated and group interactions with successive or propagated errors. To explore this, we built a coffee robot and conducted a public field deployment ($N = 49$). We found that participants consistently expressed varied social signals in response to errors and other stimuli, particularly during group interactions. Our findings suggest that social signals in the wild are rich (with participants volunteering information about the interaction), but "noisy." We discuss lessons, benefits, and challenges for using social signals in real-world HRI.
tldr: This paper investigates human social responses to robot errors in a real-world coffee-making robot deployment, finding rich but 'noisy' social signals, highlighting challenges and benefits for real-world HRI.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了现实环境中人们对咖啡机器人错误的社会反应，发现社会信号丰富但“嘈杂”，强调了现实人机交互的挑战和益处。
summary_zh: 在现实世界中，机器人经常犯错，但人们在实验室环境之外对机器人错误的社会反应知之甚少。先前的研究表明，在受限交互中，社会信号对于错误管理是可靠且有用的，但尚不清楚这是否适用于现实世界，尤其是在与非社交型机器人的重复交互以及连续或传播错误的群体交互中。为了探索这一点，我们构建了一台咖啡机器人并进行了公开的实地部署（N = 49）。我们发现，参与者在响应错误和其他刺激时，始终如一地表达出各种社会信号，尤其是在群体交互期间。我们的发现表明，现实环境中的社会信号是丰富的（参与者主动提供有关交互的信息），但同时也是“嘈杂的”。我们讨论了在现实世界人机交互（HRI）中使用社会信号的经验教训、益处和挑战。

title: Quantum Reinforcement Learning with Transformers for the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem
summary: This paper addresses the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) by comparing classical and quantum Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches. An Advantage Actor-Critic (A2C) agent is implemented in classical, full quantum, and hybrid variants, integrating transformer architectures to capture the relationships between vehicles, clients, and the depot through self- and cross-attention mechanisms. The experiments focus on multi-vehicle scenarios with capacity constraints, considering 20 clients and 4 vehicles, and are conducted over ten independent runs. Performance is assessed using routing distance, route compactness, and route overlap. The results show that all three approaches are capable of learning effective routing policies. However, quantum-enhanced models outperform the classical baseline and produce more robust route organization, with the hybrid architecture achieving the best overall performance across distance, compactness, and route overlap. In addition to quantitative improvements, qualitative visualizations reveal that quantum-based models generate more structured and coherent routing solutions. These findings highlight the potential of hybrid quantum-classical reinforcement learning models for addressing complex combinatorial optimization problems such as the CVRP.
tldr: This paper explores classical, full quantum, and hybrid quantum-classical reinforcement learning (RL) A2C agents with transformer architectures for solving the Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP), with the hybrid quantum-classical approach showing the best results.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用带有 Transformer 架构的经典、全量子和混合量子-经典强化学习 (RL) A2C 智能体来解决容量车辆路径问题 (CVRP)，其中混合量子-经典方法表现出最好的结果。
summary_zh: 本文通过比较经典和量子强化学习（RL）方法来解决带容量约束的车辆路径问题（CVRP）。优势行动者-评论家（A2C）智能体以经典、全量子和混合变体的形式实现，集成了Transformer架构，通过自注意力和交叉注意力机制捕捉车辆、客户和仓库之间的关系。实验重点关注具有容量约束的多车辆场景，考虑了20个客户和4辆车辆，并进行了十次独立运行。性能评估指标包括路径距离、路线紧凑性和路线重叠度。结果表明，所有三种方法都能够学习有效的路径策略。然而，量子增强模型优于经典基线，并产生更稳健的路线组织，其中混合架构在距离、紧凑性和路线重叠度方面实现了最佳整体性能。除了定量改进外，定性可视化还表明，基于量子的模型生成了更结构化和连贯的路径解决方案。这些发现突显了混合量子-经典强化学习模型在解决复杂组合优化问题（如CVRP）方面的潜力。

title: Cross-talk based multi-task learning for fault classification of physically coupled machine system
summary: Machine systems inherently generate signals in which fault conditions and various physical variables are physically coupled. Although many existing fault classification studies rely solely on direct fault labels, the aforementioned signals naturally embed additional information shaped by other physically coupled information. Herein, we leverage this coupling through a multi-task learning (MTL) framework that jointly learns fault conditions and the related physical variables. Among MTL architectures, crosstalk structures have distinct advantages because they allow for controlled information exchange between tasks through the cross-talk layer while preventing negative transfer, in contrast to shared trunk architectures that often mix incompatible features. We build on our previously introduced residual neural dimension reductor model, and extend its application to two benchmarks where physical coupling is prominent. The first benchmark is a drone fault dataset, in which machine type and maneuvering direction significantly alter the frequency components of measured signals even under the same nominal condition. By learning fault classification together with these physical attributes, the cross-talk architecture can better classify faults. The second benchmark dataset is the motor compound fault dataset. In this system, each fault component, inner race fault, outer race fault, misalignment, and unbalance is coupled to the other. For motor compound fault, we also test classification performance when we use single-channel data or multi-channel data as input to the classifier. Across both benchmarks, our residual neural dimension reductor, consistently outperformed single-task models, multi-class models that merge all label combinations, and shared trunk multi-task models.
tldr: The paper presents a multi-task learning (MTL) framework with a crosstalk architecture for fault classification in machine systems, leveraging physically coupled signals to improve performance compared to single-task and shared-trunk MTL models.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于机器系统故障分类的多任务学习（MTL）框架，该框架采用交叉结构，利用物理耦合信号来提高性能，优于单任务和共享主干 MTL 模型。
summary_zh: 机器系统本质上会产生信号，在这些信号中，故障状态和各种物理变量在物理上是耦合的。尽管许多现有的故障分类研究仅依赖直接的故障标签，但上述信号自然地嵌入了由其他物理耦合信息塑造的额外信息。在此，我们利用这种耦合，通过一个多任务学习（MTL）框架，联合学习故障状态和相关的物理变量。在MTL架构中，串扰结构具有独特的优势，因为它们允许通过串扰层控制任务之间信息交流，同时防止负迁移，这与经常混合不兼容特征的共享主干架构形成对比。我们基于先前引入的残差神经降维模型，并将其应用扩展到两个物理耦合显著的基准测试。第一个基准是无人机故障数据集，即使在相同的标称条件下，机器类型和操纵方向也会显著改变测量信号的频率分量。通过将故障分类与这些物理属性一起学习，串扰架构可以更好地对故障进行分类。第二个基准数据集是电机复合故障数据集。在该系统中，每个故障分量，内圈故障、外圈故障、不对中和不平衡都与其他分量耦合。对于电机复合故障，我们还测试了当使用单通道数据或多通道数据作为分类器的输入时，分类性能。在两个基准测试中，我们的残差神经降维器始终优于单任务模型、合并所有标签组合的多类模型和共享主干多任务模型。

title: NVS-HO: A Benchmark for Novel View Synthesis of Handheld Objects
summary: We propose NVS-HO, the first benchmark designed for novel view synthesis of handheld objects in real-world environments using only RGB inputs. Each object is recorded in two complementary RGB sequences: (1) a handheld sequence, where the object is manipulated in front of a static camera, and (2) a board sequence, where the object is fixed on a ChArUco board to provide accurate camera poses via marker detection. The goal of NVS-HO is to learn a NVS model that captures the full appearance of an object from (1), whereas (2) provides the ground-truth images used for evaluation. To establish baselines, we consider both a classical SfM pipeline and a state-of-the-art pre-trained feed-forward neural network (VGGT) as pose estimators, and train NVS models based on NeRF and Gaussian Splatting. Our experiments reveal significant performance gaps in current methods under unconstrained handheld conditions, highlighting the need for more robust approaches. NVS-HO thus offers a challenging real-world benchmark to drive progress in RGB-based novel view synthesis of handheld objects.
tldr: The paper introduces NVS-HO, a new RGB-based benchmark for novel view synthesis of handheld objects in real-world environments, designed to evaluate and improve NVS models under unconstrained handheld conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了NVS-HO，一个新的基于RGB的基准测试，用于在真实环境中手持物体的novel view synthesis，旨在评估和改进在无约束手持条件下的NVS模型。
summary_zh: 我们提出了NVS-HO，这是首个专门用于手持物体在真实世界环境中进行新视角合成的基准数据集，仅使用RGB输入。每个物体都通过两个互补的RGB序列进行记录：(1) 手持序列，物体在静态相机前被操作；(2) 板序列，物体固定在ChArUco板上，通过标记检测提供精确的相机位姿。NVS-HO的目标是从(1)中学习能够捕捉物体完整外观的NVS模型，而(2)提供用于评估的真值图像。为了建立基线，我们考虑了经典的SfM流程和最先进的预训练前馈神经网络（VGGT）作为位姿估计器，并基于NeRF和高斯溅射训练NVS模型。我们的实验揭示了当前方法在无约束手持条件下存在显著的性能差距，突出了对更为稳健方法的需求。因此，NVS-HO提供了一个具有挑战性的真实世界基准，用于推动基于RGB的手持物体新视角合成的进展。

title: Neuro-Inspired Visual Pattern Recognition via Biological Reservoir Computing
summary: In this paper, we present a neuro-inspired approach to reservoir computing (RC) in which a network of in vitro cultured cortical neurons serves as the physical reservoir. Rather than relying on artificial recurrent models to approximate neural dynamics, our biological reservoir computing (BRC) system leverages the spontaneous and stimulus-evoked activity of living neural circuits as its computational substrate. A high-density multi-electrode array (HD-MEA) provides simultaneous stimulation and readout across hundreds of channels: input patterns are delivered through selected electrodes, while the remaining ones capture the resulting high-dimensional neural responses, yielding a biologically grounded feature representation. A linear readout layer (single-layer perceptron) is then trained to classify these reservoir states, enabling the living neural network to perform static visual pattern-recognition tasks within a computer-vision framework. We evaluate the system across a sequence of tasks of increasing difficulty, ranging from pointwise stimuli to oriented bars, clock-digit-like shapes, and handwritten digits from the MNIST dataset. Despite the inherent variability of biological neural responses-arising from noise, spontaneous activity, and inter-session differences-the system consistently generates high-dimensional representations that support accurate classification. These results demonstrate that in vitro cortical networks can function as effective reservoirs for static visual pattern recognition, opening new avenues for integrating living neural substrates into neuromorphic computing frameworks. More broadly, this work contributes to the effort to incorporate biological principles into machine learning and supports the goals of neuro-inspired vision by illustrating how living neural systems can inform the design of efficient and biologically grounded computational models.
tldr: This paper presents a neuro-inspired reservoir computing approach using in vitro cultured cortical neurons as a physical reservoir for visual pattern recognition, demonstrating accurate classification on various tasks including MNIST.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种神经启发式的储备池计算方法，使用体外培养的皮层神经元作为物理储备池，用于视觉模式识别，并在包括MNIST在内的各种任务上展示了准确的分类。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种神经启发的储层计算(RC)方法，其中体外培养的皮层神经元网络充当物理储层。我们的生物储层计算(BRC)系统不依赖于人工循环模型来近似神经动力学，而是利用活体神经回路的自发和刺激诱发活动作为其计算基质。高密度多电极阵列(HD-MEA)提供跨数百个通道的同步刺激和读出：输入模式通过选定的电极传递，而剩余的电极捕获由此产生的高维神经响应，从而产生生物学意义上的特征表示。然后训练线性读出层（单层感知器）来分类这些储层状态，使活体神经网络能够在计算机视觉框架内执行静态视觉模式识别任务。我们在一系列难度递增的任务中评估该系统，范围从点状刺激到定向条、类似时钟数字的形状以及来自MNIST数据集的手写数字。尽管生物神经反应具有固有的变异性——源于噪声、自发活动和会话间差异——该系统始终如一地生成支持准确分类的高维表示。这些结果表明，体外皮层网络可以用作静态视觉模式识别的有效储层，为将活体神经基质整合到神经形态计算框架中开辟了新的途径。更广泛地说，这项工作有助于将生物学原理融入机器学习的努力，并通过展示活体神经系统如何为高效且具有生物学意义的计算模型的设计提供信息，来支持神经启发式视觉的目标。

title: Depth as Prior Knowledge for Object Detection
summary: Detecting small and distant objects remains challenging for object detectors due to scale variation, low resolution, and background clutter. Safety-critical applications require reliable detection of these objects for safe planning. Depth information can improve detection, but existing approaches require complex, model-specific architectural modifications. We provide a theoretical analysis followed by an empirical investigation of the depth-detection relationship. Together, they explain how depth causes systematic performance degradation and why depth-informed supervision mitigates it. We introduce DepthPrior, a framework that uses depth as prior knowledge rather than as a fused feature, providing comparable benefits without modifying detector architectures. DepthPrior consists of Depth-Based Loss Weighting (DLW) and Depth-Based Loss Stratification (DLS) during training, and Depth-Aware Confidence Thresholding (DCT) during inference. The only overhead is the initial cost of depth estimation. Experiments across four benchmarks (KITTI, MS COCO, VisDrone, SUN RGB-D) and two detectors (YOLOv11, EfficientDet) demonstrate the effectiveness of DepthPrior, achieving up to +9% mAP$_S$ and +7% mAR$_S$ for small objects, with inference recovery rates as high as 95:1 (true vs. false detections). DepthPrior offers these benefits without additional sensors, architectural changes, or performance costs. Code is available at https://github.com/mos-ks/DepthPrior.
tldr: The paper introduces DepthPrior, a framework that leverages depth information as prior knowledge to improve the detection of small and distant objects without modifying detector architectures, achieving significant improvements in mAP and mAR on several benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为DepthPrior的框架，该框架利用深度信息作为先验知识来提高小而远物体的检测，无需修改检测器架构，并在多个基准测试中实现了mAP和mAR的显著提升。
summary_zh: 检测小而远的目标对于目标检测器来说仍然具有挑战性，这归咎于尺度变化、低分辨率和背景杂乱。安全攸关的应用需要可靠地检测这些目标以实现安全规划。深度信息可以提升检测性能，但现有的方法需要复杂的、特定于模型的架构修改。我们提供了一个理论分析，并对深度-检测关系进行了实证研究。它们共同解释了深度如何导致系统性的性能下降，以及深度相关的监督为何能够缓解它。我们引入了DepthPrior，一个将深度作为先验知识而非融合特征的框架，在不修改检测器架构的情况下提供可比的益处。DepthPrior由训练期间的基于深度的损失加权（DLW）和基于深度的损失分层（DLS）组成，以及推理期间的深度感知置信度阈值（DCT）组成。唯一的开销是初始的深度估计成本。在四个基准数据集（KITTI、MS COCO、VisDrone、SUN RGB-D）和两个检测器（YOLOv11、EfficientDet）上的实验证明了DepthPrior的有效性，对于小目标，最高可达到+9% mAP$_S$ 和 +7% mAR$_S$，真假检测的推理恢复率高达95:1。DepthPrior在无需额外传感器、架构变更或性能成本的情况下提供了这些优势。代码可在https://github.com/mos-ks/DepthPrior获得。

title: Geometric Observability Index: An Operator-Theoretic Framework for Per-Feature Sensitivity, Weak Observability, and Dynamic Effects in SE(3) Pose Estimation
summary:
We present a unified operator-theoretic framework for analyzing per-feature sensitivity in camera pose estimation on the Lie group SE(3). Classical sensitivity tools - conditioning analyses, Euclidean perturbation arguments, and Fisher information bounds - do not explain how individual image features influence the pose estimate, nor why dynamic or inconsistent observations can disproportionately distort modern SLAM and structure-from-motion systems. To address this gap, we extend influence function theory to matrix Lie groups and derive an intrinsic perturbation operator for left-trivialized M-estimators on SE(3).
  The resulting Geometric Observability Index (GOI) quantifies the contribution of a single measurement through the curvature operator and the Lie algebraic structure of the observable subspace. GOI admits a spectral decomposition along the principal directions of the observable curvature, revealing a direct correspondence between weak observability and amplified sensitivity. In the population regime, GOI coincides with the Fisher information geometry on SE(3), yielding a single-measurement analogue of the Cramer-Rao bound.
  The same spectral mechanism explains classical degeneracies such as pure rotation and vanishing parallax, as well as dynamic feature amplification along weak curvature directions. Overall, GOI provides a geometrically consistent description of measurement influence that unifies conditioning analysis, Fisher information geometry, influence function theory, and dynamic scene detectability through the spectral geometry of the curvature operator. Because these quantities arise directly within Gauss-Newton pipelines, the curvature spectrum and GOI also yield lightweight, training-free diagnostic signals for identifying dynamic features and detecting weak observability configurations without modifying existing SLAM architectures.
tldr: This paper introduces the Geometric Observability Index (GOI), a novel operator-theoretic framework for analyzing per-feature sensitivity and weak observability in SE(3) pose estimation, potentially enabling better understanding and diagnosis of SLAM system behavior.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了几何可观测性指数（GOI），这是一个新颖的算子理论框架，用于分析SE(3)姿态估计中的每个特征的敏感性和弱可观测性，有可能更好地理解和诊断 SLAM 系统的行为。
summary_zh:
我们提出了一个统一的算子理论框架，用于分析李群SE(3)上相机姿态估计中各个特征的敏感性。经典的敏感性工具——条件分析、欧几里得扰动论证和费希尔信息界——无法解释各个图像特征如何影响姿态估计，也无法解释为什么动态或不一致的观测会过度扭曲现代SLAM和由结构推运动系统。为了弥补这一差距，我们将影响函数理论扩展到矩阵李群，并推导出SE(3)上左不变M-估计器的固有扰动算子。

由此产生的几何可观测性指标(GOI)通过曲率算子和可观测子空间的李代数结构来量化单个测量的贡献。GOI允许沿可观测曲率的主方向进行谱分解，揭示了弱可观测性和放大的敏感性之间的直接对应关系。在总体机制中，GOI与SE(3)上的费希尔信息几何重合，产生克拉美-罗界的单次测量模拟。

同样的谱机制解释了经典的退化现象，例如纯旋转和消失的视差，以及沿弱曲率方向的动态特征放大。总而言之，GOI提供了一种几何一致的测量影响描述，它通过曲率算子的谱几何统一了条件分析、费希尔信息几何、影响函数理论和动态场景可检测性。由于这些量直接出现在高斯-牛顿流程中，曲率谱和GOI也产生了轻量级的、无需训练的诊断信号，用于识别动态特征和检测弱可观测性配置，而无需修改现有的SLAM架构。

title: A Comparative Study of 3D Person Detection: Sensor Modalities and Robustness in Diverse Indoor and Outdoor Environments
summary: Accurate 3D person detection is critical for safety in applications such as robotics, industrial monitoring, and surveillance. This work presents a systematic evaluation of 3D person detection using camera-only, LiDAR-only, and camera-LiDAR fusion. While most existing research focuses on autonomous driving, we explore detection performance and robustness in diverse indoor and outdoor scenes using the JRDB dataset. We compare three representative models - BEVDepth (camera), PointPillars (LiDAR), and DAL (camera-LiDAR fusion) - and analyze their behavior under varying occlusion and distance levels. Our results show that the fusion-based approach consistently outperforms single-modality models, particularly in challenging scenarios. We further investigate robustness against sensor corruptions and misalignments, revealing that while DAL offers improved resilience, it remains sensitive to sensor misalignment and certain LiDAR-based corruptions. In contrast, the camera-based BEVDepth model showed the lowest performance and was most affected by occlusion, distance, and noise. Our findings highlight the importance of utilizing sensor fusion for enhanced 3D person detection, while also underscoring the need for ongoing research to address the vulnerabilities inherent in these systems.
tldr: This paper compares camera-only, LiDAR-only, and camera-LiDAR fusion methods for 3D person detection in diverse indoor and outdoor environments, highlighting the benefits of sensor fusion but also its sensitivity to sensor issues.
tldr_zh: 本文比较了仅使用相机、仅使用激光雷达以及相机-激光雷达融合方法进行3D人体检测，重点强调了传感器融合的优势，但也指出了其对传感器问题的敏感性。
summary_zh: 在机器人、工业监控和安防等应用中，精准的3D人体检测对于保障安全至关重要。本研究系统性地评估了仅使用相机、仅使用激光雷达以及相机-激光雷达融合的3D人体检测。与现有大多专注于自动驾驶的研究不同，我们使用JRDB数据集探索了不同室内外场景下的检测性能和鲁棒性。我们比较了三个具有代表性的模型——BEVDepth（相机）、PointPillars（激光雷达）和DAL（相机-激光雷达融合）——并分析了它们在不同遮挡和距离水平下的表现。结果表明，基于融合的方法始终优于单模态模型，尤其是在具有挑战性的场景中。我们进一步研究了针对传感器损坏和未对准的鲁棒性，结果显示DAL虽然提供了更高的抗干扰能力，但对传感器未对准和某些基于激光雷达的损坏依然敏感。相比之下，基于相机的BEVDepth模型表现最差，且受遮挡、距离和噪声的影响最大。我们的发现强调了利用传感器融合来增强3D人体检测的重要性，同时也强调了持续研究以解决这些系统中固有漏洞的必要性。

title: UniTrack: Differentiable Graph Representation Learning for Multi-Object Tracking
summary: We present UniTrack, a plug-and-play graph-theoretic loss function designed to significantly enhance multi-object tracking (MOT) performance by directly optimizing tracking-specific objectives through unified differentiable learning. Unlike prior graph-based MOT methods that redesign tracking architectures, UniTrack provides a universal training objective that integrates detection accuracy, identity preservation, and spatiotemporal consistency into a single end-to-end trainable loss function, enabling seamless integration with existing MOT systems without architectural modifications. Through differentiable graph representation learning, UniTrack enables networks to learn holistic representations of motion continuity and identity relationships across frames. We validate UniTrack across diverse tracking models and multiple challenging benchmarks, demonstrating consistent improvements across all tested architectures and datasets including Trackformer, MOTR, FairMOT, ByteTrack, GTR, and MOTE. Extensive evaluations show up to 53\% reduction in identity switches and 12\% IDF1 improvements across challenging benchmarks, with GTR achieving peak performance gains of 9.7\% MOTA on SportsMOT.
tldr: UniTrack introduces a differentiable graph-theoretic loss function that enhances MOT performance by optimizing tracking objectives within a unified, end-to-end trainable framework, demonstrating significant improvements across various tracking models and benchmarks without requiring architectural changes.
tldr_zh: UniTrack 引入了一个可微的图论损失函数，通过在一个统一的、端到端可训练的框架内优化跟踪目标，从而提高 MOT 性能，并在各种跟踪模型和基准测试中展示了显着改进，而无需架构更改。
summary_zh: 我们提出了 UniTrack，一个即插即用的图论损失函数，旨在通过统一的可微学习直接优化跟踪特定目标，从而显著提升多目标跟踪 (MOT) 性能。与以往重新设计跟踪架构的基于图的 MOT 方法不同，UniTrack 提供了一个通用的训练目标，将检测精度、身份保持和时空一致性集成到一个单一的端到端可训练的损失函数中，无需架构修改即可与现有 MOT 系统无缝集成。通过可微图表示学习，UniTrack 使网络能够学习跨帧的运动连续性和身份关系的整体表示。我们在各种跟踪模型和多个具有挑战性的基准测试上验证了 UniTrack，证明了在所有测试的架构和数据集（包括 Trackformer、MOTR、FairMOT、ByteTrack、GTR 和 MOTE）上的一致改进。广泛的评估显示，在具有挑战性的基准测试中，身份切换减少高达 53%，IDF1 提升高达 12%，其中 GTR 在 SportsMOT 上实现了 9.7% 的 MOTA 峰值性能提升。

title: A Simple Reduction Scheme for Constrained Contextual Bandits with Adversarial Contexts via Regression
summary: We study constrained contextual bandits (CCB) with adversarially chosen contexts, where each action yields a random reward and incurs a random cost. We adopt the standard realizability assumption: conditioned on the observed context, rewards and costs are drawn independently from fixed distributions whose expectations belong to known function classes. We consider the continuing setting, in which the algorithm operates over the entire horizon even after the budget is exhausted. In this setting, the objective is to simultaneously control regret and cumulative constraint violation. Building on the seminal SquareCB framework of Foster et al. (2018), we propose a simple and modular algorithmic scheme that leverages online regression oracles to reduce the constrained problem to a standard unconstrained contextual bandit problem with adaptively defined surrogate reward functions. In contrast to most prior work on CCB, which focuses on stochastic contexts, our reduction yields improved guarantees for the more general adversarial context setting, together with a compact and transparent analysis.
tldr: The paper proposes a simple reduction scheme for constrained contextual bandits with adversarial contexts, leveraging online regression oracles to transform the problem into an unconstrained one. This approach aims to improve guarantees over existing methods, especially in adversarial context settings.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种针对具有对抗性上下文的约束上下文bandit问题的简化方案，利用在线回归预言机将该问题转化为一个无约束问题。该方法旨在改进现有方法的保证，尤其是在对抗性上下文的设置中。
summary_zh: 我们研究了带对抗选择上下文的约束上下文老虎机（CCB）问题，其中每个动作都会产生一个随机奖励并招致一个随机成本。我们采用标准的可实现性假设：在观察到的上下文条件下，奖励和成本独立地从固定分布中抽取，且这些分布的期望属于已知的函数类。我们考虑持续性设置，在该设置中，即使预算耗尽，算法也会在整个期限内运行。在此设置中，目标是同时控制后悔值和累积约束违反。基于Foster等 (2018) 开创性的 SquareCB 框架，我们提出了一种简单且模块化的算法方案，该方案利用在线回归预言机将约束问题简化为具有自适应定义的替代奖励函数的标准无约束上下文老虎机问题。与大多数先前关于 CCB 的工作（侧重于随机上下文）不同，我们的简化为更普遍的对抗上下文设置提供了改进的保证，以及一个紧凑且透明的分析。

title: Virtual-Tube-Based Cooperative Transport Control for Multi-UAV Systems in Constrained Environments
summary: This paper proposes a novel control framework for cooperative transportation of cable-suspended loads by multiple unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) operating in constrained environments. Leveraging virtual tube theory and principles from dissipative systems theory, the framework facilitates efficient multi-UAV collaboration for navigating obstacle-rich areas. The proposed framework offers several key advantages. (1) It achieves tension distribution and coordinated transportation within the UAV-cable-load system with low computational overhead, dynamically adapting UAV configurations based on obstacle layouts to facilitate efficient navigation. (2) By integrating dissipative systems theory, the framework ensures high stability and robustness, essential for complex multi-UAV operations. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is validated through extensive simulations, demonstrating its scalability for large-scale multi-UAV systems. Furthermore, the method is experimentally validated in outdoor scenarios, showcasing its practical feasibility and robustness under real-world conditions.
tldr: This paper introduces a virtual-tube-based control framework, enhanced by dissipative systems theory, for cooperative load transportation by multi-UAV systems in complex environments. Simulation and outdoor experiments validate its efficiency, stability, and robustness.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟管道的控制框架，并结合耗散系统理论，用于多无人机系统在复杂环境中协同运输负载。通过仿真和户外实验验证了该框架的效率、稳定性和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新的控制框架，用于在受限环境中通过多个无人机（UAV）协同搬运绳索悬挂负载。该框架利用虚拟管道理论和耗散系统理论的原理，促进了多无人机高效协作，以导航通过障碍物丰富的区域。所提出的框架具有几个关键优势。(1) 它实现了无人机-绳索-负载系统中张力分配和协同运输，且计算开销低，并根据障碍物布局动态调整无人机配置，以促进高效导航。(2) 通过整合耗散系统理论，该框架确保了高稳定性和鲁棒性，这对于复杂的多无人机操作至关重要。通过大量的仿真验证了所提出方法的有效性，证明了其对大规模多无人机系统的可扩展性。此外，该方法还在室外场景中进行了实验验证，展示了其在真实条件下实际可行性和鲁棒性。

title: Beyond Manual Planning: Seating Allocation for Large Organizations
summary: We introduce the Hierarchical Seating Allocation Problem (HSAP) which addresses the optimal assignment of hierarchically structured organizational teams to physical seating arrangements on a floor plan. This problem is driven by the necessity for large organizations with large hierarchies to ensure that teams with close hierarchical relationships are seated in proximity to one another, such as ensuring a research group occupies a contiguous area. Currently, this problem is managed manually leading to infrequent and suboptimal replanning efforts. To alleviate this manual process, we propose an end-to-end framework to solve the HSAP. A scalable approach to calculate the distance between any pair of seats using a probabilistic road map (PRM) and rapidly-exploring random trees (RRT) which is combined with heuristic search and dynamic programming approach to solve the HSAP using integer programming. We demonstrate our approach under different sized instances by evaluating the PRM framework and subsequent allocations both quantitatively and qualitatively.
tldr: The paper introduces a framework to automate seating allocation for large, hierarchical organizations by optimizing team proximity using PRM, RRT, heuristic search, and dynamic programming with integer programming.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种用于大型层级组织的自动座位分配框架，通过使用概率路标法（PRM）、快速扩展随机树（RRT）、启发式搜索和动态规划与整数规划相结合的方式，优化团队的邻近度。
summary_zh: 本文引入了层级座位分配问题（HSAP），该问题旨在将具有层级结构的组织团队优化分配到楼层平面图中的物理座位安排上。大型且具有庞大层级结构的公司迫切需要确保具有紧密层级关系的团队彼此相邻就坐，例如确保一个研究小组占据一个连续区域，从而驱动了该问题的研究。目前，这个问题主要通过人工管理，导致座位重新规划的频率较低且效果欠佳。为了缓解这种人工过程，我们提出了一种端到端的框架来解决HSAP。该框架结合了基于概率路图（PRM）和快速探索随机树（RRT）的可扩展方法来计算任意两个座位之间的距离，并采用启发式搜索和动态规划方法，利用整数规划来解决HSAP。我们通过定量和定性地评估PRM框架和后续分配方案，在不同规模的实例上展示了我们的方法。

title: Thermodynamic Limits of Physical Intelligence
summary: Modern AI systems achieve remarkable capabilities at the cost of substantial energy consumption. To connect intelligence to physical efficiency, we propose two complementary bits-per-joule metrics under explicit accounting conventions: (1) Thermodynamic Epiplexity per Joule -- bits of structural information about a theoretical environment-instance variable newly encoded in an agent's internal state per unit measured energy within a stated boundary -- and (2) Empowerment per Joule -- the embodied sensorimotor channel capacity (control information) per expected energetic cost over a fixed horizon. These provide two axes of physical intelligence: recognition (model-building) vs.control (action influence). Drawing on stochastic thermodynamics, we show how a Landauer-scale closed-cycle benchmark for epiplexity acquisition follows as a corollary of a standard thermodynamic-learning inequality under explicit subsystem assumptions, and we clarify how Landauer-scaled costs act as closed-cycle benchmarks under explicit reset/reuse and boundary-closure assumptions; conversely, we give a simple decoupling construction showing that without such assumptions -- and without charging for externally prepared low-entropy resources (e.g.fresh memory) crossing the boundary -- information gain and in-boundary dissipation need not be tightly linked. For empirical settings where the latent structure variable is unavailable, we align the operational notion of epiplexity with compute-bounded MDL epiplexity and recommend reporting MDL-epiplexity / compression-gain surrogates as companions. Finally, we propose a unified efficiency framework that reports both metrics together with a minimal checklist of boundary/energy accounting, coarse-graining/noise, horizon/reset, and cost conventions to reduce ambiguity and support consistent bits-per-joule comparisons, and we sketch connections to energy-adjusted scaling analyses.
tldr: This paper proposes two bits-per-joule metrics (Thermodynamic Epiplexity per Joule and Empowerment per Joule) to connect intelligence to physical efficiency, offering a framework for analyzing the energetic cost of AI systems in terms of model building and control.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了两个焦耳比特指标（每焦耳热力学复杂性和每焦耳赋能）来将智能与物理效率联系起来，提供了一个分析人工智能系统在模型构建和控制方面的能量成本的框架。
summary_zh: 现代人工智能系统在取得显著能力的同时，也消耗了大量的能量。为了将智能与物理效率联系起来，我们提出了在明确的核算约定下互补的两个比特/焦耳指标：（1）每焦耳热力学表征复杂度（Thermodynamic Epiplexity per Joule）-- 在给定边界内，单位测量能量下，智能体内部状态新编码的关于理论环境实例变量的结构信息比特数；以及（2）每焦耳赋能（Empowerment per Joule）-- 在固定时程上，预期的能量成本下的具身传感器运动通道容量（控制信息）。 这提供了物理智能的两个轴：识别（模型构建）与控制（行动影响）。 借助随机热力学，我们展示了在明确的子系统假设下，熵清除尺寸的表征复杂度获取闭环基准如何作为标准热力学学习不等式的推论；并且阐明了在明确的重置/复用和边界闭合假设下，熵清除尺寸成本如何充当闭环基准；相反，我们给出了一个简单的解耦构造，表明在没有这些假设的情况下，并且在不对跨越边界的外部准备的低熵资源（例如，新的内存）收费的情况下，信息增益和边界内的耗散不必紧密相连。 对于潜在结构变量不可用的经验设置，我们将表征复杂度的操作概念与计算有界的最小描述长度（MDL）表征复杂度对齐，并建议报告MDL表征复杂度/压缩增益替代指标作为补充。 最后，我们提出了一个统一的效率框架，同时报告这两个指标以及边界/能量核算、粗粒化/噪声、时程/重置和成本约定的最小检查清单，以减少歧义并支持一致的比特/焦耳比较，并且我们概述了与能量调整的缩放分析的联系。

title: El Agente Quntur: A research collaborator agent for quantum chemistry
summary: Quantum chemistry is a foundational enabling tool for the fields of chemistry, materials science, computational biology and others. Despite of its power, the practical application of quantum chemistry simulations remains in the hands of qualified experts due to methodological complexity, software heterogeneity, and the need for informed interpretation of results. To bridge the accessibility gap for these tools and expand their reach to chemists with broader backgrounds, we introduce El Agente Quntur, a hierarchical, multi-agent AI system designed to operate not merely as an automation tool but as a research collaborator for computational quantum chemistry. Quntur was designed following three main strategies: i) elimination of hard-coded procedural policies in favour of reasoning-driven decisions, ii) construction of general and composable actions that facilitate generalization and efficiency, and iii) implementation of guided deep research to integrate abstract quantum-chemical reasoning across subdisciplines and a detailed understanding of the software's internal logic and syntax. Although instantiated in ORCA, these design principles are applicable to research agents more generally and easily expandable to additional quantum chemistry packages and beyond. Quntur supports the full range of calculations available in ORCA 6.0 and reasons over software documentation and scientific literature to plan, execute, adapt, and analyze in silico chemistry experiments following best practices. We discuss the advances and current bottlenecks in agentic systems operating at the research level in computational chemistry, and outline a roadmap toward a fully autonomous end-to-end computational chemistry research agent.
tldr: The paper introduces 'El Agente Quntur,' a hierarchical AI agent designed to act as a research collaborator for quantum chemistry, automating and improving the accessibility of complex quantum chemistry simulations within ORCA.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了“El Agente Quntur”，一个层级AI代理，旨在作为量子化学的研究合作者，在ORCA中自动化并提高复杂量子化学模拟的可访问性。
summary_zh: 量子化学是化学、材料科学、计算生物学等领域的基础性使能工具。尽管其功能强大，但量子化学模拟的实际应用仍然掌握在合格的专家手中，原因在于方法论的复杂性、软件的异构性以及对结果进行知情解释的需要。为了弥合这些工具的可及性差距，并将其应用范围扩展到具有更广泛背景的化学家，我们推出了El Agente Quntur，这是一个分层、多智能体AI系统，其设计目的不仅是作为自动化工具，而是作为计算量子化学的研究合作者。Quntur的设计遵循三个主要策略：i) 消除硬编码的过程性策略，转而采用推理驱动的决策，ii) 构建通用且可组合的动作，以促进泛化和效率，iii) 实施引导式深度研究，以整合各个子学科间的抽象量子化学推理，以及对软件内部逻辑和语法的详细理解。虽然Quntur在ORCA中实例化，但这些设计原则更普遍地适用于研究智能体，并且易于扩展到其他量子化学软件包乃至更广阔的领域。Quntur支持ORCA 6.0中提供的所有计算，并对软件文档和科学文献进行推理，以按照最佳实践计划、执行、调整和分析硅片化学实验。我们讨论了计算化学领域研究级别的智能体系统中的进展和当前瓶颈，并概述了通往完全自主的端到端计算化学研究智能体的路线图。

title: A Mixed Reality System for Robust Manikin Localization in Childbirth Training
summary: Opportunities for medical students to gain practical experience in vaginal births are increasingly constrained by shortened clinical rotations, patient reluctance, and the unpredictable nature of labour. To alleviate clinicians' instructional burden and enhance trainees' learning efficiency, we introduce a mixed reality (MR) system for childbirth training that combines virtual guidance with tactile manikin interaction, thereby preserving authentic haptic feedback while enabling independent practice without continuous on-site expert supervision. The system extends the passthrough capability of commercial head-mounted displays (HMDs) by spatially calibrating an external RGB-D camera, allowing real-time visual integration of physical training objects. Building on this capability, we implement a coarse-to-fine localization pipeline that first aligns the maternal manikin with fiducial markers to define a delivery region and then registers the pre-scanned neonatal head within this area. This process enables spatially accurate overlay of virtual guiding hands near the manikin, allowing trainees to follow expert trajectories reinforced by haptic interaction. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that the system achieves accurate and stable manikin localization on a standalone headset, ensuring practical deployment without external computing resources. A large-scale user study involving 83 fourth-year medical students was subsequently conducted to compare MR-based and virtual reality (VR)-based childbirth training. Four senior obstetricians independently assessed performance using standardized criteria. Results showed that MR training achieved significantly higher scores in delivery, post-delivery, and overall task performance, and was consistently preferred by trainees over VR training.
tldr: This paper presents a mixed reality system for childbirth training using a manikin, demonstrating improved performance compared to virtual reality training in a large user study with medical students.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于分娩训练的混合现实系统，该系统使用人体模型，并在包含大量医学生的实验用户研究中显示出比虚拟现实训练更好的性能。
summary_zh: 医学学生获得阴道分娩实践经验的机会日益受到临床轮转时间缩短、患者不情愿以及分娩不可预测性的限制。为了减轻临床医生的教学负担并提高学员的学习效率，我们引入了一种用于分娩培训的混合现实（MR）系统，该系统将虚拟指导与触觉模型互动相结合，从而在保留真实触感的反馈的同时，无需持续的现场专家监督即可实现独立练习。该系统通过空间校准外部RGB-D相机，扩展了商用头戴式显示器（HMD）的透视功能，从而实现了物理训练对象的实时视觉集成。在此基础上，我们实现了一种由粗到精的定位流程，该流程首先将产妇模型与基准标记物对齐以定义分娩区域，然后在该区域内注册预先扫描的新生儿头部。该过程实现了虚拟引导手在模型附近的空间精确叠加，使学员能够遵循由触觉互动加强的专家轨迹。实验评估表明，该系统在独立头显上实现了准确稳定的模型定位，确保了无需外部计算资源的实际部署。随后进行了一项涉及83名四年级医学专业的学生的大规模用户研究，以比较基于MR和基于虚拟现实（VR）的分娩培训。四位资深产科医师使用标准化标准独立评估了表现。结果表明，MR培训在分娩、产后和整体任务表现方面取得了显著更高的分数，并且学员始终更喜欢MR培训而不是VR培训。

title: LD-SLRO: Latent Diffusion Structured Light for 3-D Reconstruction of Highly Reflective Objects
summary: Fringe projection profilometry-based 3-D reconstruction of objects with high reflectivity and low surface roughness remains a significant challenge. When measuring such glossy surfaces, specular reflection and indirect illumination often lead to severe distortion or loss of the projected fringe patterns. To address these issues, we propose a latent diffusion-based structured light for reflective objects (LD-SLRO). Phase-shifted fringe images captured from highly reflective surfaces are first encoded to extract latent representations that capture surface reflectance characteristics. These latent features are then used as conditional inputs to a latent diffusion model, which probabilistically suppresses reflection-induced artifacts and recover lost fringe information, yielding high-quality fringe images. The proposed components, including the specular reflection encoder, time-variant channel affine layer, and attention modules, further improve fringe restoration quality. In addition, LD-SLRO provides high flexibility in configuring the input and output fringe sets. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method improves both fringe quality and 3-D reconstruction accuracy over state-of-the-art methods, reducing the average root-mean-squared error from 1.8176 mm to 0.9619 mm.
tldr: The paper presents a latent diffusion model (LD-SLRO) for improving 3D reconstruction of highly reflective objects by enhancing fringe quality in fringe projection profilometry, significantly reducing reconstruction error.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于潜在扩散模型（LD-SLRO）的方法，通过提高条纹投影轮廓术中的条纹质量来改进高反射物体的3D重建，从而显著降低重建误差。
summary_zh: 基于条纹投影轮廓术的高反射率和低表面粗糙度物体的三维重建仍然是一项重大挑战。在测量此类光亮表面时，镜面反射和间接照明通常会导致投影条纹图案的严重失真或损失。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于潜在扩散的反射物体结构光方法（LD-SLRO）。首先对从高反射表面捕获的相移条纹图像进行编码，以提取捕捉表面反射特性的潜在表征。然后将这些潜在特征作为条件输入到一个潜在扩散模型中，该模型概率性地抑制反射引起的伪影并恢复丢失的条纹信息，从而产生高质量的条纹图像。我们提出的组件，包括镜面反射编码器、时变通道仿射层和注意力模块，进一步提高了条纹恢复质量。此外，LD-SLRO在配置输入和输出条纹集合方面提供了高度的灵活性。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在条纹质量和三维重建精度方面均优于当前最先进的方法，将平均均方根误差从 1.8176 毫米降低到 0.9619 毫米。

title: Quantile-Physics Hybrid Framework for Safe-Speed Recommendation under Diverse Weather Conditions Leveraging Connected Vehicle and Road Weather Information Systems Data
summary: Inclement weather conditions can significantly impact driver visibility and tire-road surface friction, requiring adjusted safe driving speeds to reduce crash risk. This study proposes a hybrid predictive framework that recommends real-time safe speed intervals for freeway travel under diverse weather conditions. Leveraging high-resolution Connected Vehicle (CV) data and Road Weather Information System (RWIS) data collected in Buffalo, NY, from 2022 to 2023, we construct a spatiotemporally aligned dataset containing over 6.6 million records across 73 days. The core model employs Quantile Regression Forests (QRF) to estimate vehicle speed distributions in 10-minute windows, using 26 input features that capture meteorological, pavement, and temporal conditions. To enforce safety constraints, a physics-based upper speed limit is computed for each interval based on real-time road grip and visibility, ensuring that vehicles can safely stop within their sight distance. The final recommended interval fuses QRF-predicted quantiles with both posted speed limits and the physics-derived upper bound. Experimental results demonstrate strong predictive performance: the QRF model achieves a mean absolute error of 1.55 mph, with 96.43% of median speed predictions within 5 mph, a PICP (50%) of 48.55%, and robust generalization across weather types. The model's ability to respond to changing weather conditions and generalize across road segments shows promise for real-world deployment, thereby improving traffic safety and reducing weather-related crashes.
tldr: This paper presents a hybrid framework using Quantile Regression Forests and physics-based constraints to recommend safe driving speeds under various weather conditions, leveraging connected vehicle and road weather information.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种混合框架，利用分位数回归森林和基于物理的约束，结合联网车辆和道路气象信息，为各种天气条件下推荐安全驾驶速度。
summary_zh: 恶劣天气条件会显著影响驾驶员的能见度和轮胎-路面间的摩擦系数，需要调整安全驾驶速度以降低事故风险。本研究提出了一种混合预测框架，用于在不同天气条件下为高速公路行驶推荐实时安全速度区间。利用2022年至2023年在纽约州布法罗市收集的高分辨率联网车辆（CV）数据和道路气象信息系统（RWIS）数据，我们构建了一个时空对齐的数据集，包含73天内超过660万条记录。核心模型采用分位数回归森林（QRF）来估计10分钟窗口内的车辆速度分布，使用26个输入特征来捕捉气象、路面和时间条件。为强制执行安全约束，基于实时的路面附着系数和能见度，为每个区间计算基于物理原理的最高速度限制，确保车辆能够在视距范围内安全停车。最终推荐的区间融合了QRF预测的分位数、限速标志以及基于物理推导的上限。实验结果表明了强大的预测性能：QRF模型的平均绝对误差为1.55英里/小时，96.43%的中位数速度预测值在5英里/小时范围内，PICP（50%）为48.55%，并且在不同天气类型中具有稳健的泛化能力。该模型响应不断变化的天气条件以及在不同路段之间泛化的能力，展现了实际部署的潜力，从而可以提高交通安全并减少与天气相关的事故。

title: Feature points evaluation on omnidirectional vision with a photorealistic fisheye sequence -- A report on experiments done in 2014
summary: What is this report: This is a scientific report, contributing with a detailed bibliography, a dataset which we will call now PFSeq for ''Photorealistic Fisheye Sequence'' and make available at https://doi.org/10. 57745/DYIVVU, and comprehensive experiments. This work should be considered as a draft, and has been done during my PhD thesis ''Construction of 3D models from fisheye video data-Application to the localisation in urban area'' in 2014 [Mor16]. These results have never been published. The aim was to find the best features detector and descriptor for fisheye images, in the context of selfcalibration, with cameras mounted on the top of a car and aiming at the zenith (to proceed then fisheye visual odometry and stereovision in urban scenes). We face a chicken and egg problem, because we can not take advantage of an accurate projection model for an optimal features detection and description, and we rightly need good features to perform the calibration (i.e. to compute the accurate projection model of the camera). What is not this report: It does not contribute with new features algorithm. It does not compare standard features algorithms to algorithms designed for omnidirectional images (unfortunately). It has not been peer-reviewed. Discussions have been translated and enhanced but the experiments have not been run again and the report has not been updated accordingly to the evolution of the state-of-the-art (read this as a 2014 report).
tldr: This 2014 report evaluates feature detectors and descriptors for fisheye images in a self-calibration context using a new dataset, but acknowledges limitations like lacking novel algorithms or state-of-the-art comparison.
tldr_zh: 这份2014年的报告评估了鱼眼图像的特征检测器和描述符，并在自校准的背景下使用了一个新的数据集。但它承认了局限性，例如缺乏新的算法或与最新技术的比较。
summary_zh: 报告内容：这是一份科学报告，包含详细的参考文献、一个我们称之为PFSeq（“Photorealistic Fisheye Sequence”，即“照片级逼真鱼眼序列”）的数据集（可在https://doi.org/10. 57745/DYIVVU获取），以及全面的实验。本文应被视为草稿，完成于2014年本人博士论文《基于鱼眼视频数据构建3D模型——在城市区域定位的应用》[Mor16]期间。这些结果从未发表。目的是为了在自标定背景下，为鱼眼图像寻找最佳的特征检测器和描述符，摄像头安装在汽车顶部并朝向天顶（以便随后进行城市场景中的鱼眼视觉里程计和立体视觉）。我们面临着一个先有鸡还是先有蛋的问题，因为我们无法利用精确的投影模型来进行最佳的特征检测和描述，而我们恰恰需要良好的特征来执行标定（即计算相机的精确投影模型）。本报告不包含： 不包含新的特征算法。未将标准特征算法与为全向图像设计的算法进行比较（遗憾的是）。未经同行评审。讨论内容已经过翻译和完善，但实验尚未重新运行，报告也未根据最新技术发展进行更新（请将其视为2014年报告）。
